title: UGC Creator Program Coordinator
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're looking for a highly organized, detail-obsessed UGC Creator Program Coordinator to manage our creator program. You'll be the backbone of our creator operations - sourcing top talent, animating our community, and ensuring everything runs like clockwork. You'll report directly to one of the co-founders.

This role is perfect for someone who lives in Notion, speaks fluent English, and thrives on building systems that work.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Sourcing & Recruitment



- Inbound: Continuously identify and recruit top-tier UGC creators to join our program

- Outbound: Actively promote our UGC creator program across platforms and manage application funnels

- Build and maintain application docs/pages

- Prepare and update creator contracts

- Own the complete onboarding process, making sure every creator completes each step on time and updating documentation accordingly



2. Community Management



- Animate and engage our creator community in chat channels

- Design and share challenges

- Be the go-to person for all creator questions, problems, and support needs



3. Operations & Compliance



- Monitor UGC creator output to ensure they're meeting quantity requirements

- Prepare invoices and manage creator payouts

- Keep all operational documentation pristine and up-to-date



4. Strategic Development



- Benchmark competitor and adjacent creator programs for inspiration

- Identify opportunities for continuous improvement

- Bring fresh ideas to evolve our program





YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU:



- Are very good at Notion & 
 - you're borderline obsessed with building beautiful, functional docs

- Are fluent in English and naturally communicate with Gen Z creators

- Are Type A and detail-oriented to a fault (in the best way)

- Love operations and get genuine satisfaction from making processes run smoothly

- Can juggle multiple priorities while keeping everything organized

- Are proactive and don't wait to be told what needs doing



NICE TO HAVE



- Previous experience managing UGC creator programs, affiliate networks or online communities

- Familiarity with creator economy platforms and tools

- You'r a content creator yourself



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out this form : 



Record a 2-3 minute Loom video introducing yourself.

- Who you are

- Your relevant experience (previous roles, companies you've worked with)

- Why you're interested in this role

- What makes you a great fit for managing a UGC creator program





Our Process:

1/ Video application (you submit)

2/ 30-min intro call

3/ 45-min live case study

title: Data Entry/ Data Processing Specialist (Job Ref: STRT-DE-388010)
description:
Company Overview



StrataWorks is a leading provider of digital consulting and operational solutions. We assist businesses in optimizing workflows, managing data, and improving operational efficiency. Our clients range from startups to established enterprises, and our team is dedicated to delivering accurate, timely, and high-quality operational support.



Position Summary



StrataWorks is seeking a Data Entry / Data Processing Specialist to support the management and maintenance of information across internal systems. This position is critical for ensuring the accuracy, organization, and reliability of data used in decision-making and operational processes.



This is a support role focused on precision and consistency. Technical expertise beyond basic data handling is not required.



Key Responsibilities



Enter, update, and organize data in spreadsheets, databases, and internal platforms



Verify data accuracy and completeness



Conduct online research to gather relevant information for projects



Prepare basic reports and maintain documentation



Maintain organized records of client projects, campaigns, or operational tasks



Follow instructions accurately and review work for errors



Provide assistance to tea
mbers as needed



Adapt to changing tasks based on business requirements



Qualifications



Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy



Proficiency in spreadsheets and online platforms



Ability to follow instructions consistently



Proactive in seeking clarification when needed



Reliable, accountable, and responsive



Fluent in written English



Willingness to work night shifts aligned with US teams



Preferred but not required:



Previous experience in data entry or data processing



Proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)



Familiarity with databases or CRM platforms



Basic online research skills



Experience in remote team environments



C2-level English proficiency



Importance of the Role



Accurate data is essential to the operational success of StrataWorks. By ensuring information is complete, organized, and reliable, the Data Entry / Data Processing Specialist enables the team to make informed decisions, track progress effectively, and execute projects efficiently.



This role is ideal for candidates who are meticulous, dependable, and committed to supporting operational excellence.



How to Apply

title: DTC Copywriter for Faith-Based E-Commerce Brand
description:
We're a fast-growing faith-based e-commerce brand selling Bible study products to Christians aged 18-35, primarily women. We're looking for a direct-response copywriter who can write emotional, conversational video ad scripts and
 ad copy.



Your responsibilities will include writing video ad scripts for
 and Instagram, creating hook variations and A/B test versions, writing primary texts and headlines for paid ads, researching voice-of-customer language from online communities, and developing new emotional angles for ad creative.



Our brand voice is conversational and grace-based. Scripts are written in paragraph form, like a friend talking to you. No bullet points in scripts, no corporate tone, no em dashes. If you've written for DTC e-commerce brands,
 video ads, or faith-based audiences, you're a strong fit.

title: AI Automation & Technical VA (n8n / AI Systems Specialist)
description:
We’re looking for an advanced-level AI Automation & Technical VA to build, deploy, and maintain n8n workflows and AI agents for our client’s internal operations and client-facing implementations.



This is a hands-on, high-responsibility role requiring strong technical execution, independent problem-solving, and the ability to work across EST, CST, MST, PST, CET, or GMT time zones.



The ideal candidate is proactive, self-directed, and genuinely excited about AI systems and automation.



Main Responsibilities

- Design, build, and maintain automation workflows in n8n (cloud or self-hosted).

- Deploy and configure AI Acquisition’s pre-built AI agents (Cold
 Agent, SDR Agent, and other automation agents) into client environments.

- Integrate AI agents with CRMs, lead sources, and communication tools.

- Connect and manage API integrations using webhooks and HTTP requests.

- Troubleshoot and resolve broken or underperforming workflows within defined response windows.

- Document all completed builds and create structured SOPs for client handoffs.

- Provide weekly build progress updates to the business owner.

- Attend weekly or bi-weekly AI Acquisition training sessions and apply new learnings to active workflows (non-negotiable requirement).

- Continuously improve workflow reliability, structure, and system performance.



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves):

- Advanced hands-on experience building workflows in n8n (cloud or self-hosted).

- Experience deploying or building AI agents (LLM-based, tool-calling, multi-step logic).

- Strong API literacy — comfortable reading documentation and connecting REST APIs via webhooks or HTTP nodes.

- CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar).

- Ability to independently troubleshoot and debug broken workflows.

- Strong async communication and documentation habits.

- Demonstrated ability to learn new platforms quickly and commit to ongoing structured training.

- Experience with or ability to rapidly learn the AI Acquisition platform.



Preferred Skills (Nice-to-Haves):

- Experience with Make (Integromat) or Zapier in addition to n8n.

- Knowledge of prompt engineering and AI agent architecture patterns.

- Familiarity with OpenAI, Anthropic, or other LLM APIs.

- Basic JavaScript or Python knowledge for custom n8n function nodes.

- Prior experience supporting a small agency or consultant serving multiple clients.



KPIs / Success Measures:

- Consistent weekly progress on active builds with structured updates.

- Low workflow error and failure rate across all deployed automations.

- Critical workflow issues resolved within 24 hours; non-critical within 72 hours.

- Successful client integrations completed with minimal rework.

- All completed workflows documented with SOPs within 48 hours of deployment.

- Positive client satisfaction reported to the business owner.

- Completion of AI Acquisition training modules with visible application to live systems.



Ideal Candidate:

- You are an advanced Tech VA or Automation Specialist who:

- Builds stable, scalable automation systems with minimal oversight.

- Can deploy and configure AI agents inside structured platforms.

- Understands APIs, integrations, and system logic deeply.

- Thrives in fast-moving environments with evolving AI tools.

- Communicates clearly, documents thoroughly, and takes ownership of results.

- Is committed to continuous learning and structured training.



Compensation & Details

- $1,200 – $2,000 per month (based on experience), with openness to performance incentives tied to successful client implementations.



Hiring Process:

- Round 1 – Interview with Talent Team (technical depth + workflow assessment)

- Round 2 – Interview with Hiring Manager (scope alignment + compensation discussion)



Kindly submit your resume along with your application.

title: Product Formulation Specialist (Health & Wellness)
description: We are looking for an experienced Product Formulation Specialist to help develop and refine ingredient formulations for custom health and wellness products. The ideal candidate will have experience working with functional ingredients, nutraceuticals, or flavor-based health products, and will be able to recommend ingredient combinations that are both effective and compliant with regulatory standards. Your role will involve selecting and optimizing ingredients, improving taste and usability, ensuring safety and regulatory compliance, and working alongside manufacturers to develop high-quality custom formulations. Experience with product development, ingredient sourcing, and health product compliance (US/EU/UK markets) is highly preferred.

title: Full-Time Social Media Manager (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Company

Safetech Builders is a Florida-based roofing and construction company expanding from Broward County to Tampa. We are committed to quality workmanship, customer education, and reliability in every project. As we continue growing, we are looking to strengthen our brand presence and community awareness across Florida.



We’re hiring a full-time Social Media Manager to lead our digital content, branding, and online engagement efforts. You’ll develop social media strategy, create content, and help amplify our reputation across marketing platforms.



Main Responsibilities

1. Content Strategy & Social Media Management

- Create, schedule, and publish content across
, Instagram, Google Business, and LinkedIn

- Develop monthly content calendars for educational, project-based, and community-focused posts

- Capture and organize photos & videos from job sites, customer testimonials, and team activities

- Monitor engagement and respond to messages, comments, and inquiries



2. Branding & Creative Production

- Maintain consistent brand look and messaging across all platforms

- Edit short-form videos (Reels/TikTok-style) and basic graphic posts

- Coordinate photography/video needs with field teams and external vendors

- Collect before/after project media and ensure proper storage and organization



3. Community & Reputation Building

- Manage Google reviews outreach and customer review follow-ups

- Highlight local partnerships, community events, and team initiatives

- Assist in planning and promoting local events or sponsorships

- Engage with relevant local groups, neighborhoods, and online communities



4. Marketing Coordination & Reporting

- Track social performance metrics and monthly growth reports

- Support flyer, yard sign, vehicle wrap, and uniform branding projects

- Work alongside leadership to refine messaging and campaign direction

- Collaborate with sales and operations teams to promote active jobs and company milestones



Qualifications

- Strong written communication and storytelling skills

- Experience managing business social media accounts

- Proficiency with Canva, CapCut (or similar), Meta Business Suite, and Google Workspace

- Ability to capture, organize, and edit digital content independently

- Good organizational habits and attention to detail

- Roofing, construction, or home services industry experience is a plus, but not required



Tools You’ll Use

Canva • CapCut • Meta Business Suite • Google Workspace • Google Business Profile • Instagram •
 • YouTube •Dropbox / Google Drive



Send your CV along with your onlinejobs.ph link to

title: Call Center MANAGER
description:
We're hiring a Call Center Manager for our growing home improvement company!



We're seeking an experienced leader to manage our outbound/inbound calling team focused on setting high-quality appointments for roofing and other home improvement services (e.g., siding, windows, gutters, etc.).



Key Requirements:

-Proven experience managing teams of 10+ callers (appointment setters, telemarketers, or similar roles) in a fast-paced call center environment

-Direct hands-on experience in setting appointments specifically for roofing, remodeling, restoration, or other home improvement/trade services

-Strong track record of driving KPIs like contact rates, booking rates, show-up rates, and conversion

-Ability to hire, train, coach, motivate, and performance-manage callers to hit and exceed targets

-Comfortable with scripting, objection handling, lead qualification, and optimizing call processes



Schedule:

-Full-time, Monday through Saturday

-Hours: 9 AM – 5 PM Eastern Standard Time (must be available and working these hours reliably)



This is a long-term career opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and to build something lasting with a company that values results and team development. We're looking for a committed leader ready to grow with us—not a short-term gig.



How to Apply:

Reply with the exact phrase "I am your call center manager" in your message, and include a Loom video (1-3 minutes) where you introduce yourself and cover:



Your relevant experience managing call teams and setting home improvement/roofing appointments

Your approach to leading a team, hitting targets, and handling challenges

Why you're the right person for this long-term role and excited about this opportunity



Serious applicants only—applications without the phrase and Loom video will not be considered.

If this sounds like you, we want to hear from you! Apply now. ????

---

Instagram






LinkedIn



X 
)

Required Qualifications



3+ years experience in SEO content writing

Proven ability to rank articles on Google



Deep knowledge of keyword research tools



Strong English writing skills (near-native fluency required)

Ability to maintain consistent brand tone

---



Required Technical Skills



You should be familiar with:



SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, or similar)

Performance Metrics



You will be evaluated on:



Organic traffic growth



Keyword ranking improvements



Publishing consistency



Engagement rates



Content quality



Execution speed and responsiveness



Growth of social accounts







---



What We Are NOT Looking For



Generic AI copy-paste writers



Entry-level social media posters



Low-effort content recycling



Poor English grammar





We need strategic execution, not basic posting.





---



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow into:



Head of Content



SEO Director



Brand Content Strategist





As MEINHAUS expands nationally, content leadership becomes critical.





---



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Links to SEO articles you have written that are currently ranking





2. Social media accounts you manage





3. A short paragraph explaining your SEO strategy process





4. Confirmation you can work with EST overlap







Applications without portfolio examples will not be reviewed.

title: Urgent Hiring!! Recruiter (Remote)
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a highly motivated and resourceful Recruiter to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and coordinating candidates for various roles across different industries.



The ideal candidate is someone who is organized, proactive, and experienced in identifying top talent quickly. You should be comfortable managing multiple job openings, communicating with candidates, and keeping recruitment pipelines organized.



If you enjoy connecting great candidates with the right opportunities and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to hear from you.



Responsibilities:

* Source qualified candidates from platforms such as Indeed, LinkedIn, OnlineJobs, and other job boards

* Review resumes and screen candidates based on job requirements

* Conduct initial interviews and candidate assessments

* Manage candidate pipelines and track applicant progress

* Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers

* Post job listings and optimize job postings to attract qualified candidates

* Maintain organized recruitment records and candidate databases

* Communicate with candidates professionally throughout the hiring process



Requirements:

* Proven experience in recruitment or talent acquisition

* Experience sourcing candidates using multiple job platforms

* Strong communication and interpersonal skills

* Excellent organizational and time management abilities

* Ability to screen candidates effectively and identify top talent

* Comfortable managing multiple roles and deadlines

* Strong written and spoken English



Preferred Qualifications:

* Experience recruiting for remote roles

* Experience using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) such as RecruitCRM

* Experience recruiting for technical, customer support, or administrative roles



Why Join Us:

* Fully remote work environment

* Work with a growing and dynamic team

* Opportunity to help build strong teams across multiple industries



How to Apply?

Reply to this job post with the following:

* UPDATED Resume

* UPDATED professional intro video (1–2 mins)

* Please include in your video:

* Brief introduction about yourself

* Your Recruiter experience

* Tools and systems you’ve used

* One fun fact about yourself



We’re looking for someone dependable, organized, and ready to grow with a long-term team.

title: Customer Support Assistant
description:
Monster Group (UK) Ltd is a thriving UK-based online retailer offering a diverse range of high-quality, great-value products to customers worldwide. We are looking for our next “Monster” to join our growing team and help deliver customer service that is truly out of this world.



This is a fully remote position based in the Philippines, offering an exciting opportunity to work with a successful British ecommerce company.



You will be required to log in remotely and work during UK office hours (Monday–Friday, 8:00am–5:30pm GMT) to maintain clear communication with the team. Occasional weekend work may be required.



Key Responsibilities

-Respond to customer queries via
, ticketing systems, and phone calls in a friendly and professional manner

-Confidently and creatively resolve customer issues across a wide range of products within agreed timescales

-Send invoices and provide relevant information to customers

-Liaise with courier companies and use online portals to resolve delivery-related queries

-Dispatch orders and ensure online marketplaces remain up to date

-Answer marketplace enquiries and monitor customer feedback

-Maintain accurate records and follow internal processes to support smooth daily operations



Requirements

-Previous experience in customer support within an ecommerce company

-Confident using IT tools such as Google Sheets, Excel, CRM systems, and other digital platforms

-Experience with marketplaces such as Magento, Amazon, and eBay is a strong advantage

-Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

-Friendly, professional, and discreet when handling company and customer information

-Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail

-Ability to multitask and manage multiple priorities effectively



If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working UK hours from the Philippines, we would love to hear from you. Join us and become part of a dynamic and supportive ecommerce team!

title: Web Development Admin Assistant
description:
Monster Group (UK) Ltd is a thriving online retailer based in the UK offering a diverse range of high quality and great value products to an international market. We are looking for our next Monster to help us deliver customer service that is out of this world!



As a remote Web Development Assistant, you'll be responsible in the following:

• Ask suppliers to fill out a template document.

• You will be confident in dealing with IT programmes such as google sheets, Excel and CRM.

• You will be friendly, professional and discrete when dealing with our company and customers information.

• You will have excellent English skills, both in writing and verbal communications.

• Your attention to detail will be perfect and be highly organized, as you might be juggling multiple tasks at once!



This is a fantastic opportunity for someone to work with a successful British ecommerce company. You will be required to remotely log in and work during our UK office/working hours (Monday - Friday 8-5.30 GMT) so that we can maintain virtual contact and communications.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
HomeWave Property Management is a short-term rental management company based in Southwest Florida. We currently manage over 20 vacation rental properties and utilize industry-leading software platforms including Hostaway, PriceLabs, and Breezeway to streamline operations and maximize performance.



Position Overview: The Virtual Assistant plays a key role in supporting daily operations, ensuring seamless guest experiences, and maintaining strong relationships with property owners and vendors.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Guest, Vendor & Owner Communication:

-Respond promptly and professionally to guest inquiries before, during, and after stays

-Coordinate with vendors for maintenance, cleaning, and service requests

-Resolve issues efficiently while maintaining high customer satisfaction



2. New Property Onboarding Support:

-Assist with setting up new listings in Hostaway

-Coordinate photography, listing creation, and content optimization

-Ensure pricing strategies are implemented in PriceLabs

-Input property details, house rules, amenities, and operational workflows

-Coordinate cleaning and maintenance scheduling through Breezeway



3. Administrative & Office Support:

-Maintain organized digital records and documentation

-Monitor calendars and booking schedules

-Assist with reporting and performance tracking

-Support team projects and operational improvements

-Perform general administrative tasks as needed



Ideal Candidate Qualifications:

-Strong written and verbal communication skills

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

-Experience with short-term rental platforms preferred

-Familiarity with Hostaway, PriceLabs, and Breezeway is a plus

-Ability to multitask and work independently

-Problem-solving mindset with a customer-service focus

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
About NORDMUT

NORDMUT is a growing e?commerce brand focused on high-quality outdoor consumer products and a data-driven approach to online marketing. We are building a lean, performance-oriented marketing team to profitably scale our DTC business across Europe.



Role Overview

As Google Ads Manager at NORDMUT, you will own our entire Google Ads funnel end-to-end: from strategy and campaign setup to daily optimization, reporting, and scaling. Your goal is to profitably grow revenue by driving high-quality traffic and conversions through Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube campaigns.



Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute a Google Ads strategy aligned with NORDMUT’s growth and ROAS targets (Search, Shopping, PMax, Retargeting, YouTube).



Set up, manage, and continuously optimize campaigns, ad groups, keywords, audiences, and bidding strategies for maximum ROI.



Own product feed and Merchant Center setup and optimization for Shopping and PMax (titles, attributes, custom labels, diagnostics, disapprovals).



Conduct ongoing keyword research, negative keyword management, and account structuring to improve CTR, CPC, and conversion rate.



Plan, run, and evaluate A/B tests on ads, assets, landing pages, and bidding strategies to systematically improve performance.



Implement and monitor conversion tracking (Google Ads, GA4, Tag Manager) and ensure data quality for revenue and margin-based optimization.



Analyze performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, LTV, contribution margin) and deliver clear weekly and monthly reports with actionable insights.



Proactively identify scaling opportunities, new campaign types, and tests to unlock additional profitable growth.



Closely collaborate with the founder and creative team on ad messaging, assets, promos, and landing pages that convert.

?



Stay up to date with Google Ads best practices, policy changes, and competitive trends in e?commerce performance marketing.



Required Qualifications

2–4+ years hands-on experience managing Google Ads for e?commerce brands, ideally DTC with measurable revenue responsibility.



Proven track record of profitably scaling budgets while hitting ROAS/CPA targets (please be ready to share concrete case studies or numbers).



Strong experience with Google Shopping, Merchant Center, Performance Max, and Search campaigns; YouTube Ads experience is a plus.



Solid understanding of tracking and attribution using GA4 and Google Tag Manager.



Advanced analytical skills and confidence working with spreadsheets to slice data, build simple models, and generate insights.



Comfortable working in English in a remote, asynchronous environment; German is a plus but not required.

?



Google Ads certifications are a strong plus.

?



Soft Skills

Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and structured in your way of working.



Ownership mindset: you treat the ad account like your own money and focus on profitable, sustainable growth.



Proactive communicator who can turn complex data into clear, actionable recommendations for non-specialists.

?



Test-and-learn mentality with a bias for action and continuous improvement.



What We Offer

Direct impact on the growth trajectory of a lean, ambitious e?commerce brand.



Very high level of autonomy and responsibility over budget and strategy.



Flexible, remote-friendly setup with a small, entrepreneurial team based in Germany.



Opportunity to grow into a broader Performance Marketing Lead role as we scale.

title: Area Manager (Offshore - Filipino applicants only)
description:
We do not monitor OLJ messages or applications. If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply at the link below!




/application-am-step1



Hours: Monday - Friday 8 AM - 5 PM EST



Are you a driven and assertive leader with a passion for delivering outstanding client experiences? Join Serenity Clean as an Area Manager (Offshore) and play a crucial role in ensuring our clients receive exceptional service at every cleaning. Your primary responsibility is to deliver an OUTSTANDING experience to all of our clients, and if we ever fall short, it's your job to "Make It Right."



The Area Manager role at Serenity Clean is one of the most important in the company. It has one responsibility...



Deliver an OUTSTANDING experience to ALL of our clients at every cleaning we perform... and if we fall short of that, Make It Right.



From that one responsibility stems many others, the main one being managing the Cleaning Rockstars in your assigned locations, ensuring they deliver that OUTSTANDING experience.



AREA MANAGER (OFFSHORE) – OPERATIONS & CLIENT EXPERIENCE LEADER

Serenity Clean | Full-Time | Long-Term Role

Serenity Clean is a fast-growing U.S.-based residential cleaning company.



We are hiring an Area Manager to protect our client experience, enforce standards, and ensure operational excellence across assigned locations.

This is one of the most important roles in our company.

This is NOT a sales role.

 This is NOT a creative role.

 This is NOT a “people-pleasing” role.

This is an operational leadership role.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITY

Deliver an OUTSTANDING experience at every cleaning.

If we fall short, you Make It Right — immediately, decisively, and completely.

You will protect recurring revenue by:

• Enforcing standards

 • Managing cleaners

 • Solving client issues

 • Controlling schedules

 • Maintaining documentation discipline



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR?

This role is ideal for someone who:

• Is naturally structured and organized

 • Is assertive (not passive, not aggressive)

 • Is comfortable correcting people directly

 • Follows systems and processes without cutting corners

 • Tracks details carefully

 • Documents everything

 • Stays calm under pressure

 • Handles American clients confidently



If you prefer creativity over structure, this role will feel restrictive.

If you thrive on accountability, enforcement, and operational control — you will excel.



EQUIREMENTS:

• C1-Level English (spoken and written)

 • Confident speaking with Americans (no intimidation)

 • Fast responsiveness during shift hours

 • Strong documentation skills

 • Ability to manage multiple issues at once

 • Stable internet and quiet work environment

 • Available full-time (U.S. business hours alignment required)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

CLIENT EXPERIENCE & RETENTION

 • Resolve complaints quickly and decisively

 • Protect recurring clients

 • Execute our 200% Make It Right Guarantee

OPERATIONS CONTROL

 • Ensure 100% schedule completion daily

 • Track and manage all support tickets

 • Coordinate with Sales, HR, and Marketing

 • Submit Stripe dispute evidence accurately

TEAM ACCOUNTABILITY

 • Manage Cleaning Rockstars in assigned areas

 • Conduct monthly 1-on-1 meetings

 • Issue written redirections when needed

 • Identify underperformance and escalate appropriately

SYSTEMS & REPORTING

 • Daily operational updates (3–10 minutes)

 • Inventory checklist control

 • Payroll/time tracking coordination

 • Documentation of all client and team issues



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Higher client retention

 • Lower cleaner turnover

 • Fewer escalations

 • Strong review consistency

 • Zero operational surprises

You are not here to motivate with speeches.

You are here to enforce excellence and protect revenue.



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

• Operations or team management experience

 • Experience handling complaints or escalations

 • Remote team leadership

 • Familiarity with Slack, Zoom, CRM systems

 • Cleaning or service-industry background (plus but not required)



COMPENSATION

• Competitive base pay

 • Performance incentives tied to retention and operational metrics

 • Long-term growth opportunity inside a scaling U.S. company



If you're ready to take on a dynamic role where your client-facing experience can make a significant impact, apply through this link: 
/application-am-step1

title: Experienced Project Manager (Amazon FBA | Full-Time)
description:
Join a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Brand Based in Singapore



We’re a fast-growing Singapore-based Amazon FBA brand, and we’re looking for a strong Amazon Project Manager to help us scale.



This is not a coordinator role.

You’ll be managing people, systems, and execution across our Amazon operations.



We’re looking for someone who already knows the Amazon backend and can operate independently without being hand-held.



What you’ll be doing



You’ll manage a team of around 6 people across listings, design, and operations.



You’ll coordinate shipping plans with suppliers, freight forwarders, and inspection agents.

You’ll review and improve product listings, making sure keywords, images, and backend data are correct.

You’ll track inventory, sales, and campaigns, and keep our spreadsheets and dashboards accurate.

You’ll work closely with our design, listing, and ops teams to keep launches and updates on track.



You’ll take part in internal training, including AI-powered workflows.

AI is a tool, not a crutch. We expect you to use it to think better, work faster, and improve outcomes, not to blindly paste output.



You’ll help plan projects, improve processes, and make sure details like product size tiers and listing data are correct before they cost us money.



Tools you’ll use



Amazon Seller Central

Google Sheets and Docs

Notion

Helium 10

DataDive

Zoom



What we’re looking for



At least 5 years of relevant experience, ideally in Amazon FBA or e-commerce operations.

Real experience with Amazon listings, inventory tracking, and backend workflows.

Strong attention to detail and the ability to communicate clearly with different teams.

Able to work independently, prioritise well, and adapt when things change.

Strong problem-solving, coordination, and analytical skills.

Proactive, open-minded, and able to work well in a fast-moving team.



Working hours



Monday to Friday, 12 PM to 10 PM Singapore time

1 hour break

Remote, 44 hours per week



How to apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself and why you’re a good fit

Links or references to past Amazon FBA work

A brief explanation of your most recent role

A short video introduction if possible

Clear details of your Amazon FBA experience



Important



Only candidates with real Amazon FBA experience will be considered.

Applications without references or relevant background will be ignored.

If you are new to Amazon or need training, this is not the right role for you.

title: Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer
description:
Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer



(Single-Owner Pipeline | Zero Excuses | Pure Performance)



STOP.

Do not apply unless you are a proven, solo operator in high-volume outbound calling and direct closing. This is a role for disciplined producers only—no safety nets, no split roles, no tolerance for excuses.



About the Role



You will single-handedly drive the full acquisition cycle for distressed real estate deals (tax delinquent, inherited, title/condition problems, etc.). From the very first cold call to contract close, you are the only point of accountability—there are no handoffs, no account managers, no backstops.



Your success is measured daily, weekly, and monthly on three objective, transparent metrics:



Live cold call conversations (not just dials)



Qualified pipeline growth and management



Signed contracts (closed deals)



What You’ll Own



100+ Live Cold Call Conversations Daily: Only logged, real, two-way sales conversations count.



Immediate Qualification or Disqualification: No endless nurturing, no “relationship farming”—you work a fixed, black-and-white criteria set and move fast.



Full-Cycle Sales Execution: You negotiate, contract, and close each deal yourself. No one picks up your slack.



Total CRM Discipline: Every interaction, every note, every deal status tracked in real time—no exceptions.



Zero Tolerance for Missed Metrics: All activities and results are tracked, audited, and enforced daily. Fall short = out.



Who Thrives Here



Verified, high-output cold callers AND full-cycle closers (in real estate or equivalent asset class)



Transparent metric-sharers: You can instantly reference your highest daily call volume and your annual closed deals—with proof



Obsessed with documentation, accuracy, and pipeline hygiene



Crave direct, tough feedback; you adapt quickly and don’t personalize rejection



Perform best when pay is 100% tied to measurable output—no base, no cap, no politics



Immediate Disqualifiers



Missing resume or no metrics on call/deal volume



No voice memo or not following voice memo instructions (see below)



History of shared pipelines, team selling, or reluctance to own the entire sales process



Any record of missed quotas, weak reporting, or resistance to feedback



How to Apply (Strictly Enforced)



Resume: List outbound + closing experience with specific metrics:



Highest daily call volume



Total deals closed annually



Voice Memo (2-3 min, unscripted):



Your name, location, and highest ever cold call day



Brief story of a tough/distressed deal you closed: your steps and outcome



Your exact method for tracking calls, pipeline, and follow-up



The hardest feedback you’ve received—and what you changed after



Why you want an all-in, solo, performance-only sales seat



Any missing step = instant disqualification.



Do Not Apply If:



You don’t have both outbound and closing experience (with numbers)



You want ongoing “culture,” hand-holding, or daily coaching



You dislike strict process, documentation, or number-driven reviews



You prefer collaborative, shared, or “team” sales environments

title: AI Implementation Specialist
description:
We're a growing e-commerce company selling across multiple European markets. We're looking for someone who's obsessed with AI — specifically tools like Claude, Manus, ChatGPT, and automation platforms — and has the developer skills to actually implement them into a real business.

What you'll do:



Set up and manage AI agents for daily business tasks

Build automations and workflows (n8n, Make, custom scripts)

Implement AI tools across marketing, operations, and customer support

Stay on top of new AI developments and figure out what's useful for us

Optimize existing processes — find what's slow or manual and fix it with AI



What we're looking for:



Developer background (Python, JavaScript, or similar — you can code when needed)

Already using AI tools daily — not just prompting, but building with them

Experience with Claude, Manus, or similar AI platforms

Self-starter who finds things to improve without being told

Strong English communication

Reliable, available during European business hours



Bonus:



Experience with Shopify or e-commerce platforms

Familiar with n8n or Make

Experience building Claude skills, custom GPTs, or AI agents



How to apply:

Don't just send a CV. Tell us:



What's the most useful thing you've built or automated using AI?

What AI tools do you use daily and for what?

title: Operational E-Commerce Bookkeeper (Remote | Full-Time)
description:
About Us

 We are a high-growth direct-to-consumer e-commerce business running multiple revenue streams and complex payment ecosystems. Our goal is to get complete clarity on cash flows, account mapping, and reliable financial reporting, and to build structured bookkeeping that scales with the business.

This is not an entry-level data entry job — we need someone who thinks operationally and can bring order to complexity. You will start by organizing the business’s financial landscape and grow into a key finance function.



???? What You’ll Do

You will:

Phase 1 — Financial Mapping & Visibility

Map all financial accounts (bank accounts, payment processors, multi-currency balances, etc.)





Identify start & end balances





Classify funds into:





Funds received





Funds in transit





Liquidity available





Open liabilities / costs





Deliver a clear weekly liquidity + reconciliation snapshot





Phase 2 — Structured Bookkeeping

Maintain live transaction visibility with daily monitoring





Reconcile accounts weekly (15+ accounts across currencies/processors)





Transition from Sheets to structured bookkeeping (QuickBooks preferred)





Classify expenses & align with business departments





Prepare monthly close (before the 5th of the following month)





Support ongoing optimization of payment flows and processor reconciliation







???? What Success Looks Like

Complete visibility of what goes in and out of the business





Clean and accurate financial statements





Weekly liquidity summaries you can trust





Backlog cleaned and books fully reconciled





Monthly close done consistently and on time





You own the books — not just the data entry.



???? Required Skills & Experience

? Proven DTC e-commerce bookkeeping experience (Shopify + payment processors) — not generic bookkeeping

 ? Advanced Google Sheets / Excel proficiency (pivot tables, arrays, lookups, logic formulas)

 ? Experience reconciling multi-currency accounts and multiple processors

 ? QuickBooks knowledge or ability to implement it from scratch

 ? Strong communication skills (clear, timely, proactive)

 ? Structured, dependable operator mentality

Nice to have (not mandatory):

Experience with intercompany transactions

VAT / compliance understanding

Experience with inventory COGS accounting



???? Work Setup

Full-time (40 hrs/week) remote





Flexible hours with overlap to CET





Daily Slack communication & weekly reporting call





Weekly deliverables required



???? Clear Disqualifiers

Your application will be rejected if:

 ? You do not submit the required video (see below) or video is under 1 minute

 ? Your video does not tell us what you need from us to start

 ? Your resume does not clearly show DTC Shopify + multi-account bookkeeping experience

 ? You are only a basic data entry bookkeeper (no operational visibility)



???? Application Requirement – Video Submission

In addition to your resume, you must attach a short video (minimum 1 minute) where you:

Briefly introduce yourself





Explain your relevant e-commerce bookkeeping experience





Tell us: What do you need from us to start your work immediately?





No video = no review.



???? How to Apply — Screening Questions

Please answer the following clearly in your application:

Full name & current location (City / Country)





Your expected monthly rate (USD)





Describe your DTC bookkeeping experience





Which Shopify + payment processors have you worked with, and at what business size?





How would you map 15+ accounts and multi-currency flows on a weekly basis?





What advanced Sheets/Excel functions do you use daily? Give 2–3 examples.





Have you implemented or cleaned up QuickBooks or similar from scratch? If yes, briefly describe your process.





(Bonus points if your answers reference real examples/metrics.)



???? Application Evaluation Focus

We are looking for:

? Clarity of thought and structured answers

 ? Real e-commerce bookkeeping experience

 ? Spreadsheet strength

 ? Operational logic, not just technical entry skills

 ? Proactive communication style



???? Equal Opportunity

We focus on ability and output, not location, degree titles, or certifications.

title: Remote Recruiter
description:
Position Overview:





At Ready Roles, we don’t just fill positions—we build lasting, impactful careers. As a Remote Recruiter, you will play a key role in sourcing, screening, and hiring top-tier talent for our clients. Your ability to identify the right candidates, assess their qualifications, and ensure a seamless hiring process will be instrumental in helping businesses grow with highly skilled Remote Assistants.



This role requires a proactive, strategic recruiter who thrives in a fast-paced environment, understands talent acquisition trends, and is passionate about providing an exceptional candidate experience. If you are results-driven and committed to finding the best talent, we’d love to meet you!







Why Join Ready Roles?







A Career Path, Not Just a Job: This isn’t a stepping-stone; it’s a role designed for long-term growth. We’re looking for candidates who are eager to build a stable career with a supportive company that invests in their future.



Independence and Opportunity to Lead: Our clients want self-driven assistants who identify opportunities for improvement, find ways to make the business run smoothly, and drive the organization forward without needing to be told what to do. You’ll actively manage the business owner’s schedule and push organizational goals, not just your own tasks.



Respectful, Growth-Focused Clients: We only partner with clients who value stability and respect for their team. As a Ready Role, you’ll work with a business owner who is committed to your success and who shares a long-term vision for growth.







Key Responsibilities:



1. Talent Sourcing & Acquisition



Develop and implement strategic sourcing plans to find and attract qualified candidates.

Utilize job postings, social media recruitment, networking, and passive candidate outreach to build a strong talent pipeline.

2. Candidate Screening & Selection



Conduct initial interviews and screenings to assess candidates’ qualifications, experience, and cultural fit.

Work with hiring managers to understand role requirements and ideal candidate profiles.

3. Recruitment Coordination & Endorsement



Manage the recruitment process from sourcing to final endorsement, ensuring candidates are well-prepared for the hiring process.

Guide candidates through each hiring stage, ensuring clear communication and smooth transitions.

4. Candidate & Client Experience



Ensure a positive candidate experience, providing timely updates, interview feedback, and professional communication.

Work closely with clients and hiring managers to ensure their hiring needs are met efficiently.

5. Database & ATS Management



Maintain and update the recruitment database or applicant tracking system (ATS) to ensure accurate candidate records.

Track and analyze recruiting metrics to optimize processes and improve hiring cycles.

6. Employer Branding & Recruitment Optimization



Support employer branding initiatives to attract top talent and maintain a strong candidate pipeline.

Stay up to date on hiring trends and best practices to continuously improve recruitment strategies.





What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience in recruitment, talent acquisition, or HR coordination.

Strong interpersonal & communication skills – ability to connect with candidates and hiring managers effectively.

Highly organized & detail-oriented – ability to manage multiple roles and hiring timelines simultaneously.

Proficiency with ATS & HR software – experience with recruitment tools and database management.

Knowledge of sourcing techniques – ability to use LinkedIn, job boards, and other sourcing platforms to attract top talent.

Self-Driven, Proactive Mindset - This role is for someone who naturally takes the initiative and actively finds ways to contribute. You’ll be expected to add value without waiting for instructions and to be a driving force for the business.

Commitment to Long-Term Growth - Ready Roles is built on loyalty and stability. We’re looking for someone who values a long-term commitment, seeks stability, and is motivated to build a future with us and the business owner they support.

Aligned with Our Values - Ready Roles believes in accountability, respect, and integrity. We’re looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, consistently shows up with purpose, and is eager to create a lasting impact.





Qualifications:



Leadership Potential and Vision: Prior experience managing remote tasks or supporting a business owner is a plus, but we’re most interested in candidates ready to take ownership, lead by example, and actively shape the future of their role.

Resourceful and Solution-Oriented: You’ll look for ways to make the business owner’s day-to-day run smoothly, identifying gaps, solving problems, and proactively contributing to long-term growth.

Strong Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills to maintain consistent, professional interactions with the business owner, tea
mbers, and clients.

Growth-Minded and Self-Motivated: If you’re looking for a career where you can make an impact and build something lasting, Ready Roles is the place for you. This role is designed for someone who sees this as more than just a job—a chance to lead, grow, and secure their future.





What You Can Expect from Ready Roles:



Clear Growth Path and Scalable Compensation: As the business grows and you take on additional responsibilities, the business owner is committed to scaling your compensation. This means your role and pay will increase as the team expands and your impact grows.



Supportive, Stable Environment: Ready Roles partners with respectful, growth-focused clients who are committed to creating a positive, long-term working relationship with you. Our goal is to set you up for success so that you can help the business owner achieve their vision.



Training and Development: Continuous learning and access to resources that help you become an indispensable part of the client’s team. Our onboarding process and ongoing support ensure you have the foundation needed to succeed and grow.







Why Our Clients Depend on Us



Our clients are ambitious business owners who trust Ready Roles to help them grow and succeed. They count on a reliable, proactive partner who can stay one step ahead, push organizational goals, and add lasting value. We’re looking for someone who is motivated by the opportunity to build, lead, and grow, and who values the chance to make a true difference in a business owner’s life.





Apply Today :

title: Executive Assistant | Healthcare Business | Spreadsheets, Reporting, and Operations Support
description:

We are seeking a highly organized, detail oriented Executive Assistant to support a busy business owner. This role requires someone who enjoys systems, spreadsheets, tracking projects, and helping keep both business and personal tasks organized.



The ideal candidate is proactive, reliable, comfortable with data and reporting, and able to take ownership of tasks without needing constant direction.

 inbox

 and calendar management experience

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Sales Development Representative

Location: Remote

Schedule: Monday-Friday 12PM-9PM Eastern Daylight Time

Type: Contract





Mission with Meaning – Help homeowners keep their solar savings on-track by maintaining and protecting their solar systems.



Stable Base + Bonuses – Start at USD $1000-$2,000/month based on fit and experience, two pay days per month, and boost your income every single day with performance bonuses.



Career Launchpad – Clear promotion tracks, one-on-one coaching, and certifications that look great on your résumé.



100 % Remote, 100 % Supported – Work from home with a tight-knit global team that shares playbooks, live feedback, and daily wins.



Fast-Growing Green-Tech Company – Ride the wave of the booming renewable-energy sector while making a positive impact.



What You’ll Do



Call with Confidence – Call 120 + homeowners daily, introduce Conserva’s solar system service platform, and guide homeowners to sign the service agreement to have an inspection completed.



Be the Voice of Trust – Deliver our proven script in clear, friendly, American-style English.



Own Your Pipeline – Tag every conversation in our modern dialer so no lead gets left behind.



Smash Your Targets – Daily KPIs and monthly bonuses keep the wins coming fast.



Level-Up Together – Join live call-review huddles, share new objections you’ve cracked, and shape tomorrow’s playbook.



What Makes You a Fit



Fluent English & Empathy – Your tone builds rapport in seconds and you can simplify technical ideas for everyday homeowners.



Resilient & Goal-Driven – Rejection rolls off your back; hitting numbers fires you up.



Organized Self-Starter – You thrive in a remote setting with a reliable PC, high speed internet, and a quiet space.



Sales or Support Background – previous experience on the phone is ideal, but raw talent + grit works too—we’ll train you.



The Nuts & Bolts

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 12 PM–9 PM EDT (That’s Tuesday–Saturday, 12 AM–9 AM PH time)



Type: Independent Contractor (Full-time)



Equipment: Computer or laptop, headset, high-speed internet



Ready to Accelerate Your Earnings?



Record a quick intro – Using Loom (free), film yourself reading the script below in a bright, friendly tone.



Submit the Loom link when you apply.



We review within 48 hours. Top candidates move straight to a live interview.



Voice-Intro Script (30 seconds)



“Your system had a 25-year warranty, covering parts, inverter, and labor. However, because   Titan didn’t document maintenance, this inspection is required to confirm your system is eligible for full coverage. This inspection is a one-time $189 fee.   It includes:  A full system check to confirm everything is working, they examine every component of your system and use a drone to get Infrared thermal imaging to detect hidden   electrical issues, such as hot spots or electrical faults.                                                      Ensuring your system is still safe and compliant and still qualifies for full warranty protection..”



Take the next step toward a high-energy career with unlimited upside and a company that’s powering the clean-energy future. Apply now—Conserva can’t wait to meet you!

title: Shopify Specialist (Design, Content, SEO, Conversion Optimization)
description:
1st Optimal is a performance-health clinic dedicated to optimizing the health, energy, and longevity of high-achieving adults. We specialize in hormone health, weight loss, gut health, nutrition, and wellness solutions. We are looking for a Shopify Specialist to improve the design, SEO, content, and
 marketing of our online store, 
, and drive customer engagement through educational resources.



Job Description:



We are seeking a creative Shopify Specialist to join our team, focusing on enhancing the design, content, SEO, and
 marketing of our online store. This role is pivotal in ensuring a seamless, visually engaging experience while creating educational content that aligns with our wellness brand. You’ll help increase traffic, drive conversions, and deliver a user-centered shopping experience that fosters customer loyalty.



Key Responsibilities:



- Website Design: Lead the design and layout updates for the Shopify store, ensuring it’s visually appealing, easy to navigate, and optimized for a great user experience.

- Content Creation: Develop educational blog posts, articles, and other content that resonates with our audience, providing valuable wellness insights that drive traffic and engage customers.

- SEO Strategy: Optimize product pages, blog articles, and other on-site content to improve organic search rankings and attract relevant traffic.

-
 Marketing: Create, design, and manage
 campaigns that promote products, new content, and educational resources to our customer base. Optimize
 templates for both design and conversion.

- User Experience: Ensure that the store provides a seamless shopping experience from landing page to checkout, enhancing engagement and reducing friction.

- Collaboration: Work closely with marketing and product teams to ensure all digital content aligns with 1st Optimal’s branding, goals, and customer needs.



Required Qualifications:

- Proven experience working with Shopify, focusing on design and content (2+ years preferred).

- Strong design skills with the ability to create and implement a visually engaging, user-friendly online experience.

- Solid understanding of SEO best practices, including keyword optimization and content strategies.

- Experience creating compelling, informative content tailored to the wellness or health sector.

- Expertise in
 marketing platforms (e.g., Klaviyo, Mailchimp), with a focus on building high-conversion
 campaigns.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to execute design improvements based on user feedback.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to work cross-functionally with marketing and product teams.



Preferred Qualifications:



- Familiarity with Shopify Plus or other advanced Shopify tools.

- Previous experience in content marketing in the wellness, health, or lifestyle space.

- Ability to run A/B tests on website design and
 campaigns to improve results.

- Basic knowledge of Google Analytics to monitor website performance and make data-driven decisions.



What We Offer:



- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Flexible working hours and remote work.

- The opportunity to make a real impact on a company that helps people live healthier lives.

- Collaborative, growth-focused environment with room for creative input and innovation.



How to Apply:



Please send your resume, portfolio, or examples of past work, and a brief explanation of why you’d be a great fit for 1st Optimal.

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Voice)
description:
Role Overview:

We are hiring a skilled Credit Repair Specialist to handle client onboarding, dispute processing, appointment setting, and ongoing account management. This role requires strong attention to detail, solid knowledge of credit repair laws and procedures, and consistent communication with clients. The position involves regular inbound and outbound phone calls, including consultation booking and follow-ups.



Core Responsibilities



Credit Repair & Account Management

• Support clients throughout the credit repair process by providing clear guidance and updates

• Complete client onboarding, including account setup, process explanation, and document verification

• Analyze credit reports to identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items

• Create, submit, and track dispute letters

• Manage dispute timelines and follow-ups

• Review bureau and creditor responses for accuracy and compliance

• Track client progress and dispute outcomes



Appointment Setting & Lead Management

• Contact new and existing leads via inbound and outbound calls, SMS, and follow-ups

• Qualify prospects and schedule credit repair consultations

• Confirm appointments and send reminders to reduce no-shows

• Re-engage cold or inactive leads to generate booked consultations

• Coordinate with sales/consultation team to ensure smooth handoff of booked appointments

• Track appointment metrics, attendance rates, and follow-up performance



Administrative & CRM

• Maintain complete and accurate records in CRM systems (Go High Level & CRC)

• Communicate with clients to request and confirm required documentation

• Assist with administrative and customer support tasks as needed



Required Qualifications



• 1–2 years of hands-on experience in credit repair

• Proven appointment setting experience within the credit repair industry (required)

• Strong understanding of credit reporting and dispute procedures

• Knowledge of credit laws and compliance (FCRA, FDCPA)

• Confident and professional phone and written communication skills

• Ability to manage multiple client accounts independently

• CRM experience (Go High Level preferred)

• Detail-oriented, dependable, and self-managed



Application Instructions:



To be considered, please submit:

• Your CV/Resume link

• A 1-minute video introduction

• Your family birth order (Eldest, Middle, or Youngest)

 Subject Format: Credit Repair Specialist – [Your Name]_[Birth Order]

?? Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.??

-Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar CRM/automation tools

-Hands-on experience with PAID ADS

-Experience with lead generation, webinar funnels, or appointment-setting systems

-Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach or cold campaigns

-Data-driven and comfortable tracking KPIs



Key Experience:

-Proven experience editing short-form content for TikTok and Instagram

-Strong understanding of TikTok/IG algorithms, SEO captions, and posting strategy

-Experience with faceless or AI-avatar content (or openness to learning)

-Familiarity with affiliate marketing funnels and CTA-driven content

-Bonus experience using tools like Linktree, 
, or ManyChat

title: Digital Ads Specialist (Search & LSA Expert)
description:
The Mission

At Integrity Home Exteriors, our mission is to build trust through education, integrity, and service excellence. We are the "Home Exterior Expert" for Toledo and Farmington Hills, and we need an Elite Google Ads Specialist to ensure that when a homeowner searches for a "reputable roofing contractor," they find us first.



The Role

We aren't looking for a generalist. We need a specialist who lives in the Google Ads dashboard. You will be responsible for managing a high-intent budget focused on Roofing, Windows, and Gutters.



Your "Elite" Responsibilities:

Precision Bidding: Manage and scale Search campaigns with a heavy focus on "Roofing Contractor" and "Roofing Companies" keywords.

LSA Management: Oversee our Google Local Services Ads (GLSA) to maintain our 5-star reputation and "Gold Standard" presence.

Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): Work with our SEO Manager to ensure landing pages are "Informing" and "Guiding" homeowners toward a quote.

Negative Keyword Mastery: Perform daily audits to prune junk traffic and protect the budget.

Meta Support: Maintain our "Social Proof" via Meta ads, ensuring brand consistency and retargeting homeowners who have visited our site.

Data Integrity: Ensure Hubspot and Google Tag Manager are communicating perfectly so we can track every "Win."



What We’re Looking For

The Search Expert: You understand that in roofing, 2:00 AM searches are often "emergency leaks" and 2:00 PM searches are "researchers." You know how to bid accordingly.

Integrity-Driven: You treat our ad spend like it’s your own money.

Detailed Execution: You don't just "set and forget." You are methodical, testing headlines and descriptions constantly.

Values Fit: You resonate with our Christian values of honesty, excellence, and serving others.

Requirements

Proven track record in Google Search Ads (Local Service Area Business experience is a huge plus).

Expertise in Google Tag Manager and Hubspot tracking.

High-level English (both written and verbal) for weekly syncs.

Ability to work US EST hours to respond to market shifts in real-time.



Required Application Questions

1. The Negative Keyword Test: We are looking for "Elite" roofing leads ($15k - $50k projects). List 5 specific negative keywords you would add to a campaign to ensure we aren't wasting money on unqualified leads.

2. The Data Stack: On a scale of 1–10, how comfortable are you with Google Tag Manager and HubSpot? Briefly describe one time you used GTM to solve a conversion tracking issue.

3. The LSA Strategy: If our Google Local Services Ads (LSA) are "maxed out" for the week, what is the first thing you look at in the dashboard to maintain our lead flow?

4. The "Integrity" Video: Please provide a link to a 60-second Loom video. Tell us:

a) Why do you prefer working for a family-oriented, faith-based company?

b) What is one Google Ads "win" you are most proud of?

5. The Schedule: Confirm you are 100% available to work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Eastern Time. (Yes/No)

title: Marketing Executive
description:
We are one of the UK’s leading investment education companies, helping everyday people take control of their finances through practical, real world investing education.



Our mission is simple. We make investing clear, accessible, and actionable. Through expert led training, live events, digital content, and a highly engaged community, we empower our members to build long term wealth with confidence, without the jargon or overwhelm that often comes with investing.



Behind the scenes, our marketing team plays a vital role in delivering this mission. We ensure our message is clear, consistent, and impactful across every channel. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Marketing Executive who can help keep the marketing department organised, aligned, and running smoothly day to day.



What would I be doing?



Working for Investment Mastery, you will play a central role in supporting and coordinating the marketing department.



As our Marketing Executive, you will act as the organisational backbone of the team. You will help turn strategy into action by coordinating people, projects, and priorities across the department. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, ownership, and being at the centre of how a team operates.



You will work closely with the Marketing Manager and the wider marketing team, supporting campaign delivery, managing organic activity, and ensuring tasks are clearly assigned, tracked, and completed. Alongside this, you will develop your own investing knowledge through our internal training programmes, giving you the opportunity to grow professionally while building your own path toward financial independence.



What would my day to day look like?



In short, you will help keep the marketing department running smoothly, efficiently, and on track. More specifically, you will:



• Work under the leadership of a supportive Marketing Manager who values collaboration, clarity, and team development

• Attend marketing meetings, take clear and structured notes, and document decisions and action points

• Delegate, assign, and track tasks across the marketing team, following up to ensure deadlines are met

• Act as a key point of coordination between different marketing functions such as content, paid, organic, and CRM

• Manage the day to day operations of the marketing department and help keep projects organised and on schedule

• Oversee and support the organic marketing side of the business, ensuring consistency across channels

• Maintain marketing plans, calendars, and internal documentation so the team stays aligned

• Support campaign execution by coordinating assets, timelines, and approvals

• Identify inefficiencies or bottlenecks and suggest improvements to processes and workflows

• Ensure messaging and branding remain consistent across all marketing activity

• Support the wider marketing team with ad hoc tasks that help initiatives run smoothly



The Ideal Candidate



• Highly organised and proactive, with a natural ability to keep people and projects on track

• Comfortable working in a fast paced environment and managing multiple priorities

• Confident coordinating teams, assigning tasks, and following up clearly and professionally

• Strong attention to detail and able to capture and communicate clear actions fro
etings

• Enjoys managing the day to day running of a department rather than focusing on one narrow specialism

• Has a solid understanding of organic marketing and content led growth

• Communicates clearly and calmly with a range of stakeholders

• Interested in marketing systems, structure, and continuous improvement

• Curious about investing and personal finance, although prior knowledge is not essential

title: Content Marketing Executive
description:
We are one of the UK’s leading investment education companies, helping everyday people take control of their finances through practical, real world investing education.



Our mission is simple. We make investing clear, accessible, and actionable. Through expert led training, live events, digital content, and a highly engaged community, we empower our members to build long term wealth with confidence, without the jargon or overwhelm that often comes with investing.



Behind the scenes, our marketing team plays a vital role in delivering this mission. We ensure our message is clear, consistent, and impactful across every channel. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Marketing Executive who will take ownership of our social media presence while also supporting the operational and administrative needs of the wider marketing department.



What would I be doing?



Working for Investment Mastery, you will play a central role in both managing our social media strategy and supporting the day to day organisation of the marketing department.



This is not just a coordination role. You will act as our Social Media Manager, owning the strategy, planning, creation, distribution, and performance of content across all social platforms. You will be responsible for generating content ideas, collaborating with the creative team to bring them to life, distributing the content effectively, and reporting on performance against clearly defined KPIs.



Alongside this, you will also provide marketing administrative support, ensuring the department runs efficiently and remains organised, aligned, and on track.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both creative ownership and structured execution — someone who can think strategically about content while also ensuring the department operates smoothly behind the scenes.



You will work closely with the Marketing Manager, creative team, and wider marketing department, while also developing your own investing knowledge through our internal training programmes.



What would my day to day look like?



In short, you will manage and grow our social media presence while supporting the operational effectiveness of the marketing department.



More specifically, you will:



Social Media Ownership & Strategy



• Take full ownership of our social media channels, including
, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, and future platforms as we expand

• Develop and lead the social media content strategy aligned with company objectives

• Generate content ideas designed to educate, engage, and convert our audience

• Plan content calendars and ensure consistent posting across all platforms

• Work closely with the creative team to brief, build, refine, and optimise content

• Provide feedback on creative assets to ensure messaging, brand consistency, and performance optimisation

• Distribute content effectively across platforms, tailoring format and messaging to each channel

• Monitor performance and report on key metrics and KPIs (engagement, growth, leads, conversions, etc.)

• Analyse data and continuously refine strategy based on insights

• Be accountable for the growth, engagement, and performance of all social channels



You will have clear KPIs and measurable targets for social media performance and will be expected to take ownership of achieving them.



Marketing Coordination & Admin Support



• Attend marketing meetings, take structured notes, and document decisions and action points

• Help assign and track tasks across the marketing team to ensure deadlines are met

• Maintain marketing plans, calendars, and internal documentation

• Support campaign coordination by managing timelines, assets, and approvals

• Act as a key point of organisation between content, paid, CRM, and creative functions

• Identify inefficiencies or bottlenecks and suggest process improvements

• Ensure messaging and branding remain consistent across all activity

• Carry out marketing administrative tasks to ensure the department has the operational support it needs

• Support ad hoc initiatives that help the team execute effectively



You will be both the organisational backbone of the department and the driving force behind our social media presence.



The Ideal Candidate



• Highly organised and proactive, with a natural ability to take ownership

• Confident managing and growing multiple social media platforms

• Experienced in developing content ideas and turning strategy into execution

• Comfortable working with creative teams and providing clear briefs and feedback

• Data driven, with experience reporting on KPIs and improving performance

• Strong understanding of organic marketing and content led growth

• Comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast paced environment

• Clear and confident communicator with strong attention to detail

• Enjoys both creative thinking and operational structure

• Curious about investing and personal finance (prior knowledge is helpful but not essential)



Application Task:



Film a short video introducing yourself and sharing why you believe you’d be a great fit for this role. This will help us get a sense of your communication style, clarity, and how you present ideas. It doesn’t need to be overly polished, we’re more interested in how you naturally communicate than in perfect production. If you have any questions while preparing it, feel free to reach out.

Experience supporting US-based teams

title: Experienced Project Manager (Amazon FBA | Remote | Full-Time)
description:
Join a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Brand Based in Singapore



Dear Applicants,



We are a fast-growing e-commerce company based in Singapore, expanding our presence on Amazon FBA. We’re looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Project Manager to support and grow our Amazon operations together with us. You’ll play a key role in keeping things running smoothly behind the scenes.



This is a hands-on role with a clear structure and HIGH expectations. We’re looking for EXPERIENCED candidates only—someone familiar with the Amazon backend who knows how to get things done without constant supervision.



What You'll Be Doing

- managing a team of 6

- Assist with shipping plans and coordinate with suppliers, freight forwarders, and inspection agents

- Support and review product listings, ensuring keywords, images, and backend details are optimized

-Manage and track inventory, monitor campaign results, and update spreadsheets and dashboards

- Coordinate tasks with our design, listing, and operations teams

- Participate in internal training sessions, including AI workflow videos

- Handle writing product listings, inventory planning, and data tracking

- Contribute to operational improvements and project planning

- confirm product details, know product size tiers.



Tools You’ll Use

Amazon Seller Central

Helium 10

Zoom



Requirements

- 5 years of relevant project/team management experience, ideally in Amazon FBA

- STRONG attention to detail and ability to communicate those details with teams and stakeholders

- Able to work independently and adapt quickly to changing priorities

- Excellent problem-solving and coordination skills

- Strong analytical, strategic, and communication skills

Working Hours

Monday to Friday, 12 PM – 10 PM (SGT) (with 1 hour break)

44 hours per week | Remote work



To Apply, Please Include the Following:
