Applications without reference links or relevant experience will not be entertained

If you are new or require training on the above tasks, please do not apply.



Looking forward to building something great together.

title: Financial Manager
description:
Financial Manager

Vantage Group

Remote / Hybrid | Full-Time

Commercial Structuring, Pricing Strategy, Contract Architecture, Margin Control



About Vantage Group

Vantage Group is a facilities management execution platform built to bring structure, accountability, and operational control to interior and exterior services across complex property portfolios.

We work with owners, operators, and private real estate groups who are tired of:

Managing fragmented vendor networks

Chasing missed services and incomplete work

Lacking visibility and documentation

Escalating issues without enforcement authority

Overloading internal teams with coordination chaos

Vantage is not a property management company.

We are the operating and accountability infrastructure between ownership and execution.

We are building this company deliberately — with systems, economic discipline, and long-term enterprise value in mind.



The Opportunity

We are seeking a Financial Manager to own the economic architecture and structural integrity of every deal entering the company.

- This is not a junior estimating role.

- This is not a bid compilation position.

- This is not a sales support function.

This role is responsible for protecting margin, structuring contracts correctly, defining SLAs, and ensuring that every portfolio we onboard is operationally executable and economically sound.

In a young, lean, high-growth platform, this position is foundational.



Role Mission

The Financial Manager exists to ensure that:

- Every proposal is structurally clear

- Every contract reflects enforceable standards

- Every deal meets margin guardrails

- Every SLA is measurable and enforceable

- No bad revenue enters the company

- You are the economic filter and structural architect of Vantage Group.



Core Responsibilities

1. Proposal Development & Commercial Structuring

Translate client scope into structured service architecture

Build detailed proposals for:

Recurring contracted services

Emergency services

Capital projects

Ensure clarity between scope, SLA expectations, and vendor execution

Standardize proposal templates and continuously improve them

Maintain version control and document integrity



2. Pricing Strategy & Margin Protection

Apply margin framework (target 70–80% gross margin)

Validate that retainers cover baseline delivery costs

Analyze vendor pricing and normalize for comparison

Reject underpriced or structurally weak deals

Conduct sensitivity analysis on larger portfolios

Escalate misaligned deals to COO when required

You will have authority to stop deals that violate guardrails.



3. Contract Architecture

Draft and structure client agreements

Define:

Retainer structure

Margin participation terms

Emergency pricing framework

SLA enforcement language

Escalation authority

Ensure contracts align with operational reality

Maintain contract templates and structure documentation



4. SLA Design & Enforcement Framework

Define measurable SLAs for:

Response times

Completion times

Quality standards

Documentation requirements

Customize SLA structures by service category

Align SLAs with vendor capability and enforcement posture

Ensure SLA standards are installed before onboarding



5. Vendor Pricing & Commercial Review

Review vendor quotes for scope alignment

Identify pricing inconsistencies

Normalize pricing across markets

Apply margin before client presentation

Maintain vendor pricing database



6. Deal Handoff & Operational Alignment

Create structured deal summary package for Account Operations

Ensure AOM receives:

Final scope

SLA structure

Vendor coverage

Risk flags

Margin summary

Prevent incomplete handoffs

Participate in onboarding discussions when required



7. Emergency Pricing & Rapid Response Structuring

Apply margin to emergency quotes quickly

Validate scope and cost alignment

Build rapid-turn pricing templates

Protect margin under speed conditions



8. Continuous Commercial Optimization

Analyze pricing objections

Refine retainer models

Improve SLA structures

Provide feedback to leadership

Identify automation opportunities in pricing workflows



What Success Looks Like

You will know you are succeeding when:

- Deals move from proposal to execution with minimal confusion

- Margin guardrails are consistently met

- Few pricing exceptions are requested

- Scope disputes decrease

- Founders are no longer reviewing individual deal economics

- Operational friction decreases post-sale



What This Role Is Not

- Not a task processor

- Not a passive estimator

- Not a junior contract administrator

- Not a quote compiler

- Not a sales assistant

- This role requires judgment, economic awareness, and structural thinking.



Required Experience

We are looking for candidates with experience such as:

- Commercial estimating in facilities, construction, or multi-trade environments

- Contract management in property or service industries

- Pricing strategy for multi-site service organizations

- Facilities operations finance

- Commercial project management with economic oversight



You should have:

- 5+ years of experience in commercial estimating or contract structuring

- Experience pricing multi-location service portfolios

- Strong understanding of margin modeling

- Experience working with SLAs

- High attention to detail

- Strong written communication skills

- Comfort working in structured systems

- Experience in facilities management, construction, multi-trade services, or property operations is strongly preferred.

- Characteristics We Value

- Economically disciplined

- Process-driven

- Structured thinker

- Calm under pressure

- Clear communicator

- Comfortable challenging weak scope

- High personal accountability

- Not emotionally attached to “closing deals”



Reporting Structure

- Reports to: Office Manager

Works closely with:

- COO (economic oversight)

- Strategic Development Lead

- Vendor Network Development Manager

- Account Operations Manager



Growth Path

As Vantage scales, this role can evolve into:

- Director of Commercial Operations

- VP of Commercial Strategy

- Chief Commercial Officer

- We are building for scale. Strong operators grow with us.



Compensation

- Competitive salary based on experience ($850 - $1,100 per month)

- Performance alignment incentives

- Opportunity to grow with a high-upside platform

- Details will be discussed with qualified candidates.



Why Join Vantage

- You will help architect a platform from the ground up

- You will work within a disciplined, systems-first structure

- You will not operate in chaos

- You will not be micromanaged

- You will be evaluated objectively

- You will build something that scales

-This is not a corporate bureaucracy.

-This is a serious operating team building an institutional-quality platform.



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume

- A brief (3–5 minute) Loom video explaining:

- Your relevant work experience

- why do you think you would be a good fit for the position?

- What do you like to do outside of work?



Candidates who demonstrate clarity, structure, and economic awareness will be prioritized.

title: ? Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Sales & Admin) – Long-Term Opportunity
description:
Bright Delight Housekeeping is a fast-growing, women-owned cleaning company serving Omaha and surrounding areas. We specialize in professional residential and commercial cleaning with over 150 five-star reviews.



We are looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and sales-driven Virtual Assistant to support daily operations and help us convert more leads into booked clients.



Position Overview



This role combines sales, customer service, and administrative support.



You will be responsible for:



-Responding to inbound leads 
, Instagram, website,
)

-Following up with warm leads to convert them into bookings

-Handling client inquiries and sending quotes

-Managing CRM and scheduling software

-Sending invoices and tracking payments

-Updating spreadsheets and reports

-Assisting with
 marketing and client follow-ups

-Supporting daily admin tasks

-You must be confident in communication and comfortable handling sales conversations.

title: Bookkeeper & Operations Support
description:
STRbkeep is a bookkeeping practice built specifically for short-term rental (STR) property owners and small hospitality businesses. We currently manage the books for 45+ clients, from individual property owners to multi-property LLCs, and we're growing.



We're not just maintaining books. We're actively building the systems, workflows, and standards that will define how this practice operates as it scales. That means our processes are evolving, we're testing new technology, and we're looking for someone who's excited by that, not intimidated by it.



This is not a heads-down, task-list-only position. Yes, there is real bookkeeping to do: reconciliations, categorizing transactions, recording platform fees. But the day-to-day bookkeeping here is straightforward. What matters more is how you think, how you communicate, and how you approach your work.



Here's what that looks like in practice: You open a client's QBO file for the first time. You look through the chart of accounts, the bank connections, how transactions have been categorized. You form an understanding of how things are set up, and then you come to me with questions. Not just "What do I do?" but "I see it's set up this way. Is that intentional? Here's what I'd suggest."



If you notice three clients have slightly different names for the same account, or that a bank rule could save 20 minutes a month, or that our work-tracking template is missing a column, we want to hear it. You'll have a direct line to the owner, and your input will shape how we build this practice.



I'll be honest: I value curiosity, coachability, and clear communication over years of bookkeeping experience. I can teach someone the technical side of this work. I can't teach someone to care, to think critically, or to speak up when something doesn't look right.



What You'll Do:

Bookkeeping

- Record bank and credit card activity in QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards on a monthly basis

- Categorize and reclassify transactions; review P&L reports for misclassified expenses

- Split mortgage payments, Stripe payouts, and platform fees across appropriate accounts

- Record STR platform fees (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.) in QBO

- Assist with catch-up bookkeeping for clients who are behind

- Support year-end work including 1099 review and preparation



Administrative & Operations Support

- Follow up with clients to collect statements, documents, and access credentials

- Help onboard new clients: QBO setup, connecting bank feeds, initial data entry

- Track task completion and flag items that need the owner's review

- Help maintain and update standardized systems across 45+ client accounts (bank rules, chart of accounts naming, client reference data)

- Assist with documenting processes so the practice can scale beyond one person's memory



Systems & Process Improvement

- Review how each client's QBO file is set up and ask questions to understand the reasoning

- Identify inconsistencies across client files and suggest standardization

- Be open to testing new tools and technology as we evaluate what works best

- Help build out workflows in tools like Airtable, Content Snare, and others as we grow





Position Details

- Type: Independent contractor, remote

- Hours: Full-time, 40 hours per week

- Pay: $7–$9/hr USD, based on experience and scope of work

- Schedule: Flexible — you set your own hours and deliver by agreed deadlines

- Overlap: During onboarding, we'll need 2–3 hours of overlap during US Central Time business hours for walkthroughs and Q&A. Once you're comfortable, the schedule becomes more flexible.



This is our first hire. You won't be joining a team — you'll be helping build one. That means your input matters from day one, and the role will grow as the practice grows.



Who You Are

Curious and observant. You don't just do what's in front of you — you notice patterns, ask why things are the way they are, and think about how they could be better. When you open a client's file, you're reading the setup, not just the task list.



Self-motivated. You can take a general direction and run with it. You don't need to be checked on constantly, and you're comfortable figuring things out before asking for help — but you also know when to ask.



A clear communicator. You can articulate what you're seeing in a client's books, explain your reasoning, and frame suggestions in a way that's easy to act on. You're not afraid to say "This doesn't make sense to me" or "Here's what I'd change."



Comfortable with "in progress." Our systems are being built right now. If you need a perfectly documented SOP before you can start, this isn't the right fit. If you're energized by helping create those SOPs, it is.



A team player. As we grow, you'll be working alongside other tea
mbers. We're looking for people who collaborate well, share what they learn, and genuinely want to help build something together.



Requirements

- QuickBooks Online familiarity — you should understand the basics of how QBO works (bank feeds, categorization, reconciliations). If you're still building your QBO skills but you're a fast learner, that's okay too — we'll invest in your training.

- Basic to intermediate Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Fluent written and spoken English

- Reliable computer and stable internet connection

- Dependable — meets deadlines and communicates proactively





Nice to Have

- Experience with bank reconciliations across multiple accounts

- Familiarity with Airbnb, VRBO, or other short-term rental platforms

- Experience working with US-based clients or a US-based bookkeeping/accounting firm

- QuickBooks Online certification

- Experience with workflow tools, automation, or process documentation (Airtable, Trello, Slack, etc.)

- Prior experience in a small or growing practice where you wore multiple hats





Training Provided

You don't need to know the short-term rental industry to apply. We'll walk you through our client workflows, STR-specific categorization rules, and how we approach the work. If you're comfortable with technology and can follow a process while thinking critically about what you're doing, we'll teach you the rest.



What to Expect

You'll work directly with the owner, Cheyenne. Early on, expect a collaborative onboarding period where you'll walk through client files together, discuss how things are set up and why, and establish shared expectations. Over time, the goal is for you to work more independently while continuing to surface questions and ideas.

We're also actively evaluating new tools and technology. If you're someone who likes trying new things and has opinions about what works, you'll have a voice in those decisions.



IMPORTANT — To Apply

Submit an application with your resume and a short video (2–3 minutes). Everything below must be spoken in your video — written responses will not substitute.



In your video, please:

1. Address Cheyenne by name.

2. Tell me briefly about your experience — it doesn't have to be bookkeeping. I want to hear what you've done and how you talk about your work.

3. Answer this question on camera: "Describe a time you were working through a task and realized the instructions you had were not enough to move forward correctly. What did you do?"



Applications without a video, or with a pre-recorded generic video, will not be considered.

title: Shopify Product Lister
description:
About Us:



SkyLeap Digital, LLC is an established e-commerce company focused on fashion products, dedicated to bringing the latest and most desirable trends to the market. Our mission is to scour the globe for cutting-edge trends and insights, introducing them into new markets with an innovative approach.



##Job Description:



We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly accurate Product Lister to join our team. This role involves importing and adapting product details from competitor stores, ensuring our listings are unique, competitive, and error-free. The ideal candidate must have a sharp eye for detail and be capable of maintaining the highest level of accuracy in their work. This is a vital position for maintaining the quality and appeal of our store's offerings.

- Import product details from competitor stores and adapt them for our store while maintaining brand consistency.

- Translate and localize product descriptions to effectively connect with our target audience.

- Ensure product details are free from errors, with a focus on precision and consistency.

- Collaborate with the marketing and design teams to optimize product presentation.

- Monitor and analyze product performance, suggesting improvements to increase visibility and sales.



##Skills Test (Required for Application):



To evaluate your attention to detail and ability to follow instructions, you will be required to complete the following skills test as part of the application. Note: Failure to follow the test instructions accurately will result in disqualification from consideration.



##Task:



- Go to this competitor’s listing: 
/products/kanna-sac-en-bandouliere.

- Translate (to English) and rewrite (make it better and avoid plagiarism) its title, description, size chart, URL (translate), and price (to GBP) into a provided new Google Doc.



##Final Adjustments & Checklist:



- Modify the product title to be shorter, attention-grabbing, and aligned with our branding standards.

- Make a checklist to ensure all crucial product details (size chart, materials, features, etc.) are included.

- Your submission must include a final checklist to confirm no key details were missed.

- Submit the Completed Test:

- Once done,
 the imported product details, your adapted version, and the completed checklist to 
 with the subject line: "SkyLeap Product Lister Application - I Read the Instructions."



This test will help us evaluate your ability to manage product listings with accuracy and creativity. Only candidates who complete the test without errors or omissions will be considered.



##Requirements:



- Proven experience as a Product Lister or in a similar role within an e-commerce environment.

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy, with the ability to spot and correct errors.

- Good communication skills.



##Preferred Qualifications:



- Experience working in Shopify.

- Knowledge of SEO and online marketing strategies.

- Experience with graphic design or photo editing software to enhance visual appeal.



##What We Offer:



- Competitive pay of $1/product and you will upload 3-6 products daily.

- Flexible work hours: Max 3 hours per day, every day.

- Opportunities for career advancement in a growing environment.

- Engagement with the latest in e-commerce technology and digital marketing strategies.



If you’re detail-oriented and passionate about accuracy, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now to join the SkyLeap Digital, LLC team!

• Review and resolve Practice Management System discrepancy reports

• Process denials within required timeframes using assigned reports



Qualifications:

• Monitor and follow up on outstanding claims over 21 days from date of service

• Coordinate with insurance provider representatives regarding claim issues

• Respond to patient and insurance billing inquiries by phone

• Generate insurance and billing reports as assigned

• Experience with any Physical therapy EMR systems (Requirement)

• Respond to emails in a timely manner

• Provide regular updates to the Patient Accounts Manager

• Available to work full-time (40 hours/week) during US Pacific business hours

title: Senior SEO Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced and strategic Senior SEO Specialist to lead and scale our organic growth initiatives. This role is ideal for someone who not only understands SEO at a deep technical level but can also translate strategy into measurable business results.

Perform in-depth technical SEO audits and oversee implementation (site architecture, crawl optimization, indexing, Core Web Vitals, structured data)

Drive on-page optimization strategies across content, metadata, internal linking, and content clusters

Identify content gaps and build scalable content roadmaps

Monitor algorithm updates and proactively adapt strategies to maintain performance

Partner with content, design, development, and marketing teams to integrate SEO into all digital initiatives

mbers (if applicable) and establish best practices

3-5+ years of proven SEO experience with measurable growth results

Deep understanding of search intent, SERP features, and evolving Google algorithms

Advanced experience with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics (GA4), SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, or similar platforms

Experience optimizing Core Web Vitals and page performance

Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into strategic decisions

You have an advantage if you have some case studies to show off



What We Offer

title: Financial Analyst
description:
We’re looking for a highly analytical, systems-minded strategic **Financial Analyst** to serve as the financial architect of a growing private club organization.



This is not a transactional accounting role. You will operate as a high-level individual contributor responsible for building financial clarity, modernizing reporting systems, and partnering with operational leaders to drive disciplined, data-driven decisions.



You will report directly to executive leadership and provide structured financial insights that support long-term sustainability, capital planning, and operational performance. The goal is to transition from reactive reporting to a structured, systems-first operating model.



If you enjoy building financial infrastructure from the ground up and turning messy operational data into board-ready clarity, this role is a strong fit.



---



## Why You’ll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days of Paid Time Off** annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you feel productive

- High-visibility role with direct executive and board interaction

- Opportunity to modernize financial systems inside an established organization

- Ownership over reporting, modeling, and capital planning



---



## What You’ll Work On



### Strategic FP&A and Business Partnering



- Build and formalize a structured monthly reporting package including full financial statements and department-level Budget versus Actual reports

- Partner with department leaders to extract operational data and standardize reporting workflows

- Develop scenario models to guide pricing, membership, and program decisions

- Provide board-ready financial presentations and insights



### Capital Planning and Project Oversight



- Manage multi-year capital expenditure budgets

- Oversee project-level cash flow tracking and variance analysis

- Review vendor contracts and monitor milestone-based spending

- Maintain a rolling 13-week cash flow forecast to ensure liquidity planning



### Financial Integrity and Systems Leadership



- Maintain audit-ready financial records and oversee tax compliance coordination

- Monitor loan covenant compliance and lender reporting requirements

- Serve as internal systems lead for club management and accounting software

- Improve data integrity across POS and accounting systems

- Identify and automate manual reconciliation processes



### Risk and Insurance Oversight



- Lead annual insurance renewal processes

- Partner with brokers to evaluate coverage and cost impact

- Analyze premium shifts and their effect on the operating budget



---



## What You Bring



- **5+ years** of experience in strategic finance or FP&A

- Experience in recurring revenue environments such as membership models, subscriptions, SaaS, or similar

- Advanced Excel and financial modeling expertise

- Strong understanding of three-statement financial reporting

- Experience building financial systems or reporting infrastructure from scratch

- Ability to translate operational data into executive-level insights

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Comfort presenting to senior leadership or board-level stakeholders



---



## Nice to Have



- Experience in private clubs, hospitality, or service-based organizations

- Familiarity with club management or POS accounting systems

- Experience managing capital projects or multi-year budgets

- Background improving financial workflows through automation



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short 1 to 2 minute Loom video** explaining a financial reporting system or modeling framework you built and how it improved decision-making



**Only complete applications with a Loom video will be considered.**



---



If you are structured, detail-oriented, and capable of building financial clarity inside an operationally complex environment, this role offers executive visibility and the opportunity to architect long-term financial

title: Senior NetSuite Accountant (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-growing US-based eCommerce and distribution company seeking an experienced NetSuite Accountant to take ownership of our day-to-day accounting operations.



Our finance function is currently behind on month-end close, reconciliations, and bookkeeping. We are looking for a highly capable accounting professional who can step in, organize the financial operations, and help bring the books up to date.



This role will work closely with leadership and our local bookkeeper (who handles payments and bank access). You will be responsible for managing the accounting system, financial records, and reporting inside NetSuite.



This position may evolve into a lead accounting role managing additional accounting staff as the company grows.



Responsibilities

Core Accounting



• Manage daily accounting operations in NetSuite

• Maintain accurate general ledger records

• Perform monthly and quarterly close processes

• Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and payment processors

• Manage accounts payable and receivable workflows

• Review and correct historical accounting issues



eCommerce Accounting



• Reconcile Amazon, Shopify, and other marketplace transactions

• Track COGS, inventory, and margin accuracy

• Review marketplace settlement reports and reconcile them to NetSuite

• Identify discrepancies in inventory and financial reporting



Financial Operations



• Ensure accounting records remain organized and accurate

• Maintain supporting documentation and audit trails

• Prepare financial reports for management review

• Help improve accounting processes and controls



Process Improvement



• Identify gaps in current workflows

• Help design better processes inside NetSuite

• Document accounting procedures



Required Experience



Candidates must have real experience working in NetSuite.



Minimum qualifications:



• 5+ years accounting experience

• Direct NetSuite experience (required)

• Strong understanding of GAAP accounting principles

• Experience with month-end close

• Experience with bank and payment reconciliations

• Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

• Strong attention to detail and organization



Highly Preferred



• eCommerce accounting experience

• Amazon marketplace accounting experience

• Inventory and COGS accounting

• Experience with multi-channel sales businesses

• Experience cleaning up messy accounting systems

• Experience working with US companies



What We're Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized

• Comfortable taking ownership of financial processes

• Detail-oriented and analytical

• Proactive in identifying issues

• Able to communicate clearly with US management



This is not an entry-level bookkeeping role. We need someone who can take control of the accounting system and bring the books back into order.



Compensation



Competitive salary based on experience.



Application Instructions



To apply, please include:



A summary of your NetSuite experience



A description of the most complex accounting role you've handled



Confirmation that you have experience performing month-end close in NetSuite



Screening Question (Important)



Please answer this in your application:



What NetSuite tasks have you personally performed?



Examples may include:



• Month-end close

• GL reconciliation

• Journal entries

• Inventory accounting

• Bank reconciliations

• Financial reporting



Important



Applications without NetSuite experience will not be considered.

We are looking for a creative, dependable Social Media Manager who wants steady work and long-term growth opportunity.

WORK SCHEDULE

RESPONSIBILITIES

HOW TO APPLY (Please Follow All Instructions)

Hashtags

title: Reels/TikTok/YouTube Shorts Editor
description:
Video Editor — UGC & Social Content (Remote, Philippines-Based)

We're a Female Condom company looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines to join our team on a freelance basis. If you have a great creative eye, love social media content, and know how to make videos feel alive — keep reading.



What you'll be doing

You'll be taking raw UGC footage and transforming it into scroll-stopping social content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This means adding motion graphics, fun animations, captions, and sound design that elevate the video without losing that authentic, real-person feel. You'll work primarily on short-form content (Reels, TikToks) and will play a big role in shaping how our brand shows up visually on social.



What we're looking for

You have a genuine feel for what makes content perform on social — you watch Reels and TikToks and instinctively know why something works. You can take a raw, unpolished clip and make it gripping without making it feel produced or salesy (think about the videos that content creators in New York City are making). You understand the difference between content that feels like an ad and content that actually stops people from scrolling — and you always aim for the latter. You're comfortable with motion graphics and animation and know how to use them to add energy and personality rather than noise. You're proactive, communicative, and take creative ownership of your work.



Must-haves

You're proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut (or a combination). You have experience editing short-form social content specifically — a portfolio that shows this is essential. You have a strong sense of pacing, music, and sound design. You're reliable, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly in English. Experience with After Effects or motion graphics tools.



Nice to haves

A background in or passion for health, wellness, or lifestyle content. Experience working with UGC creators or social-first brands.



How to apply

Please send your portfolio or reel, a brief note about your editing style and experience. Please also include three examples of videos you think might fit the concept that we're looking for. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

description:

- A brief example of an Amplitude project you’ve worked on

..

 Subject Line: AISpecialist123

..



Why This Role

title: AI Automation Specialist (n8n, LLMs, Shopify) - E-commerce Operations
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for a highly skilled AI Automation Specialist to spearhead automation across our entire business.



While your first major focus will be fully streamlining our customer service department by building intelligent
 response systems, this role expands far beyond that. You will be responsible for analyzing, architecting, and automating other critical backend systems across the company.



--



Key Responsibilities:



Design, build, and deploy AI-driven automated response systems for our customer service team.

Audit other internal company systems and build automation logic to improve operational efficiency across various departments.

Integrate LLMs (like Claude) with our existing tech stack and e-commerce platforms.

Create robust, scalable automation workflows using tools like n8n, Make, and Zapier.

Connect and automate processes utilizing the Shopify API.



--



Required Skills & Qualifications:



Strong coding experience (Python, JavaScript, or similar).

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or a highly related technical field.

Proven experience with n8n, Claude Code, and other LLM platforms.

Hands-on experience building logic with Make, Zapier, or similar automation platforms.

Prior experience working with the Shopify API is highly preferred.

Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to map out complex logic for diverse business systems.



--



How to Apply:

To ensure you've read this entire post, please use the phrase 'AutomationExpert123' as your subject line. In your message, please briefly answer the screening questions listed below:



1. Besides customer service, what other AI automation systems did you implement in similar businesses like ours? What systems did you connect?

2. Have you worked with the Shopify API before? If yes, please briefly describe a specific automation or integration you built using it.

3. Walk me through a complex automation workflow you built using n8n or Make. What was the problem, and how did your logic solve it?

4. Describe your experience using Claude Code or other LLMs for text-based automation. How do you handle edge cases or "hallucinations" in a live production environment?

5. The AI field moves fast. How do you stay updated with industry changes, and what was the last new automation tool or technique you taught yourself?

6. What programming languages are you most proficient in when building custom integrations, and how many years of experience do you have with them?

 and Instagram, and document your process so others can follow your lead.



If you’ve spent serious time in Ads Manager, understand attribution models, can spot a bad creative from a mile away, and live by data, this is for you.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

– Plan and execute full-funnel Meta ad campaigns (awareness ? conversion)

– Monitor daily performance, optimize for CPA/ROAS, and scale efficiently

– Develop A/B tests for audiences, creatives, and placements

– Write and refine high-converting ad copy (you’ll also have support from our team)

– Create detailed reports with actionable insights

– Troubleshoot performance drops and tracking issues (Pixel, CAPI, UTMs)

– Collaborate with designers, copywriters, and devs to improve landing page conversion rates

– Use AI and automation tools to streamline creative testing and data analysis

– Stay on top of Meta algorithm changes, policy updates, and new features



REQUIREMENTS:

– Proven experience managing $5K+/month in Meta ad spend

– Deep understanding of campaign structures, bidding strategies, and tracking setups

– Strong grasp of performance metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CPA, ROAS, MER)

– Experience with Pixel and Conversion API setup

– Ability to create reports that connect ad performance to business outcomes

– Proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel and Ads Manager reporting

– Creative eye for ad visuals and messaging that convert

– Self-starter who can spot and fix issues fast without waiting for direction

– Bonus: Experience running ads for local lead gen or e-commerce brands

– Bonus: Familiarity with tools like Triple Whale, Hyros, HighLevel, or Zapier



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED):

-- Your desired monthly salary in PHP if working 5 hours per week

-- Your preferred payment method (Paypal, Wise, or Payoneer)

-- Your exact shift availability (bonus if you can work with overlap of USA Eastern Business Hours [Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM EST])

title: Looking for 2 Rock Star SEO Experts to join our team. HIRING NOW!
description:
Are you experienced at SEO?



We are seeking 2 rock star EXPERIENCED and results-driven SEO Specialist to join our digital marketing agency. You’ll be responsible for creating and executing SEO strategies that increase search rankings, drive website traffic, and generate qualified leads. You'll also document your process and check the work of teammates who will assist under your direction.



You must stay current on industry best practices and algorithm updates (think Julian Goldie, Matt Diggity, Craig Campbell) and be excited about using tools like AI and automation to increase results and save time. We believe in working SMART!



This is a full-time position. You should understand Local SEO, standard on-page SEO, keyword strategy, technical SEO, internal linking, and backlink strategies. You must also be skilled at identifying rankable content ideas based on domain authority, competition levels, and search intent.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



-- Develop and implement SEO strategies to increase organic visibility, traffic, and conversions

-- Conduct keyword research using tools like SEMRush, SERanking, Google Search Console, and Ahrefs to build topical maps

-- Analyze SERPs and competitor sites to identify keyword gaps and opportunities

-- Use AI tools to help create content that aligns with search intent

-- Write or optimize blog posts, landing pages, and metadata

-- Create and maintain internal linking structures based on site hierarchy and topic relationships

-- Use the WordPress block editor to publish and optimize content

-- Optimize Google Business Profiles, including categories, services, products, NAP consistency, and geotagged photos

-- Build citations and perform basic local link building

-- Analyze performance with GA4, GSC, and SEMRush, providing recommendations for dev teams or writers

-- Conduct site audits to find and fix technical SEO issues (speed, indexing, mobile-friendliness, Core Web Vitals)

-- Track backlinks and identify outreach opportunities in GSC, Ahrefs, or similar tools

-- Conduct outreach to website owners for backlink placements and guest posts

-- Use automation and scraping tools to scale outreach efforts where appropriate

-- Stay updated with the latest SEO trends and tools

-- Monitor competitors and share insights to stay ahead of changes in your niche



REQUIREMENTS:



-- Proven experience in SEO with clear examples of websites you've helped rank

-- Deep understanding of Google ranking factors and algorithm updates

-- Proficiency in tools like Ahrefs, SEMRush, Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Screaming Frog, SurferSEO

-- Strong grasp of keyword research, content strategy, and content silos

-- Knowledge of internal linking best practices

-- Experience with WordPress, especially the block editor

-- Experience optimizing Google Business Profiles and managing citations

-- Working knowledge of technical SEO (crawl errors, page speed, schema, Core Web Vitals)

-- Strong written English (you don’t need to be a copywriter, but you can clearly edit and structure SEO content)

-- Analytical mindset and attention to detail

-- Self-starter who doesn’t wait for perfect instructions — you figure things out and test what works

-- Bonus: Familiarity with backlink outreach tools like Respona, 
, or BuzzStream

-- Bonus: Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with writing SEO content



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED):

Please apply on our website: 



If you’re a self-motivated SEO professional who lives and breathes rankings, automation, and smart strategy — we want to hear from you.

description:

title: L2 Technical Support Representative
description:
We are looking for a skilled Tier 2 Technical Support Representative who will act as the key link between Tier 1 Support and the Escalation/Engineering team. This role focuses on advanced troubleshooting, VoIP and network support, and managing escalations. You will serve as the primary technical point of contact, ensuring issues are resolved efficiently while maintaining strong communication with clients and internal teams



Job Responsibilities



• Provide Tier 2 support for complex VoIP and system issues

• Troubleshoot call quality problems (jitter, latency, packet loss)

• Handle hardware and network troubleshooting (routers, firewalls, NAT configuration)

• Set up and configure call flows

• Act as the main point of contact between Tier 1 and Escalation teams

• Manage escalations and ensure SLA compliance

• Identify root causes and resolve system or data issues

• Collaborate with Support, Customer Success, and Engineering teams

• Maintain documentation and share technical knowledge

• Ensure data security and compliance (HIPAA familiarity is a plus)



Requirements



• Experience in Tier 2 Technical Support (VoIP or telecom preferred)

• Strong knowledge of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, NAT, routers, firewalls)

• Experience troubleshooting call quality and system performance

• Ability to manage escalations in an SLA-driven environment

• Strong problem-solving and communication skills

• Detail-oriented with strong ownership and accountability

• HIPAA knowledge is a plus

title: Talent Acquisition
description:
Job Title: Recruitment and Operations Admin VA



Job Summary



We are looking for a self-sufficient and detail-driven Recruitment and Operations Admin VA to join a growing US-based real estate investment firm. This is a full-time position centered around hiring US-based sales representatives and office personnel, while also supporting transaction processes and investor-related administrative work. The right candidate is confident, resourceful, and able to take initiative without constant direction.



Key Responsibilities



- Publish and manage job advertisements on LinkedIn and other US-targeted job platforms

- Proactively source, review, and shortlist candidates for sales and office positions

- Conduct initial Zoom interviews and evaluate applicants using structured criteria

- Submit top candidates to leadership for final-stage interviews

- Maintain recruitment pipelines and update tracking systems

- Communicate professionally with all candidates throughout the hiring process

- Assist with coordination of real estate transactions

- Support investor communications and follow-up tasks

- Handle additional operational and administrative responsibilities as required



Mandatory Skills



- Demonstrated background in recruitment or talent acquisition - required

- Experience sourcing and screening US-based professionals

- Strong written and verbal English skills

- Confident conducting structured interviews

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks without close supervision

- Strong analytical and decision-making ability

- Quick to learn new systems and processes



Preferred Skills



- Experience recruiting commission-based sales roles

- Knowledge of LinkedIn recruitment tools and job ad strategies

- Background in real estate or investment environments

- Comfortable handling multiple open roles simultaneously

- Process-oriented and highly organized



Why Join Us



This role offers the opportunity to directly influence company growth by hiring high-performing talent while contributing to operational excellence. You will work closely with leadership and have real ownership over recruitment outcomes.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to join our team. As a Cybersecurity Engineer, you will play a critical role in protecting our clients’ IT environments by identifying vulnerabilities, implementing security measures, and responding to potential threats.



This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where you’ll help safeguard businesses from cyber risks while growing your expertise in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.



Key Responsibilities

* Design, implement, and maintain security solutions to protect IT systems and data.

* Develop and enforce security policies, procedures, and best practices.

* Analyze security alerts, logs, and i
 to identify potential threats.

* Conduct vulnerability assessments to identify and mitigate risks.

* Respond to and investigate security i
, providing detailed reports and recommendations.

* Collaborate with IT teams to ensure systems are configured securely.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest cybersecurity trends, threats, and technologies.

* Provide training and guidance to tea
mbers and clients on cybersecurity best practices.



Technologies You’ll Work With

* Endpoint protection and monitoring tools.

* Firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection/prevention systems.

* Cloud security tools for Microsoft 365, Azure, and AWS.

* SIEM platforms.

* Vulnerability scanning tools (e.g., Nessus, Qualys).



What We’re Looking For

* Strong understanding of network security and firewalls.

* Familiarity with vulnerability assessments and i
 response.

* Knowledge of security frameworks and standards (e.g., NIST, ISO 27001, CIS).

* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.



Preferred but Not Required:

* Certifications such as CISSP, CEH, CompTIA Security+, or CISM.

* Experience with cloud security (Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS).

* Experience in cybersecurity or a related IT field (2+ years preferred).



Why Join Us?

* Be part of a forward-thinking team dedicated to protecting businesses from cyber threats.

* Opportunities for professional growth and paid certifications.

* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

* Monthly healthcare allowance.

* 13th-month pay.

* Structured training and onboarding.

* Company-provided work equipment.

* Remote work flexibility.



How to Apply

If you’re interested in this position, please submit your application and include the numbers (2026) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



We look forward to hearing from you and exploring how you can contribute to our team!

title: Sales Coordinator
description:
Role Overview:

We’re looking for a professional Sales Coordinator to handle inbound calls and warm leads, helping business owners learn about our services. With a 99.9% client satisfaction rate, you’ll be selling a top-tier service with high compensation. This role focuses on consultative sales and relationship-building with no cold calling.



Key Responsibilities:

-Conduct 30-minute discovery calls with interested prospects.

-Present our process and services through a structured presentation.

-Ask probing questions to understand client needs and challenges.

-Clearly explain pricing, timelines, and our process in professional English.

-Address client concerns regarding virtual assistants.

-Document client requirements for a smooth transition to the recruitment team.

-Follow up with prospects to move them forward in the process.

-Collaborate with internal teams for accurate handoff of client information.

-Track interactions and prospect status in our CRM (Pipedrive).

-Reach out to warm leads via
, LinkedIn, and referrals.



Mandatory Requirements:

-Excellent spoken and written English skills.

-At least 1 year of experience in customer-facing roles (sales, account management, customer service).

-Strong active listening and note-taking skills.

-Professional phone demeanor with clear, confident communication.

-Highly organized and detail-oriented.

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

-Stable internet connection and quiet workspace.

-Availability during US business hours (EST/PST).



Preferred Skills:

-Experience with discovery calls or needs assessments.

-Familiarity with recruitment, outsourcing, or virtual assistants.

-Experience with Pipedrive CRM.

-Comfortable presenting via video calls.

-Strong problem-solving skills and emotional intelligence.



Compensation & Growth:

-Competitive hourly rate based on experience.

-Performance-based bonuses and opportunities for salary increases.

-Career growth potential within the company, with a path to leadership roles.



Work Setup:

-Regular team communication via WhatsApp and video calls.

-A supportive company culture that values professional growth and authentic communication.

title: VA for AI Youtube Scriptwriting
description:
Hi there,



We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented assistant to help produce YouTube video scripts using AI tools (ChatGPT and Claude). The workflow is largely prompt-driven and process-based — but you'll occasionally need to use light judgment, answer clarifying questions the AI raises, or make small decisions to keep things moving.





What You'll Do

- Follow provided prompts and templates to produce video scripts using AI

- Review AI output and make minor edits or adjustments as needed

- Respond to occasional clarifying questions that come up during the process

- Format and deliver completed scripts on time

- Flag anything genuinely unclear before submitting





What We're Looking For

- Comfortable working with AI tools

- Reliable and communicative — meets deadlines and responds promptly

- Good enough written English to spot when something is off

- Able to exercise light judgment without needing hand-holding on every step

- No prior scriptwriting experience required — full training provided





What This Role Is NOT

This is not a creative writing position. You won't be coming up with ideas or making big editorial calls. The heavy lifting is handled by the AI — your job is to steer the process, apply the templates, and deliver clean, consistent output.





When applying, introduce yourself and explain why you'd be a good fit for this position. Also let us know which hours you're comfortable working. No portfolio needed.

title: Shopify Dropshipping Ecommerce Supply Chain Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing international e-commerce company selling fashion products across multiple European markets. As we continue to scale, we are looking for a reliable and proactive Supply Chain Manager to help manage our logistics operations and supplier coordination.



In this role, you will make sure orders move smoothly from our suppliers to our customers. You will monitor shipments, communicate with suppliers, and solve logistics issues when they occur.



If you enjoy problem-solving, organizing operations, and improving logistics processes, this role will be a great fit.



?? Important: To show that you read this job post carefully, please start your application with the word “Strawberry”.



What You’ll Do



Your main responsibility is ensuring our supply chain runs smoothly and efficiently.



Order & Shipment Monitoring



Monitor orders to ensure they are processed and shipped on time



Track shipments and identify delays or unusual tracking updates



Follow up with suppliers or couriers when shipments are delayed



Supplier Communication



Communicate with suppliers regarding order processing and shipping updates



Coordinate when orders need adjustments or replacements



Ensure suppliers meet expected processing times



Problem Solving



Investigate logistics issues such as delayed shipments, lost packages, or delivery problems



Work with suppliers to resolve issues quickly



Arrange replacements when necessary



Returns & Logistics Cases



Manage returned shipments and delivery issues



Handle more complex logistics cases escalated by the support team



Coordinate with suppliers to resolve international shipping or return issues



Operations Support



Work closely with the customer support team to provide updates on logistics issues



Help improve processes to reduce delays and supply chain problems over time



Requirements



We are looking for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable managing logistics operations.



Requirements:



Experience with e-commerce logistics, operations, or supply chain management



Strong problem-solving skills



Good English communication skills



Experience working with suppliers or fulfillment partners



Comfortable using spreadsheets and tracking tools



Ability to manage multiple cases at the same time



Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Bonus if you have experience with:



Shopify or other e-commerce platforms



International shipping or dropshipping



Working with overseas suppliers



What We Offer



Fully remote position – work from anywhere



Flexible working hours



Long-term position with a fast-growing international e-commerce company



Opportunity to grow into a senior operations role as the company scales



Clear processes and a structured workflow to help you succeed



Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Start your application with the word “Strawberry”



A short introduction about your experience with logistics or e-commerce



An example of a logistics or shipping issue you solved



Tools or platforms you have worked with (Shopify, spreadsheets, etc.)



We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and ready to take ownership of our supply chain operations.

•  Take Ownership

•  Be Respectful



Then, you've found the right place! Our team values these qualities and seeks individuals who are enthusiastic about making an impact.



This opportunity may not be the perfect match if:

•  You're just looking for any gig to try

•  Adapting to USA working hours doesn't fit your schedule

•  Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 





ABOUT THE ROLE

We are searching for an experienced Amazon PPC Consultant to work with us on an ongoing project basis. As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to reduce and maintain target TACOS while driving continued growth on Amazon through expert-level PPC strategies. Own all advertising initiatives to maximize ROAS, protect margins, rank key SKUs, and increase total revenue while minimizing wasted ad spend.



•  Develop and execute a full-funnel Amazon PPC strategy (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display, Video).

•  Build, optimize, and scale PPC campaigns based on ACOS/TACoS targets and profitability.

•  Create Updated Strategies for daily, weekly, and monthly optimizations: bid changes, search term harvesting, negative keywords, campaign structure improvements, etc.

•  Analyze PPC performance and prepare weekly reporting with actionable insights and recommendations.

•  Collaborate with the Listing Team, Supply Chain, Finance, and CEO for pricing, inventory, and launch plans.

•  Maintain clean campaign architecture and naming conventions for easy tracking.

•  Stay updated on Amazon Ads algorithm changes, best practices, and competitive landscape.



This position will work directly under our CEO. We are looking for someone who can plug into our workflow and offer their expertise to execute and suggest improvements.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience. 



•  Bachelor’s Degree, or equivalent experience

•  Amazon Advertising certifications preferred

•  5+ years proven experience managing Amazon PPC at scale

•  Deep expertise with Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display

•  Experience managing 50+ SKUs and 8 figures in sales.

•  Proven track record in achieving and maintaining low TACOS.

•  Key Competencies: Analytical Thinking & Data Interpretation, Strategic Decision-Making, Detail-Oriented, Problem-Solving, Teamwork, Communication

•  Expert-level Amazon PPC Console and Bulk Files (required)

•  Advanced MS Excel & Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, pivot tables, data dashboards)

•  Proficiency in Helium 10, Data Dive

•  Strong analytical and reporting skills

•  Excellent written and verbal communication.

•  Ability to drive sales, product ranking, impressions, and conversions.

•  Knowledgeable in all aspects of advertising on Amazon.

•  Internet & tech savvy.



SALARY 

•  Salary is negotiable and depends on experience.



If you feel you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume and a sample work/portfolio of successful past projects. 



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!

title: YouTube Content & Social Media Strategist
description:
Job Summary:



We are looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media & Content Manager (YouTube Focus) to assist a well-established YouTuber in enhancing their video content and growing their YouTube presence. This part-time role involves designing eye-catching thumbnails, repurposing content for multiple platforms, and executing strategies to boost YouTube performance. The ideal candidate will be innovative, strategic, and skilled in driving content performance through a solid understanding of social media trends.



Key Responsibilities:



- Create visually appealing thumbnails for YouTube videos using tools like Canva (or other preferred design platforms)

- Repurpose long-form YouTube videos into engaging short-form content for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels

- Develop and implement content strategies to increase YouTube video views, subscriber growth, and audience engagement

- Perform research on trending topics and audience interests to inform content ideas and optimize video performance

- Manage YouTube channel settings, ensuring videos are SEO-optimized with relevant titles, descriptions, and tags

- Collaborate with the YouTuber to align content direction with goals, ensuring cohesive branding and messaging

- Oversee content scheduling and timely posting on YouTube and additional social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

- Track content performance through analytics, adjusting strategies to optimize reach and engagement

- Provide additional support with other social media content creation and management as required



Required Skills:



- Proficiency in Canva or similar graphic design software to create compelling thumbnails

- Strong experience in social media management, particularly YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Deep understanding of YouTube algorithms, SEO best practices, and social media trends

- Ability to repurpose long-form videos into engaging short-form content (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram)

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills for collaborating with the content creator

- Highly organized with the ability to work independently in a remote setting

- Flexibility to adapt to evolving content needs and new social media trends



Preferred Skills:



- Previous experience managing YouTube channels or social media for content creators

- Basic video editing skills (a plus, but not required)

- Familiarity with AI tools for content creation or optimization

- Proficiency in YouTube analytics to track video performance and implement growth strategies



Why Join Us:



This role offers a flexible, part-time opportunity where you'll have a direct impact on a growing YouTube channel. You’ll help shape the content strategy, boost views, and increase audience engagement. The position allows you to combine creativity with strategic thinking, and you'll be an integral part of helping the YouTuber achieve their growth goals. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone passionate about social media, content management, and video marketing.

title: AI Assisted Video Production
description:
Job Title

AI Image Designer for Instagram Video Creation



Overview

We are creating short Instagram videos similar to this style:?

Our workflow uses AI-generated images that are converted into video using Higgsfield AI.



We already have a system that generates images for each scene, but sometimes the output needs to be adjusted or improved. Your role will be to use AI tools to refine or regenerate images so they properly match the requirements of the scene.



You will work alongside a video editor who assembles the final video.



Responsibilities

* Review scenes and generated images

* Use ChatGPT to make a new prompt to adjust or regenerate images when needed

* Ensure images contain enough variation and visual detail to work well when converted into video

* Provide 2–3 image options per scene when necessary

* Maintain visual consistency across the video



Requirements

* Experience using AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Higgsfield AI, Sora, Google flow etc.)

* Strong sense of visual composition

* Ability to interpret a scene description and produce an appropriate image



Project Scope

* Each video contains 5–15 scenes

* Initial project: 1-2 videos per week

* Long term commitment

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 3a
description:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

Required Experience & Education

title: Marketing Designer & Funnel Builder
description:
Next Level Wealth is a fast-growing tax mentorship and financial education company that supports a network of 300+ tax professionals across the United States.

Our community of tax professionals regularly needs marketing support including landing pages, sales funnels, websites, and marketing graphics to help them attract more tax clients and grow their businesses.

Because of the size of our network, there is consistent project work available for the right designer.

We are looking for a creative Funnel & Conversion Designer who can build high-converting funnels, recreate websites when examples are provided, and design marketing assets that help our tax professionals generate more clients.

If you are skilled in sales funnels, landing pages, and marketing design, this role offers the opportunity to work on multiple ongoing projects with a growing network of clients.

What You Will Be Responsible For:

• Designing high-converting landing pages and sales funnels

• Building funnels that include upsells, downsells, and order bumps

• Recreating or redesigning high-performing funnels when clients provide examples

• Designing marketing pages that capture leads and convert visitors into customers

• Creating marketing graphics, flyers, and social media assets

• Designing simple websites for small businesses

• Collaborating with our team to build marketing systems that generate leads

Key Skills We Are Looking For:

• Experience building sales funnels and landing pages

• Ability to recreate websites or funnels based on examples provided

• Understanding of conversion-focused design (calls-to-action, lead capture, offer placement)

• Ability to design custom layouts instead of only using templates

• Creativity in building marketing pages that convert visitors into customers

• Strong attention to detail and ability to complete projects quickly

Tools You May Use:

• GoHighLevel

• ClickFunnels

• WordPress

• Canva

• Other funnel or landing page builders

This Position is Ideal For Someone Who:

• Enjoys building marketing funnels that convert

• Understands how online marketing and lead generation works

• Can take inspiration from existing websites and recreate similar funnels

• Is creative and can design custom pages instead of relying only on templates



To confirm that you follow directions and have the required skills, please complete the following steps when applying.

Send 2 examples of funnels or landing pages you have personally built.

Tell us what tools you used to build those funnels (GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, WordPress, etc.).

Record a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) explaining:

Who you are

Your experience building funnels or landing pages

How you would recreate a landing page if a client sends you an example

What makes a funnel convert well

Please include the Loom video link in your application.

Applications that do not include a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Customer success
description:
WHO WE ARE



Allied Health Media is a fast scaling digital growth consultancy working with medical consultants across the UK and globally. We help clinics grow through clean systems, automation and strong digital frameworks. We move fast, stay organized and make sure clients always know what’s happening next.



WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR



We’re hiring an experienced Customer Success Manager for a long-term role. This is not a one-off project — we’re looking to build a long-term relationship with the right person.



You must be able to manage client relationships, ensure smooth communication between teams, and make sure our consultants always feel supported, informed, and confident in the progress of their projects.



ROLE: Customer Success Manager (Healthcare Clients)



EMPLOYMENT TYPE: Full Time

SCHEDULE: Monday to Saturday | 8am to 6pm (UK Time)

SALARY: $500 - $850 depending on experience



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Act as the main point of contact for our medical consultant clients

Ensure clients clearly understand project timelines, deliverables and next steps

Coordinate between internal teams (SEO, development, content and consulting)

Track project progress and ensure tasks move forward smoothly

Provide regular updates and maintain clear communication with clients

Handle questions, feedback and requests from clients in a professional manner

Identify potential issues early and help resolve them quickly

Ensure every client has a smooth, organised and positive experience working with Allied Health Media



WHAT YOU NEED



Experience in Customer Success, Account Management or Client Management

Strong communication and organisational skills

Ability to manage multiple clients and projects at the same time

Confidence communicating with professionals such as medical consultants

Excellent written and spoken English

High attention to detail and strong follow-through on tasks



BONUS (Not Required):

Background in marketing agencies or digital services

Familiarity with project management tools (
, ClickUp, Notion, Trello etc.)

Experience coordinating teams across different departments

title: Claude AI Integration Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to lead the implementation, integration, and operationalization of Claude (Anthropic) and ClawdBot across our business operations.



This role is not experimental. It is execution-driven.



You will design, deploy, and optimize enterprise-grade AI workflows that integrate Claude and ClawdBot into real business systems, including CRM, ticketing, cybersecurity operations, marketing automation, compliance documentation, reporting, and internal knowledge management.



The objective is measurable business impact, not surface-level automation.



Key Responsibilities:

• Architect and deploy Claude-based AI workflows across departments

• Integrate ClawdBot into internal systems and external client-facing workflows

• Build secure API integrations between Claude and our CRM, PSA, ERP, and BI systems

• Develop prompt engineering frameworks aligned with compliance and governance requirements

title: Administrative Assistant - Mortgage Servicing
description:
Project Overview

Dominion Financial Services (DFS) is a fast-growing real estate lender specializing in Short-Term Bridge Loans and Long-Term Rental Loans for real estate investors across the country. We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Administrative Assistant to support our Loan Servicing team and assist with the coordination and organization of construction draw requests and loan servicing activities.



In this role, you will help manage documentation, coordinate inspections, review borrower submissions, track project balances, and support fund disbursements while ensuring accuracy and compliance with company processes.



If you have experience in mortgage lending, loan servicing, or administrative support within a financial services environment, strong Excel skills, and thrive in a structured, process-driven environment, we would love to hear from you. Please share your background in mortgage lending or loan servicing support, relevant systems experience, and your earliest availability.



As an Administrative Assistant – Private Lender You Will:

You will work closely with the Draw Administrator and Loan Servicing team to support the full draw request process, from borrower submissions through inspection coordination and fund disbursement. This role includes reviewing documentation from borrowers, contractors, and vendors for completeness and accuracy while coordinating with internal teams such as underwriting, servicing, and accounting to ensure all required information is properly organized.



You will maintain accurate records of draw activity, organize and track project documentation, monitor balances, and help ensure compliance with loan terms and internal processes. The role also involves coordinating inspections with third-party vendors, reviewing invoices, identifying discrepancies, and communicating status updates to borrowers and internal stakeholders. Additionally, you will assist with general administrative tasks that support the efficiency and accuracy of the loan servicing and draw management process.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Candidates should bring at least three years of experience in mortgage lending, loan documentation, administrative support, draw processing, or a related financial services role. Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel and Word, is required, along with excellent organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.



The ideal candidate is highly detail-oriented, committed to accuracy and compliance, and comfortable working with financial documentation, general ledger concepts, and common banking transactions in a fast-paced lending environment.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us:

• Long-term, steady work with a national lender

• 100% remote role – work productively from anywhere

• Supportive, collaborative team culture that values accuracy, efficiency, and teamwork



Timeline:

• Full-time, long-term position

• Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time

• Start date: ASAP



If you'd like, I can also optimize this specifically for Upwork so it attracts strong remote mortgage ops / servicing candidates, which can make a big difference in applicant quality.

title: Leasing Assistant
description:
Join our Leasing Assistant team. Our team is committed to exceeding expectations through exceptional service, strong operational support, and a collaborative, professional work environment.



 Job Description/Responsibilities 

Monitor the CRM daily to identify and respond to new leasing leads in a timely manner. 

Review incoming leads and determine the most effective outreach method to establish initial contact. 

Prequalify prospective residents and actively engage them to generate interest in available properties. 

Recommend alternative managed properties when prospects are not interested in the originally inquired property. 

Coordinate with onsite leasing agents and property managers to schedule apartment showings based on availability. 

Accurately document all lead interactions, communications, and notes in the CRM for onsite team reference. 

Review and track onsite leasing agents’ feedback and notes following apartment showings. 

Conduct follow-up communication with prospects after showings to advance the leasing process. 

Guide and support the lead throughout the lease application process to ensure a smooth experience. 

Once leases are signed and payments are received, coordinate with prospects and property managers to schedule move-in dates. 

Prepare and generate basic reports on lead activity, leasing performance, and key metrics.
