title: E-commerce Product Researcher (Serious Long-Term Position – Data-Driven Research Only)
description:
We are looking for a serious and detail-oriented product researcher for our e-commerce stores.



This is not a typical dropshipping research role where you send random products from spy tools like Pipiads or Minea.

We are only interested in real market signals and current winners.



You must understand that quality is far more important than quantity.



Your job is to identify products that are currently selling right now by analyzing advertising activity and market demand.



If you are someone who just sends long lists of generic products from Aliexpress or TikTok compilations, this role is not for you.



Your Responsibilities



Meta Ad Library Research



Search for competitors and product keywords.



Identify products that have multiple active ads running.



Monitor those ads for several days.



Track whether the number of ads is increasing or decreasing.



TikTok & Instagram Product Discovery



Use country-specific accounts depending on the target market (example: UK account for UK store).



Scroll Reels / TikTok feeds and identify dropshipping-style product ads.



Analyze:



Engagement



Comments



Creative styles



Then verify the advertiser in Meta Ad Library.



Ad Activity Tracking

You will maintain a tracking sheet where you log:



Product



Store



Number of ads



Engagement



Date discovered



Ad count changes over time



We only move forward with products that show growing advertising activity.



Supplier Verification (Extremely Important)



Before submitting a product you must:



Contact the supplier



Confirm availability



Confirm the product is exactly the same



Confirm all variants



Confirm pricing differences between variants



Attention to detail here is critical.

Different variants often mean different costs.



You must never send random mass products.



Important Rules



? No Pipiads

? No generic spy tools

? No mass lists of products



We only want signal-based research.



Quality research means:



? Checking real ads

? Monitoring data

? Verifying suppliers

? Confirming product accuracy



What We Are Looking For



You are:



• Extremely detail oriented

• Data driven

• Serious about your work

• Comfortable researching for several hours to find one good product



If you are the type of person who prefers finding 2 excellent products instead of sending 50 random ones, you will fit this role well.

title: Mobile Game Developer — Unity/AR Specialist
description:
About Us



We're building RAVIA, a location-based augmented reality mobile game designed to get kids aged 8-14 outdoors and active. Think Pokemon GO meets fitness adventure. Players explore their real-world neighbourhoods to discover creatures ("Ravs"), complete challenges, and earn real-world rewards from retail partners.

We're a small, focused team working toward an MVP launch, and we're looking for a Junior Game Developer to build the immersive AR experience at the heart of the game.



The Role



You'll be the primary builder of the RAVIA AR experience. Your mission is to bring the "Rav" avatar to life using the Google Geospatial API, ensuring tokens and loot boxes appear accurately in the real world, and implementing the mobile-friendly puzzles and mini-games that keep players engaged.



This is a hands-on technical role — you'll own the AR implementation, game mechanics, and performance optimisation end to end.



What You'll Do



- Use ARCore/ARKit and the Google Geospatial API to place persistent AR content at specific lat/long coordinates

- Design and build web-app-based mini-games (Sudoku, Hangman, Wordle, Crosswords, and similar) loadable via WebView within the Unity or Flutter environment

- Build the token spawning system using random point generation within geofence boundaries

- Implement 3D token animations, tier-specific particle effects (Golden, Diamond, Ultimate), and loot box opening sequences

- Optimise AR scenes for battery life and frame rate, including testing individual vs. corner geospatial anchor strategies

- Handle the Unity-side messaging bridge to receive user data from Flutter



Requirements



- Proficiency in HTML5, JavaScript, or TypeScript to build responsive, mobile web-app-based puzzle games

- Familiarity with the Google ARCore Geospatial API, Visual Positioning Service (VPS), and Geospatial Anchors

- Basic mathematics: geometry, point-in-polygon validation, and ray-casting algorithms

- Available for 40 hours/week with Sydney timezone overlap (start no later than 10am Sydney)

- Comfortable with time tracking via 
 (screenshots enabled)



This is a full-time, exclusive engagement — no other concurrent work



Nice to Have



- Experience with Unity WebView packages

- Mobile performance optimisation experience across both AR and web views

- Prior exposure to Flutter/Unity integration



Compensation

AUD $1,733 per month, with opportunity to reassess after the initial evaluation period.



To Apply



Send your portfolio showcasing:



- AR or location-based projects you've worked on

- Mini-games or web-app games you've built

- Any shipped Unity projects or mobile games

- Links to GitHub or live demos where available

title: Strata Records Research Assistant – Australian Strata Experience Required (Remote – Philippines)
description:
Strata Records Research Assistant – Australian Strata Experience Required (Remote – Philippines)



We are an Australian property inspection company looking for a reliable and detail-oriented remote assistant based in the Philippines who already has experience working with Australian strata documents, terminology and strata management systems.



This role supports our strata inspection team by preparing and organising strata records so our inspectors can review them quickly and complete reports efficiently.



This is a long-term remote role working with a professional Australian team.



What’s in it for you



100% remote work from the Philippines

Stable full-time role with long-term opportunity

Structured tasks with clear processes

Work with an established Australian property inspection company



About the Role



You will assist our strata inspection team by preparing and organising strata records before the inspector reviews them.



Your work helps our inspectors complete strata reports faster while maintaining high accuracy.



Typical tasks include



Downloading strata records from strata manager portals

Organising documents into structured folders (AGM minutes, financials, insurance, correspondence, etc.)

Extracting key financial figures from strata records and financial statements

Preparing draft report templates with building details and financial data

Reviewing meeting minutes and flagging key issues such as building defects, water ingress, special levies or planned major works

Preparing document summaries for the inspector to review

Uploading completed reports and supporting documents to our system

Assisting with follow-ups if documents are missing



Who We’re Looking For



Previous experience working with Australian strata records or strata management companies

Strong understanding of Australian strata terminology and documents (AGM minutes, financials, insurance certificates, capital works fund plans, etc.)

Familiarity with Australian strata management systems such as **StrataMax, MRI Strata Master, PropertyIQ Strata, and Urbanise Strata**

Strong attention to detail and ability to organise large document sets

Excellent written English communication skills

Comfortable working with PDFs, spreadsheets and online portals

Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently



Why This Role is Different



This role focuses on research and document preparation rather than tenant complaints, meetings or customer service. You’ll be supporting a specialised inspection team by preparing strata records so inspectors can quickly review and complete professional reports for property buyers.



How to Apply



If you have experience working with Australian strata documents and strata management systems and enjoy structured research-based work, we’d love to hear from you.



When applying, please include:



The names of the Australian strata systems you have worked with (for example StrataMax, MRI Strata Master, PropertyIQ Strata or Urbanise)

The name of the Australian strata company or property company you previously worked for

How long you worked with Australian strata records

title: eCommerce Junior CRO Specialist
description:
As a Junior CRO Specialist at CRO Gurus, you will be the key link between data-driven optimization strategy and tangible client results. This is a CRO-first role focused on experimentation, analytics, and user behavior — not digital marketing execution.



You will be a vital part of the client team, working closely under a Senior Strategist to help build a clear, evidence-based testing roadmap. You will manage the day-to-day details of project execution, support client communications, and drive action items to completion. We use smart systems and lean processes to accelerate analysis, freeing you up to focus on high-level strategy and building incredible client relationships.



About CRO Gurus: Our Mission & Culture



CRO Gurus is a fast-moving, fully remote team specializing in Conversion Rate Optimization. We are committed to delivering measurable ROI for our clients by identifying the "why" behind user behavior and executing intelligent A/B testing roadmaps.



We've built our culture to empower professionals who thrive on impact and autonomy.

Full-Lifecycle Exposure: This isn't a siloed role. You will work directly with a senior mentor and be exposed to the entire client lifecycle, from strategic hypothesis to final report, contributing to real client outcomes.

Strategic Speed: We prioritize moving quickly while making intelligent, data-informed decisions. You are empowered to take initiative, ensuring your time is spent on high-impact strategy.



Key Responsibilities: 



Implement Data-Driven Strategy: Assist Senior Strategists with comprehensive website audits, analyze user behavior, and support the creation of customized A/B testing roadmaps based on data-driven insights.

Own Project Execution: Manage the day-to-day details of the Asana board, translating the team's strategic plan into an executed project. You will track and update tasks, timelines, and milestones to ensure timely delivery.

Support Client Relationships: Act as a reliable daily point of contact. Support senior strategists on client calls, help prepare findings, and learn how to build strong, effective partnerships.

Report & Track Business Impact: Monitor and analyze A/B testing results, helping to compile regular reports with actionable insights that summarize clear business impact and ROI.



What We’re Looking For:

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented professional with a high-ownership mentality:



- Experience: 1–2 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Analytics, eCommerce optimization, or experimentation-focused roles — OR a strong portfolio of CRO-related projects.

- Exceptional Organization: Strong organizational skills; you are proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable keeping a project's tasks on track. Proficiency with tools like Asana is a huge plus.

- Confident Communicator: Excellent communication skills, with the confidence and desire to support client-facing meetings.

- Foundational Analytics Skills: Required understanding of Google Analytics 4. Familiarity with heatmapping and A/B testing tools is a major bonus, but we are willing to train the right candidate.

- Mindset: A strong passion for delivering measurable results and an intelligent approach to problem-solving.



What You'll Get (Benefits & Compensation):

Dedicated Growth Time: 10% of your weekly paid hours are reserved for learning and upskilling, ensuring you remain an expert in the field.

Remote Flexibility: Join our fast-moving, fully remote team.

Direct Impact: Work on a lean, intelligent team where your work has a direct, measurable impact on client success.

Compensation: Up to 420 per hour for the most qualified profiles.



Our Recruiting Process:

Apply: Submit your application here, and fill in the application form: 





Important:

We prioritize candidates who can demonstrate hands-on CRO or experimentation experience (even from personal or side projects). Generic digital marketing backgrounds without CRO exposure are unlikely to be a fit.



1. Skillset Interview: If you qualify, we will contact you to schedule a 40–60 minute skillset interview.

2. Paid Skill Test.

3. In-depth Interview.

4. Offer.



We’re aiming to find the right fit as soon as possible. If you have any questions or feedback, please reach out to 
 to Join the Team? If you are a problem-solver who also loves to make sure the plan happens, we’d love to hear from you.



Links to find out more about us:

title: Junior Operations Coordinator **IMMEDIATE OPENING**
description:
Date With the Muse



[
](
)



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you’re not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. You are committed to excellence and take pride in a job well done.



We understand that not every person is ready for this level of performance and we appreciate the honesty of those who d
 this is not the right place for them. On the other hand, you would make an ideal candidate to join our company if you are willing to commit to the following principles:



- Accountability: see it, own it, solve it, do it

- Become part of the solution

- Respect for others and their feelings

- Act now.

- Ask the question: “What else can I do?”

- Ask the questions: “What coaching do you have for me?” and “What can I do better?”

- Personal ownership and pride

- Reject average

- Show others that you care



This is not a virtual assistant role.



This is a structured operational coordination role for someone with project management or operations experience who understands sequencing, readiness, and follow-through.



You are not here to “help where needed.”



You are here to ensure the company runs cleanly.



---



## The Real Role



You are the traffic controller of the company’s time resource.



Your responsibility is to ensure:



- The right people are in the right place

- At the right time

- With the right materials

- Fully prepared



Across clients, coaches, the CEO, and potential clients.



Meetings do not proceed without readiness.



Deadlines do not pass silently.



Follow-ups do not disappear.



You protect operational flow.





 Core Responsibilities



 1 Calendar & Readiness Enforcement



You do not just manage calendars.



You:



- Perform pre-meeting readiness checks

- Confirm prerequisites are complete

- Ensure materials are attached in advance

- Validate participant readiness

- Prevent dependency errors

- Escalate when sequencing is wrong



If a meeting is not ready, it does not proceed.



-

2 Cross-Team Coordination



You ensure:



- Coaches have what they need before sessions

- Clients receive required prep materials

- The CEO is not blindsided

- Deliverables are tracked and owned

- Commitments are visible

- Follow-ups are documented and confirmed



You are the continuity layer between tea
mbers.



You prevent dropped balls before they fall.







3 Client & Team Communication



Strong written communication is essential.



You must be able to:



- Write clear, concise updates

- Ask clarifying questions

- Confirm understanding before execution

- Document decisions accurately

- Escalate professionally without drama

- Communicate boundaries clearly



You do not assume.



You confirm.



---



4 Help Desk & Operational Support



You:



- Route tickets accurately

- Respond using existing SOPs

- Escalate policy-related issues

- Identify recurring friction patterns

- Flag documentation gaps



You protect the client experience from preventable errors.



---



 5 Execution with Verification



You:



- Follow checklists precisely

- Test links before marking tasks complete

- Verify time zones and views

- Attach proof of completion

- Complete recurring tasks without prompting



If it’s on the checklist, it gets done.



Without reminders.



---



Non-Negotiable Traits



- Strong executive function

- Exceptional follow-through

- Structured thinking

- Pattern recognition

- Calm escalation when unclear

- High personal accountability

- Clear, concise written communication

- No reassurance-seeking submissions



You do not require reminders to complete standard work.



---



 What This Role Is NOT



- Not an inbox babysitting job

- Not a creative improvisation role

- Not a “help wherever needed” assistant

- Not a reminder-dependent position

- Not a reactive firefighter role



---



KPIs



- 100% of repeat tasks completed without prompting

- 0 preventable client-facing errors

- Meetings occur only when ready

- Escalations happen before deadlines

- No “Was this done?” follow-ups required

- Clear written updates with minimal back-and-forth



---



30 / 60 / 90 Days



**30 Days**



- Master core SOPs

- Run repeat tasks independently

- Demonstrate clean written communication



**60 Days**



- Independently manage ticket flow

- Enforce readiness standards consistently

- No repeat execution errors



**90 Days**



- Fully trusted operational filter

- Prevents issues before escalation

- Ensures the CEO’s time is protected



---



Who This Is For



You likely have:



- Project management or operations coordination experience

- A track record of reliable process execution

- Comfort enforcing standards

- Pride in zero-defect work

- Strong written communication skills

- Experience managing sequencing and dependencies



You enjoy being the stabilizer in a fast-moving environment.



---



## Who Should Not Apply



- If you need reminders to follow procedures

- If you frequently miss checklist items

- If you avoid escalating unclear situations

- If you prefer improvisation over structure

- If you struggle with consistent communication



---



## Growth Path



Strong performers who demonstrate systems thinking and communication clarity may grow into broader operational responsibility over time.



Execution discipline comes first.



---



---



## To Apply



Qualified applicants are encouraged to apply as soon as possible. To express interest please submit 



a cover letter addressed to the CEO detailing why you are uniquely qualified for this role,



a resume,



and a DISC profile 



 materials to 
 with the headline OPS



Interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis. This position begins ASAP for the right candidate. 



Applications received through this platform/website will not move forward.

title: Full-Stack Developer (AI-Powered SaaS Platform)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a full-stack developer to take end-to-end ownership of a flagship client project: an AI-powered SaaS platform that uses large language models and vector-based document retrieval to automate a time-intensive business process. 



The Project



The platform has three major technical layers:



1. AI Content Generation

The system uses the OpenAI Responses API with file_search to query managed vector stores containing domain-specific knowledge. A multi-store architecture separates expert knowledge (shared across all users) from client-specific data and per-job document uploads. The AI generates detailed, contextualised responses grounded in these knowledge bases.

Key constraint: The Responses API limits file_search to two vector store IDs per call, which shapes the entire retrieval architecture.

Technologies: OpenAI Responses API, file_search tool, managed vector stores, file metadata attributes and filtering, streaming responses via SSE.



2. Document Processing and Assembly

Input documents (PDF, DOCX) are parsed using Azure Document Intelligence to extract questions, requirements, tables, and structural formatting. AI-generated content is then assembled back into the client's original document format, preserving formatting, table structures, and layout. This is the core technical challenge of the project and its key competitive differentiator.

Key challenge: Reliably placing generated content into bespoke document structures without breaking formatting ("the mapping problem"). Each input document is unique.

Technologies: Azure Document Intelligence, DOCX manipulation (programmatic Word document generation), document structure analysis.



3. SaaS Platform

A multi-tenant web application with subscription billing, user management, knowledge base management, health checks, and a members area. Standard SaaS functionality built on our established stack.

Technologies: React 18 with TypeScript, Node.js/Express.js with TypeScript, PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM, Stripe/Chargebee for subscriptions, Azure hosting.



Layer

Frontend

React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui (Radix UI), TanStack React Query v5, Wouter routing, Recharts



Backend

Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, RESTful API design



Database

PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM



AI / ML

OpenAI Responses API, file_search, managed vector stores, prompt engineering, streaming (SSE)



Document Processing

Azure Document Intelligence, programmatic DOCX generation (node docx library or equivalent), PDF parsing



Payments

Stripe and/or Chargebee (subscription management, webhooks, billing portal)



Infrastructure

Azure (App Service, storage, networking), Google Cloud Storage, CI/CD, Replit (development and prototyping)



What You Will Be Doing



Building the platform end-to-end. 

You will be the primary developer. You will receive detailed specifications and be expected to deliver production-ready code across the frontend, backend, database, and AI integration layers. You will not be waiting for someone else to build the API or design the database. You own it.

Implementing the AI content generation pipeline. Setting up vector stores, writing setup/sync scripts, building the retrieval and generation flow using the OpenAI Responses API, engineering prompts for consistent high-quality output, and optimising for cost and latency.



Solving the document mapping problem. 

Parsing input documents with Azure Document Intelligence, identifying where AI-generated content should be placed, and assembling completed documents that preserve the original formatting. This is the hardest part of the project and requires strong problem-solving ability.



Building the SaaS platform features. 

User authentication, subscription management (Stripe/Chargebee), multi-tenant knowledge base management, file uploads, health check engines, and the members area UI.



Working from specifications. 

The project has a functional scope document, an API technical specification, and a production proposal. You will be expected to read, understand, and build from these documents, raising questions or concerns where the specifications are ambiguous or incomplete.



Communicating clearly. 

You will participate in standups, provide progress updates, raise blockers early, and contribute to technical discussions. You will not be expected to communicate directly with the end client.



Requirements



Must Have

- 5+ years of professional full-stack web development with React and Node.js as your primary technologies.

- Strong TypeScript skills across both frontend and backend. You should be comfortable with type inference, generics, and type-safe ORM usage.

- PostgreSQL experience with a modern ORM (Drizzle preferred, Prisma acceptable). You should be able to design schemas, write migrations, and optimise queries.

- Experience integrating with third-party APIs, particularly RESTful APIs with authentication, webhooks, and error handling. Payment integrations (Stripe, Chargebee) are a strong plus.

- OpenAI API experience, particularly the Responses API, file_search, and vector store management. If you have not used these specifically, you should be comfortable learning new APIs quickly from documentation.

- Document processing experience: parsing PDFs or Word documents programmatically, extracting structured data from unstructured documents, or generating formatted documents from code.

- Azure experience: App Service, Azure AD B2C, Azure Document Intelligence, or Azure storage.

- SaaS platform experience: multi-tenancy patterns, subscription billing integration, role-based access control, feature gating by subscription tier.

- Ability to work autonomously from specifications. You can take a functional scope document and turn it into working software without needing hand-holding on every decision.

- Available to work Australian Eastern time zone hours. This is a remote role, but you need to be online during AEST/AEDT business hours for standups and collaboration.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



- A brief summary of your relevant experience

- Links to projects or repositories that demonstrate your full-stack and mobile work (GitHub, portfolio, live projects, or app store links)

- Confirmation that: you are OK with using screenshot capture software for time tracking; are happy with Sydney working hours; are happy working an exclusive role (that means no freelance paid or unpaid work 'on the side'); and you would be willing to undergo a live technical assessment as part of the interview process.

title: Art Director & Creative Project Manager
description:
Location: Remote, Philippines

Status: Full-time

Hourly Rate: $1,500 USD/Month

Shift: 6pm - 2 am (Manila time)



ABOUT SPARKPORTAL

At SparkPortal, we provide video content strategy and production specifically for SaaS and B2B companies. Our differentiator from other video agencies is that our business model is Video-as-a-Service. Unlike other video agencies, we work closer to the customer as their internal video team. Our clients trust our advice and follow our instructions instead of just submitting order requests. 60% of the videos we make for our clients are animation and motion graphics projects (Explainers, Promos, and Sizzles). In comparison, 40% of the videos are video editing projects (Riverside Interviews & Testimonials, Podcasts, & Webinar repurposing.)



ABOUT THE ROLE

This role will own the art direction, quality control and project management of all video projects by ensuring the creative team is providing high-quality video content for the clients. You will also be in charge of quality control, assigning tasks and moving projects along in Clickup. This role is an internal role but you will be required to meet with clients from time to time, so English communication and attention to detail are a must.



RESPONSABILITIES

Project Planning & Scoping

- Onboard new project requests from clients

- Translate video creative briefs into clear project requirements

- Develop video project plans and timelines

- Estimate resources and schedules (Designers and Animators)



Team & Resource Management

- Manage workload, capacity, and allocation across multiple projects



Communication

- Provide regular updates, gather feedback, and manage approvals.

- Collaborate with Associate Creative Director and Creative Director

- Manage expectations and resolve conflicts.

- Facilitate smooth collaboration within the team



Risk & Issue Management

- Anticipate challenges and develop mitigation strategies. (tight deadlines, resource gaps, scope creep)

- Monitor issues and escalate when necessary.

- Adjust plans proactively when challenges arise



Project Monitoring & Delivery

- Oversee daily project activities to ensure tasks stay on track.

- Track progress and ensure deadlines are met.

- Adjust schedules as needed while keeping deadlines realistic.

- Ordering VO for projects

- Review deliverables and ensure quality standards and requirements are met



Workflow and Process Optimization

- Maintain ClickUp processes and find ways to increase efficiency



Project Documentation

- Maintain up-to-date lists like project history, approved projects, and pod scorecard.



Project Wrap-Up

- Deliver final outputs to creative director

- Close out and archive projects in ClickUp and Dropbox



JOB REQUIREMENTS

- 5+ years of experience as a project Manager or similar role

- 5+ years of agency experience

- Proven art direction or project management experience in managing multiple clients simultaneously

- Understanding of creative craft with a solid ability to scope, budget, and manage strict timelines and milestones

- High-level understanding of Digital advertising and social media platforms or Branding and communications

- Familiarity with the Adobe Suite (Ps, Ai, Ae, Id) and Figma

- Interest in AI and some knowledge of the leading creative AI tools (especially Midjourney and ChatGPT)

- An organized, customer-centric, and detail-oriented approach with an account management mindset

- Excellent verbal and written English skills with the ability to present ideas and coordinate work in large international groups

- Autonomy, decisiveness, and accountability



MORE ABOUT SPARKPORTAL

SparkPortal is an innovative video content agency with a twist! We help SaaS and B2B companies develop video content for their marketing strategies. The twist? We don’t do one-off projects. We offer Video as a Service (VaaS). Our customers “subscribe” to our video development solution. We work closely with them in partnership to continually deliver world-class video content based on their need for consecutive months or years. We are a small, agile organization providing tailored, personalized experiences that delight and drive ROMI. Our customers love us, and we love them!

title: Performance Marketing Data Analyst
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a Marketing Data Analyst to take ownership of marketing, sales, and revenue data reporting and insights. This role doesn't require advanced machine learning or deep data science expertise. Instead, the focus is on transforming fragmented marketing and sales data into clear, actionable insights that leadership can use for informed decision-making.



In this position, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining a scalable data infrastructure that supports business growth, ensures data accuracy, and provides straightforward, fast, and easy-to-interpret reporting as the company evolves.



Key Responsibilities

Data Architecture & Warehousing

-Develop and maintain a central data source for marketing and revenue data, covering leads, applications, booked calls, sales (initial and recurring), and funnel events.

-Determine the appropriate storage solutions for raw and processed data (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Postgres, etc.).

-Ensure seamless integration of historical and live data.

-Manage schema changes resulting from new tools, updated exports, or changing business requirements.

-Maintain consistency, accuracy, and long-term reliability of the data.



Marketing, Sales & Revenue Analytics

-Design and maintain reports tracking funnel conversion rates (lead to application to call to sale).

-Analyze sales rep performance and call conversion rates.

-Implement and maintain revenue attribution models (e.g., first-click, last-click, blended).

-Track key growth metrics, including LTV, CAC, AOV, churn, and cohort performance.

-Monitor subscription and course metrics, such as renewals, cancellations, and billing cycles.

-Convert funnel and revenue data into actionable insights for the business.



Business Intelligence & Reporting

-Build and maintain dashboards for leadership to track on a weekly and monthly basis.

-Select and manage the business intelligence tool (e.g., Looker Studio, Metabase, Power BI, Tableau).

-Ensure reporting remains simple, fast, and reliable.

-Avoid spreadsheet sprawl and ensure robust reporting logic.



Integrations & Automation

-Design and manage data flows between marketing, sales, and revenue tools.

-Integrate platforms like CRM, checkout, scheduling, and advertising tools.

-Use native connectors, APIs, automation tools, or scheduled imports to transfer data.

-Minimize manual data handling and reduce ongoing maintenance efforts.



Required Skills

-Strong SQL proficiency, including joins, aggregations, and window functions.

-Experience with modern data warehouses.

-Practical experience with BI and dashboarding tools.

-Solid understanding of marketing funnels, attribution, subscription revenue, churn, and cohort analysis.

-Ability to manage marketing and revenue data end-to-end.

-Strong communication skills, with the ability to present insights to non-technical stakeholders.



Preferred Skills

-Experience with marketing, CRM, payment, or attribution platforms.

-Familiarity with product or event tracking tools.

-Experience designing data schemas and analytical models.

-Experience transitioning teams from spreadsheet-based reporting to centralized data systems.

-Basic scripting or Python skills for data-related tasks.



Why Join Us

This role offers the opportunity to directly influence marketing and growth strategies by bringing clarity and structure to data, enhancing decision-making across teams, and providing leadership with deeper insights into the factors driving revenue and performance.

title: Operations Specialist (ClickUp Expert)
description:

title: Google + Meta Ads VA (Lead Gen) – Corporate Headshots (NJ/NYC)
description:
Google + Meta Ads VA (Lead Gen) – Corporate Headshots (NJ/NYC)

Part-time remote | 5–10 hrs/week | $250/month (fixed) | 30-day paid trial



We’re a professional photography + video company based in New Jersey and NYC. Our primary focus is corporate headshots and personal branding. We already have a landing page and want someone to run paid ads that generate real leads and booked calls.



This role is lead generation focused. We care about qualified inquiries and bookings, not vanity metrics.



What you’ll do

• Manage Google Search Ads (high-intent keywords, match types, negatives, location targeting)

• Manage Meta 
/Instagram) campaigns for lead generation and retargeting

• Verify and maintain conversion tracking (GA4, GTM, form tracking, basic call tracking if available)

• Weekly optimizations based on cost per lead and lead quality

• Improve ad copy and give landing page feedback to increase conversion rate

• Weekly performance update (short, clear, action-based)



Time expectations

• 5–10 hours per week

• Week 1 may be closer to 8–10 hours for setup and cleanup

• After launch, typically 3–5 hours/week for ongoing optimization + reporting



What success looks like (first 30 days)

• Tracking confirmed end-to-end (forms counted correctly)

• Google Search campaigns launched with strong negatives and clean structure

• Meta retargeting running to warm audiences (site visitors + engagers)

• Cost per qualified lead improving week over week with a clear scaling plan



You must have

• Experience running Google Search Ads for service businesses

• Meta Ads experience (lead gen + retargeting)

• Understanding of match types, search terms, negatives, and basic bidding

• Ability to show proof of past work (screenshots/case notes, client names removed is fine)

• Clear communication and clean reporting



To apply (answer all)



What service business Google Search campaigns have you managed? (industry + outcome)



What monthly ad budgets have you worked with?



What was your average cost per lead, and how did you define a “qualified” lead?



How do you set up / verify tracking using GA4 + GTM + form conversions?



If we start with a $2,000/month ad budget for headshots, how would you split it between Google and Meta and why?



List 10 negative keywords you would add for “corporate headshots” to avoid low-intent leads.



Share screenshots or a short case study if available (remove client info).



Only applicants who answer all questions will be considered.

Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.



Our main headquarters is located in Garden Grove, California.



About the Role:



We are seeking a versatile Video Editor skilled in producing both long-form content (YouTube

faceless videos, luxury watch tour videos) and short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels,

YouTube Shorts). You will transform raw footage into polished, engaging videos optimized for

each platform while maintaining consistent branding, pacing, and storytelling quality.



Key Responsibilities:



Editing & Post-Production

- Edit long-form videos for YouTube, including faceless content and high-quality luxury

watch tour videos.

- Create short-form videos such as TikToks, Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other social clips.

- Repurpose long-form videos into short, engaging bite-sized content.

- Add motion graphics, subtitles, transitions, animations, SFX, and music.

- Perform color correction, grading, audio clean-up, and overall quality refinement.

Creative & Strategy

- Collaborate with creative leads to understand briefs, objectives, and desired outcomes.

- Craft compelling narratives, pacing, and visual storytelling across all formats.

- Optimize content for platform-specific best practices (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,

, etc.).

- Contribute creative ideas for content themes, visual direction, and storytelling approach.

Workflow & Asset Management

- Organize and maintain all media assets, project files, and working libraries.

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet tight deadlines.

- Export and deliver videos in various formats, resolutions, and aspect ratios depending on

platform needs.



Requirements:



- Proven experience editing both long-form and short-form content (portfolio or demo reel

required).

- Proficiency in at least one major editing software: Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro,

DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects.

- Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, rhythm, and audience retention strategies.

- Experience creating platform-optimized content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels,

and Shorts.

- Ability to maintain consistent branding and visual style across various content types.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

- Comfortable using AI tools for editing and content generation

- Thumbnail creation and basic graphic design



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with motion graphics and basic animation.

- Understanding of content analytics, audience retention data, and platform algorithms.



To apply, send the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here - 
/disc-personality-test/ - Please send a link to your results.

2. Your personality test - Take it here - 
/free-personality-test - Please send a link to your results.

3. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.

4. Typing Test - Take this typing test (30 seconds): 





5. A video or videos that answer the following. Feel free to give as much information and context as possible. Also please make sure that, when you submit the video(s) links, they are in public, viewable format.



a. Tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. What are your career/life goals and in what amount of time?
