title: AI Systems Architect / Automation Lead (TCR Prototype Build)
description:
About the Role



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role to build the first working prototype of TCR, an AI-driven property operations platform.



This is not a research role.

This is not a strategy-only role.

This is not a “play with AI tools” role.



Your job is to design, build, and ship systems that remove human labour in property management workflows.



If you do not ship working systems, this role will not continue.



?



Core Responsibilities

 • Design and build AI-driven workflows for:

 • Tenant communications

 • Maintenance triage

 • Guided inspections (self-service)

 • Admin and compliance preparation

 • Integrate AI models (OpenAI or equivalent) into real operational flows

 • Build automations using tools such as Make, Zapier, APIs, and databases

 • Connect systems to CRMs, spreadsheets, and internal tools

 • Deliver weekly working demos

 • Continuously reduce manual human steps

 • Document systems clearly for replication and scale



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Manual processes are replaced with automated workflows

 • Human time per property is measurably reduced

 • Systems run without constant oversight

 • MVP features are live, testable, and improving weekly

 • Problems are solved with systems, not workarounds



?



What This Role Is Not

 • Not training AI models from scratch

 • Not building dashboards for presentation only

 • Not attending unnecessary meetings

 • Not writing long strategy documents

 • Not custom-building edge cases



If it does not remove labour, it does not ship.



?



Required Experience

 • Proven experience building automation systems

 • Hands-on use of AI / LLM APIs

 • Experience with automation platforms (Make preferred, Zapier acceptable)

 • Experience integrating CRMs, databases, or APIs

 • Strong systems thinking and problem-solving ability

 • Ability to work independently and deliver without hand-holding



?



Nice to Have (Not Required)

 • Experience in property, real estate, or operational businesses

 • GoHighLevel experience

 • Startup or MVP build experience

 • Basic front-end or scripting skills



?



Working Style

 • Output-driven, not hours-driven

 • Minimal meetings, maximum delivery

 • Clear rules and workflows

 • No exceptions without justification



This is a boring execution role with very high leverage.



?



How to Apply



Send:

 1. A short introduction (maximum five sentences)

 2. One or two examples of systems you have built

 3. Tools you have actually used

 4. One example where automation replaced manual work



No essays. No hype. Proof only.

title: Content Producer & Social Media Manager - Full Time Role
description:
Brand: ThisIsDulan

Employment Type: Full-Time (Remote Preferred)

Reports To: Founder (Dulan)



About the Brand



The Founder lives in Melbourne Australia

ThisIsDulan is a growing food and lifestyle media brand built around Sri Lankan cuisine, storytelling, and entrepreneurship. Led by a MasterChef Australia contestant and founder of a successful construction company, the brand combines authentic cooking, cultural storytelling, and real-life business experiences.



Our goal is to grow into a global digital media brand across YouTube, Instagram TikTok and Pinterest while building monetisation through digital products, brand partnerships, and online education.



We are looking for a highly organised and creative Content Producer to run the day-to-day content engine. Someone who will grow with this brand and work with us long term creating this a successful career. 



Role Summary



You will be responsible for managing the full lifecycle of content:



Idea ? Script ? Edit ? Publish ? Grow ? Monetise



Your role is to turn weekly filming sessions into high-quality content distributed across multiple platforms while continuously improving performance using trends and analytics.



This role is part creative, part strategist, and part operator.



Key Responsibilities - 



1) Content Strategy & Research



- Research weekly social media trends (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



- Develop content ideas aligned with brand pillars



- Create weekly content calendar



- Write hooks, captions, and video outlines



- Identify viral formats suitable for food content



2) Video Editing & Production



- Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)



- Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–12 minutes)



- Add subtitles, sound effects, and pacing for retention



- Select strong hooks within first 3 seconds



- Create engaging thumbnails for YouTube



3) Publishing & Platform Management

Schedule and publish content across:



- YouTube



- Instagram



- TikTok



- Pinterest



- Optimise titles, hashtags, and descriptions



- Maintain posting consistency



- Repurpose content across platforms



4) Graphic & Digital Asset Creation



- Design recipe cards and carousel posts



- Create social media graphics



- Develop downloadable recipe PDFs



- Maintain brand visual consistency



5) Growth & Analytics



- Track weekly performance metrics



- Identify top-performing content patterns



- Recommend improvements based on analytics



- Test new content formats regularly



6) Monetisation Support



Assist with:



- YouTube monetisation optimisation



- Affiliate link setup



- Digital product preparation



- Brand partnership outreach materials



Workflow Structure - 



- Founder films cooking content once per week.



- You transform footage into 15–25 pieces of content weekly.



- You manage publishing and optimisation.



Required Skills

Must Have;



- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut)



- Experience editing short-form content



- Understanding of TikTok & Reels pacing



- Good English writing skills



- Ability to work independently



- Strong organisation and deadline management



Highly Preferred; 



- Experience with food or lifestyle creators



- YouTube SEO knowledge



- Thumbnail design experience



- Canva or Adobe design skills



- Understanding of storytelling editing



Personal Qualities We Value;



- Creative thinker



- Detail oriented



- Proactive (suggests ideas without waiting)



- Passion for food & storytelling



- Growth mindset



- Long-term team player



Success Metrics (First 3 Months)



You will be successful if:



- Consistent posting schedule achieved



- YouTube channel launched and growing



- Engagement rate improves



- Content output reaches 15–25 posts/week



- Audience growth trend established



Remuneration Opportunities - 

The long term successful manager will benefit from growth of this business, will be offered a performance based bonuses after probationary period along with a strong salary



Performance bonuses available based on channel growth.

Working Structure



- Full-time role



- Weekly planning meeting with founder



- Long-term growth opportunity



Growth Opportunity

This role will evolve into:



- Head of Content / Media Manager as the brand scales.



You will help build a global food media brand from the ground up.





Application Requirements- 

Please include:



- Portfolio of edited videos (REQUIRED)



- 3 social media accounts you admire and why



- Example short-form edit you have created



- Tools/software you use



- Internet speed and equipment details



- Please only apply if you have genuine willingness to be with a company for a long time and you are willing to put your 100?fort into this role. 



- Please don't apply if you are looking to freelance to other people while working on this job full time.

title: Performance Video Editor & Ad Designer (Paid Media)
description:
We’re LeadSense.



We generate high-intent consumer leads at scale across insurance, financial services and home services in the UK and North America, working with some of the largest buyers in each market.



We are hiring a Performance Video Editor & Ad Designer to support our paid media team with high-volume ad production.



This is not a branding role. This is a performance-driven role. Speed, structured variation and execution discipline matter more than artistic perfection.



Fully remote. Strong English required.



The Role



You will work closely with media buyers and leadership to produce video and image ads for Meta, YouTube and Native campaigns.



Your job is to ensure creative production never becomes a bottleneck.



You will receive:

• Scripts

• Hooks and angles

• Examples of winning ads

• Clear briefs



Your responsibility is to turn those into structured, high-volume variations quickly.



 What You’ll Do



• Edit short-form performance video ads (15–60 seconds)

• Create multiple variations from one concept (hooks, captions, CTA changes)

• Design static image ads for testing different angles

• Format creatives for multiple placements (feed, stories, reels, native)

• Add subtitles, captions and simple motion graphics

• Use templates to increase speed and consistency

• Use AI tools where appropriate to improve production efficiency

• Organise creative assets clearly for testing



What We’re Looking For



You think in terms of testing, angles and conversion — not just aesthetics.



• 2+ years experience editing paid media ads

• Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, After Effects or similar)

• Comfortable creating static ad creatives (Canva, Photoshop or similar)

• Able to produce high volumes of variations efficiently

• Strong English comprehension

• Reliable communication and fast turnaround



Nice to have:

Direct response experience · UGC-style editing · Experience in lead generation · Familiarity with AI editing tools



What Success Looks Like



• Media buyers always have fresh creative variations to test

• Creative production is fast and structured

• Testing velocity increases

• Turnaround time is measured in hours, not days

• Creative is organised and easy to deploy



Hiring Process



 1. Apply with answers to the screening questions below

 2. Paid test task (2–3 hours)

 3. 30-minute interview

 4. Trial period

 5. Long-term collaboration if it’s a fit



If you understand that ads are built to convert — not to impress — we’d like to hear from you.



Screening Questions



1. Please share a link to your portfolio or examples of performance videos and image ads you have created.



2. Briefly describe your process for creating ad creatives and the main tools you use (including any AI tools).



3. What is the minimum number of hours per week you would require to commit to a long-term collaboration with us?

title: Amazon Account Manager / Operations Manager
description:
Are you a strategic, data-driven brand builder with a passion for Amazon?

We are a fast-growing Amazon private label brand looking for a full-time Amazon Account Manager to take ownership of our product development pipeline, listing optimization, and brand positioning.



You’ll play a key leadership role in launching products, optimizing conversion rates, and developing a strong, consistent brand presence. This is a long-term opportunity with potential for growth in a collaborative, performance-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Accountability & Ownership

-Lead and maintain a robust product development pipeline (from idea to launch)

-Optimize product listings for maximum visibility and conversions

-Manage all branding, positioning, and messaging efforts

-Implement CRO strategies and run continuous A/B tests

-Coordinate freelancers (designers, photographers, content creators)

-Monitor and improve brand health metrics: rankings, reviews, CTR, CR, etc.



Daily & Weekly Tasks

-Research product trends and discover new product ideas

-Analyze competitors for differentiation and CRO opportunities

-Track performance: sessions, conversion rates, sales rank

-Collaborate with supply chain, PPC, and creative teams to align launch and inventory strategies



Long-Term Projects & Goals

-Build a consistent and strategic brand identity across all customer touchpoints

-Establish a repeatable, scalable system for product launches

-Increase customer loyalty and retention through compelling branding and messaging



 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

KPI 1: Product Development Pipeline

Objective: Develop and maintain a validated pipeline of launch-ready products

Metrics: 

-Number of product ideas researched and validated monthly

-Number of products launched per quarter

-First 90-day sales & review performance



Actions:

-Run research & validation using Helium 10 and market analysis

-Coordinate with suppliers, creatives, and PPC

-Maintain and update Product Pipeline Tracker



KPI 2: Conversion Rate Optimization

Objective: Improve listing performance through CRO strategies

Metric: Conversion Rate (%) from Amazon Business Reports

Actions:

-Optimize listings, copy, and A+ content

-Improve visuals and run split tests

-Monitor and iterate based on data and performance feedback



 Qualifications & Skills

Required:

-3+ years of experience managing private label brands on Amazon

-Proven success with multiple product launches

-Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and the Amazon algorithm

-Expertise in Helium 10, keyword research, and listing optimization

-Skilled in briefing and coordinating designers and content teams

-Familiarity with A+ content, storefront management, and conversion tracking



Preferred:

-Background in marketing, branding, or e-commerce growth strategy

-Knowledge of CRO tools and testing platforms (e.g., ManageByStats, Splitly)

-Experience using tools like Asana, Notion, or Trello for project management

-Awareness of PPC’s influence on organic ranking



 Soft Skills:

-High attention to detail and ownership mentality

-Strong marketing sense and customer-centric thinking

-Excellent written and verbal English communication

-Organized, self-driven, and proactive

-Analytical mindset – able to turn data into decisions



 What We Offer

-Competitive rates

-Fully remote, flexible working hours

-Bi-weekly payments and performance reviews

-Long-term role with growth potential

-Paid leave and additional benefits after 6 months (SSS, Pag-ibig, health insurance)

-Supportive team culture with room for innovation and contribution

-Training resources and personal development opportunities



 How to Apply:

1. Include in subject line: “[Your Favorite Book] - Amazon Brand Manager Application”

2. Attach your updated resume

3. Include a short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and describing your:

-Experience with Amazon product research

-Tools you’ve used and how you used them

-One product you’ve helped launch and what made it successful

4. Complete the internet speed test from speedtest.net and attach a screenshot

5. Attach a screenshot with your computer specs.



Why Join Us?

This is more than just a brand management job. It’s an opportunity to lead, build, and scale something meaningful. If you’re driven by impact, autonomy, and a clear path to success, we’d love to meet you.

title: Amazon Account / Brand Operations Manager (Private Label)
description:
Are you a strategic, data-driven Amazon operator with a passion for optimization and brand growth?

We are a fast-growing Amazon private label brand seeking a full-time Amazon Account / Brand Operations Manager to oversee our listing performance, conversion optimization, and brand presence on Amazon.



You’ll play a key leadership role in improving conversion rates, maintaining a strong brand identity, and driving account health through data-backed decisions. This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential in a collaborative, performance-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

Accountability & Ownership

Own and optimize Amazon listings for maximum visibility and conversions

Manage brand positioning, messaging, and consistency across listings, A+ content, and storefront

Implement CRO strategies and coordinate ongoing A/B tests

Coordinate freelancers and vendors (designers, photographers, copywriters, content creators)

Monitor and improve brand health metrics: rankings, reviews, CTR, CR, Buy Box, etc.

Ensure Amazon account hygiene: compliance, suppressed listings, variations, flat files (as needed), category attributes, and policy adherence



Daily & Weekly Tasks

Perform ongoing listing audits and implement improvements (titles, bullets, images, backend, A+, attributes)

Analyze competitors for positioning and conversion opportunities (without product scouting)

Track performance: sessions, conversion rate, CTR, sales rank, review velocity, return rate

Collaborate with PPC, supply chain, and creative teams to align:

Listing updates with ad strategy

Inventory levels with promo and demand forecasts

Creative needs with conversion goals

Manage reporting and ensure action items are executed consistently



Long-Term Projects & Goals

Build a consistent, strategic brand identity across all customer touchpoints on Amazon

Create a repeatable system for ongoing listing improvement and CRO

Improve customer loyalty and retention through stronger messaging, brand voice, and content

Develop SOPs for listing updates, creative briefs, review management, and performance reporting



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

KPI 1: Listing Quality & Organic Performance

Objective: Improve listing visibility and discoverability through optimization



Metrics:

Keyword indexing coverage + organic rank improvements

CTR improvements (Search + ads-supported)

Reduction in suppressed/invalid attributes and listing issues

Actions:

Run keyword research and update listings using Helium 10 + market analysis

Maintain listing audit checklist and optimization tracker

Monitor indexing, rank trends, and category attribute completeness



KPI 2: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Objective: Improve conversion rate through data-backed iteration

Metric: Conversion Rate (%) from Amazon Business Reports

Actions:

Optimize copy, images, A+ content, and brand story

Run split tests where possible (ManageByStats, Splitly, Experiments, or equivalent)

Monitor behavior signals (CTR, CVR, returns, reviews) and iterate



KPI 3: Brand Health & Customer Trust

Objective: Improve brand reputation and customer experience

Metrics:

Review rating + review velocity

Return rate trends and top return reasons

Q&A hygiene and listing clarity improvements

Actions:

Review monitoring + recurring issue reporting

Coordinate content updates to address objections/returns

Strengthen product education via visuals + A+ modules

Qualifications & Skills



Required

3+ years managing private label brands on Amazon (account management / listing optimization

Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and algorithm fundamentals

Strong experience with Helium 10, keyword research, and listing optimization

Proven ability to brief and coordinate creatives (designers, copywriters, photographers)

Familiarity with A+ content, storefront management, and conversion tracking

Strong operational discipline: can manage tasks, trackers, and deadlines without hand-holding



Preferred

Background in marketing, branding, or e-commerce growth strategy

Experience with CRO/testing platforms (e.g., ManageByStats, Splitly, Amazon Experiments)

Experience using Asana, Notion, or Trello for project management

Understanding of PPC’s relationship to CTR/CVR and organic rank (coordination-level, not necessarily hands-on media buying)



Soft Skills

Ownership mentality and high attention to detail

Strong marketing instincts and customer-centric thinking

Excellent written and verbal English communication

Organized, proactive, and reliable

Analytical mindset — able to turn data into decisions



What We Offer

Competitive rates

Fully remote

Bi-weekly payments and performance reviews

Long-term role with growth potential

Paid leave and additional benefits after 6 months (SSS, Pag-ibig, health insurance)

Supportive team culture with room for innovation and contribution

Training resources and personal development opportunities



How to Apply

Include in subject line: “[Your Favorite Book] - Amazon Account / Brand Manager Application”

Attach your updated resume

Include a short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and describing your:

Experience optimizing Amazon listings and improving conversion rates

Tools you’ve used and how you used them

A specific listing improvement you made and the result (CTR/CVR/rank/reviews)

Complete the internet speed test from speedtest.net and attach a screenshot

Attach a screenshot with your computer specs



Why Join Us?

This is more than just account management. It’s an opportunity to take ownership of Amazon performance, strengthen a real brand, and build systems that scale. If you’re driven by impact, autonomy, and measurable outcomes, we’d love to meet you.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Expert (E-commerce Growth Specialist)
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking for a high-level Klaviyo Specialist to take full ownership of our
 and SMS channels. We don't just want someone to "schedule campaigns" we want a strategist who understands segmentation, retention, and how to turn a list into a profit-generating machine.



Your role will be central to our customer lifetime value (LTV).



Key Responsibilities

Flow Optimization: Audit, build, and optimize core Klaviyo flows (Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Win-back, Sunset flows).



Campaign Management: Plan and execute 3–5 high-converting weekly campaigns, including design, copy, and technical setup.



Advanced Segmentation: Move beyond "batch and blast." Create segments based on buying behavior, engagement, and predictive analytics.



A/B Testing: Constantly test subject lines, layouts, and send times to improve Open Rates and CTR.



Reporting: Track and report on key metrics (Klaviyo-attributed revenue, Deliverability, Unsubscribe rates) every week.



List Hygiene: Maintain high deliverability by managing list health and suppressing unengaged profiles.



Requirements

Proven Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience managing Klaviyo for successful Shopify brands.



Portfolio: Ability to show examples of
 designs and case studies of revenue growth you’ve driven.



Analytical Mind: You enjoy looking at the data to see what’s working and what isn't.



Copywriting Skills: You can write compelling, brand-aligned copy that converts.



Technical Savvy: Deep understanding of Shopify integrations and Klaviyo’s advanced features.



Attention to Detail: "Good enough" isn't in your vocabulary.



What We Offer

Competitive salary (paid on time, every time).



Long-term stability with a brand that is scaling aggressively.



Performance-based bonuses (We win, you win).



Flexible, 100% remote work environment.



How to Apply..

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please follow these steps:



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am your Klaviyo Growth Partner"



Include a link to your portfolio or 3 screenshots of your best-performing Klaviyo flows/campaigns.



Tell us about one specific campaign you ran that resulted in a significant ROI.

title: Full-Stack Laravel Developer (Process-Driven & Proactive)
description:
Company: RH Elite Services Limited – Award-Winning UK Digital Marketing Agency

Work Schedule: Full-Time (8 hours/day), Monday – Friday

Start Date: Immediate



We are an award-winning digital marketing agency based in the UK, specialising in high-end custom websites and complex web applications. Most of our projects are built on the Laravel framework, and we are looking for a developer who treats coding as a craft, not just a task.



We need someone who doesn't just wait for instructions but has the initiative to suggest better UI/UX flows and help us optimise our internal development processes.





To be successful in this role, you must be highly proficient in:



- PHP & Laravel: Deep understanding of the framework is non-negotiable.

- Server Management: Experienced with Digital Ocean managed via Laravel Forge.

- Infrastructure: Confident using Cloudflare and Amazon AWS / SES.

- Version Control: Expert use of GitHub (Clean commits, branching, PRs).

- Frontend: A strong eye for website flow, design, and usability.



What We Are Looking For:



- Communication: You must have excellent written and spoken English. You’ll be part of a collaborative team where clarity is key.

- The "Process" Mindset: We want someone who looks at how we work and asks, "Can we make this more efficient?"

- Initiative: If a design looks "off" or a user flow feels clunky, we expect you to speak up and offer solutions.

- Reliability: This is a full-time, long-term commitment. You must be available for 8 hours a day (working hours will be discussed to find a balance between UK time and your local time).





We value your time and ours. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Paid Trial. You will be given a series of tasks designed to test your technical skills, your logic, and how well you fit into our agency's workflow.





We receive a lot of applications, and we only want to work with people who have great attention to detail. To prove you’ve read this:



- Start your application message with the words: "Laravel is my Craft."

- Briefly mention one specific Laravel feature or package you love using and why.

- Include a link to your GitHub profile or a portfolio of Laravel projects.

- Applications that do not follow these three steps will be ignored.





We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Sales
description:
IEVA is Hiring: Sales Closer (Philippines)

We’re looking for a strong closer who delivers results, hits KPIs, and thrives in a fast?moving, global environment.

At IEVA, we work with students and professionals across 20+ countries — and we need someone who can match our pace, energy, and standards. This role is for someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do. You move, you follow up, you close.



What You’ll Do

- Convert warm leads into paid clients

- Hit and exceed monthly KPIs

- Follow structured sales scripts and closing frameworks

- Create smart, strategic follow?ups that drive urgency

- Manage conversations across WhatsApp, Messenger, and calls

- Maintain clean, accurate notes and updates

- Work closely with our global team to improve conversion rates



Who We’re Looking For

- A strong closer with proven sales experience

- KPI?driven and competitive

- Fast responder — minutes, not hours

- Confident English communication

- Creative in messaging, follow?ups, and objection handling

- Comfortable asking for payment and securing commitment

- Thrives under pressure and targets

- Experience in BPO sales, real estate, insurance, or education is a big advantage



What You Get

- Competitive base salary

- High commissions for every closed client

- Work with an international team

- Clear KPIs, clear expectations, and fast growth opportunities

- A role where performance is rewarded — not seniority



If you believe you’re the right person for this role, tell us why you should be selected and attach your updated resume. We want to hear what makes you a strong closer and how you’ve achieved your KPIs in the past.

title: Experienced Vehicle Graphic Designer (Full-Time – Remote)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing UK-based company specialising in pre-cut vehicle sign writing kits and magnetic signs. We design professional vehicle graphics for trades businesses across the UK.



We are expanding our remote design team and are looking for an experienced vehicle graphic designer who understands layout, alignment and print-ready production.



This is not a beginner role.



What You Will Be Doing



Designing vehicle graphics using provided vehicle templates



Creating clean, bold layouts for vans and commercial vehicles



Preparing print-ready artwork (AI / EPS / PDF)



Following structured design briefs



Working to daily output targets



Making revisions quickly and accurately



Essential Requirements



You must:



Have proven experience designing vehicle graphics



Be highly skilled in Adobe Illustrator (expert level)



Understand bleed, panel tolerances and safe zones



Be able to work with vehicle templates accurately



Have strong typography and layout skills



Have fast turnaround times



Have reliable internet and availability for full-time hours



Important



You will be required to complete a paid test task before hiring.



This will involve designing a vehicle layout using one of our templates to assess:



Alignment accuracy



Layout strength



Attention to detail



Speed



Applications without a portfolio showing vehicle designs will not be considered.



To Apply



Please send:





Your expected monthly salary (full-time)



The word “PRE-CUT” at the top of your application (to show you read this fully)

title: High-Converting Video Editor (E-com & Dropshipping VSL Specialist)
description:
We are an aggressive e-commerce brand on a trajectory to massive scale. We don’t want "cinematic" wedding editors; we want growth-minded storytellers who know how to stop the scroll and print money.



You will be responsible for taking raw footage, UGC, and stock assets and turning them into high-converting VSLs  and social media ads (FB/IG/TikTok) that maintain a high ROAS.





VSL Production: Editing long-form and short-form Video Sales Letters that follow direct-response frameworks (Problem > Agitation > Solution > CTA).



Direct Response Design: Adding high-quality captions, progress bars, call-outs, and pattern interrupts to keep viewers engaged.



Rapid Iteration: Taking winning ads and creating 5–10 "variations" (different hooks/CTAs) for A/B testing.



Sound Design: Using trending audio, SFX (whooshes, dings, transitions), and professional leveling to drive emotional impact.



Required Skills & Experience

Portfolio is Everything: You MUST have a proven track record of editing ads for Shopify, Dropshipping, or E-com brands.





Speed: Ability to turn around high-quality edits within 24–48 hours.



Communication: Ability to take creative direction and feedback without ego.



What’s In It For You?

Competitive Salary



Performance Bonuses: When our ads kill it, you get a piece of the pie.



Growth: Work directly with a founding team obsessed with scaling to 9 and 10 figures.



Remote Freedom: 100% work-from-home.



How To Apply (Read Carefully)

To filter out automated bots and "copy-paste" applicants, we only review candidates who do the following:



Subject Line: Change it to: "I Edit Ads That Sell - [Your Name]"



The Portfolio: Send a link to a folder or reel specifically showcasing E-com Ads or VSLs. (Do not send wedding videos or gaming montages).



The Test: Tell us your favorite "Hook" strategy for a product that solves a common problem.



Tools: List your PC/Mac specs and your internet speed.

title: Operations Manager  (Office-based in Clark)
description:
Role: Operations Manager - Office-Based (Clark Freeport Zone / Pampanga) 

Industry:   Recruitment Process Outsourcing

Salary Range: ?45,000 – ?70,000 monthly

Initial Interview Format: Remote (ASAP) 

Start Date: As soon as we find our rockstar



ABOUT US: Empowering Talent. Bridging Borders.



We are a recruitment/placement agency connecting elite offshore experts in the Philippines with top-tier UK businesses. We don't just recruit, we create opportunities. By bridging the gap between world-class Filipino professionals and UK clients, we help unlock careers, growth, and financial freedom.



THE ROLE: Are you a total legend?



We are looking for a highly motivated, ambitious, and flexible Operations Manager to be the operational heartbeat of our Clark Talent Hub. Working directly with the founder, you will ensure that our "engine" runs flawlessly. You will help manage our clients and a growing pipeline of opportunities.

You aren't just managing an office; you are the guardian of our core metrics: maintaining our strong Client Retention Rate. If you thrive in a high-stakes environment and love using AI to hack processes and chase great results, this is your stage.



WHY JOIN US? (The Perks & Culture)



We aren’t just looking for an employee; we are looking for a top-level, ambitious operator to join our exciting journey. 

To support your success, we offer:



-A Dynamic Environment: Forget the corporate grind. You’ll be working in a fast-paced, high-autonomy setting where your ideas are implemented in real-time.



-Premium Office Culture: We believe in rewarding hard work. Enjoy regular team lunches, a modern workspace in Clark, and an environment that celebrates every win.



-Direct Mentorship: You’ll work side-by-side with our founder, giving you a front-row seat to high-level UK business strategy and scaling operations.



KEY TASKS & RESPONSIBILITIES



*Dedicated Account Management: Act as the ultimate Customer Success champion. You will ensure seamless integration for UK clients, run regular performance reviews, and track performance metrics to guarantee our clients see measurable ROI.



*Operations & Strict Compliance: Navigate our roadmap to scaling by ensuring the Clark office runs perfectly. You will maintain 100% compliance with all government and EOR guidelines.



*Leadership Support: Support the founder and the team in their respective departments, removing operational bottlenecks so they can focus on high-level UK growth and strategy.



*AI & Process Innovation: We want someone keen to learn. You will brainstorm and implement AI-driven initiatives to make our sourcing, vetting, and daily operations faster and smarter.



*Execute the Master Plan: You are the bridge between the founders’ high-level vision and daily reality. You will take our quarterly goals and break them down into weekly, non-negotiable micro-targets for the entire team.



*Roadblock Removal: Anticipate operational bottlenecks before they happen. If a client’s 14-day deployment is at risk, or a lead-gen campaign is failing, you step in, diagnose the root cause, and deploy a fix immediately.



*Systemizing for Scale (The company Playbook). Build and document the "company Playbook." You will create strict Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for every single task in the company. Your goal is to build a system so robust that as we scale from 4 employees to 40, our quality never drops.



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



**The Essentials:

-Background: Minimum FIVE years of proven experience in a high-level BPO, Recruitment, or Outsourcing management role. You must know standard business practices inside and out.

-Communication: Exceptional, high-level English communication skills. You will be dealing directly with UK business owners and presenting them with world-class solutions.

-Project Management: Strong PM experience. You know how to track tasks, manage a team's workload, and hit strict deadlines.

-Tech-Forward: A strong willingness to use AI in a lot of processes for improvement and success.

-Extreme Ownership: You don't make excuses. If a client is unhappy or a lead-gen campaign fails, you own the problem and fix it.

-Speed is a Feature: We move fast. We prefer a good plan executed violently today over a perfect plan executed next week.

-Client Obsession: Our UK clients trust us to build their teams. We treat their business growth as if it were our own.

-Radical Collaboration: You are a high-impact team player who thrives on collective wins. You proactively remove operational bottlenecks to support your colleagues and ensure the entire team hits our weekly non-negotiable micro-targets



**The Mindset:

-You have an elite work ethic and the right attitude. You leave your ego at the door.

-You are highly resilient and capable of pursuing our scaling plans despite the usual startup hurdles.

-Familiarity with lead generation tools, ATS platforms, and project management software (like ClickUp).



**What Success Looks Like: Your First 90 Days

-Day 30: You have fully set up SOPs, taken over the daily management of the Accounts (clients), and completely understand our 14-day deployment pipeline.



-Day 60: You have successfully implemented at least two new  AI/automation tools that save the team time, and the founder have been completely removed from day-to-day operational firefighting.



-Day 90: You are fully driving the ship. You are independently running the weekly accountability meetings, our 98% client retention rate is holding strong, and we are seamlessly hitting our scale

Success Indicators (How you win in Year 1)



-Retention: Keeping our good Client Retention Rate through flawless Account and Customer Success Management.

-Growth: Successfully navigating our operational roadmap so our founder and the team can scale the company's UK client base.

-Compliance: Keeping us 100% compliant with all government regulations.



THE PROFILE: Are you the missing piece?



While you must be a "black belt" in systems and operations, your personality is just as important. We are specifically looking for an extrovert—someone who brings high energy to the office, enjoys engaging with the team, and possesses the social confidence to manage high-level UK client relationships. If you’re a "people person" who happens to be obsessed with spreadsheets and SOPs, you’ll fit right in.



WORKING ARRANGEMENT:

Set-up: 100% Office-Based in Clark.

Environment: A high-autonomy, high-accountability environment built on trust and performance.



HOW TO APPLY:  Please fill out this form: 
 

Please apply ONLY if you are 100% confident you are qualified.



We look forward to meeting you!

title: Full-Time Video & Image Editor — Affirmations & Manifestation App Content (Remote)
description:
We are the founders of Queenli, a women’s affirmations and manifestation app — and we need a full-time editor who can create scroll-stopping content for TikTok and Instagram. Our audience is women aged 18–35 who are into self-worth, glow-ups, manifestation, and “that girl” energy.



Compensation:

$1,000 – $1,500/month starting

Can climb to $2,000+/month as we grow and you prove yourself



What You’ll Edit:

You’ll be producing a mix of  ~50% video and ~50% slideshow/image content across multiple TikTok and Instagram accounts.



Videos:

UGC-style videos (talking to camera, lifestyle clips)

UGC variation/remix edits

B-roll motivation and aesthetic edits (“that girl” lifestyle, glow-up energy)

Fast-cut affirmation and manifestation edits

App demo videos (screen recordings + real footage) — coming soon after launch



Images / Slideshows:

Text overlay slideshows (affirmation quotes, manifestation prompts, self-worth content)

AI-generated image slideshows with viral text overlays (dream life / glow-up aesthetic)

UGC carousels



Requirements:

Full-time availability

Proficient in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or equivalent

Comfortable using AI tools for content creation (image generation, script writing, etc.)

Strong understanding of TikTok and Instagram content trends — especially in the self-improvement, manifestation, and feminine wellness space

Can match reference styles quickly and replicate winning formats

Fast turnaround, consistent quality, high volume

Portfolio showing short-form social content (especially in wellness, self-help, lifestyle, or similar niches)



Nice to Have:

Experience editing content in the affirmations, manifestation, or self-improvement niche

Familiarity with AI image generation tools (e.g., Midjourney, NanoBanana, DALL-E)

Understanding of what makes content feel native to TikTok (not polished, not corporate — raw, real, relatable)



To Apply:

You must send your portfolio or examples of similar work (UGC edits, slideshows, short-form social content). Failure to share your portfolio will result in immediate rejection.



If we like your portfolio, you’ll move to a test task where you’ll create:

- Two B-roll style video edits (affirmation / manifestation theme)

- A text overlay slideshow (self-worth or glow-up topic)

- An AI-generated UGC style image (AI generated female) slideshow with viral text overlays



We’ll only provide inspiration accounts. The test should take around 48–72 hours max.

title: Fan Community Manager – Leroy Sanchez (Social Media & Fandom Activation)
description:
We are looking for a Fan Community Manager who is already familiar with Leroy Sanchez and his music to help grow and activate his global fan community online.



Leroy has a passionate fanbase around the world, and we are looking for someone who understands that fan engagement is built through community, interaction, and creativity — not just posting content.



This role focuses on activating fans, encouraging participation, and helping fan content spread organically across social media platforms.





Responsibilities



• Engage with Leroy Sanchez fan communities across social media (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube, etc.)

• Identify and connect with active fan accounts and fan community leaders

• Encourage fan-generated content (edits, covers, reactions, etc.)

• Help organize fan activities such as listening parties, hashtag campaigns, and online fan events

• Monitor trends and conversations within Leroy’s fandom

• Support the growth of organic engagement around new releases and content

• Share insights about fan behavior and trending content





Requirements



• Must already be familiar with Leroy Sanchez and his music

• Active on social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube)

• Strong understanding of how online fan communities work

• Fluent in English and with a plus if speaking Spanish too. Not fully required. 

• Passionate about music and digital culture

• Organized, proactive, and creative





Bonus if you:



• Have previously managed or participated in fan communities

• Have experience running fan accounts or community pages

• Understand music release cycles and online fan engagement





Position Details



• Remote position

• Part-time

• Flexible schedule

• Long-term opportunity with potential to grow





What We’re Looking For



Someone who:



• Truly understands Leroy’s audience

• Knows how to activate fans organically

• Enjoys interacting with communities online

• Can help turn listeners into engaged fans





To Apply



Please include:

1) Why you are a fan of Leroy Sanchez

2) Your experience with social media or fan communities. K-Pop fan community management is a plus. 

3) Links to any accounts or communities you manage



Thank you!

title: AI Video Generation Content (Youtube) Long Form!
description:
We’re looking for a skilled AI Video Creator who can produce AI-generated videos that tell a story based on a provided script. This role focuses on creating cinematic visuals, character scenes, and trailer-style sequences using modern AI tools—especially Higgsfield.



Responsibilities



Create story-driven AI-generated videos from scripts (cinematic/trailer style preferred)



Write strong, detailed prompts for generating images and video clips



Maintain visual consistency (characters, style, mood, scenes)



Assemble clips into a polished final output (basic editing is a plus)



Required Skills



Proven experience with AI video generation tools, especially Higgsfield



Strong prompt engineering skills for images + video



Fluent English (reading and writing)



Strong storytelling sense and attention to detail

title: Amazon Brand Manager for Boba Brand
description:
About Boba

Over 2.5 million babies have been worn in our carriers. The original design of the wrap has not changed in 15 years— proof of a great concept. When we see a parent wearing their babe in one of our carriers, we know that Boba has helped forge a little link that brings two hearts together. Today, Boba has grown from a small, family-run, shoestring operation to a global team dedicated to bringing that magical bond from our families to yours.



About the role

This is a great opportunity for a self-starter to take ownership of our portfolio of products, ensuring their success day-to-day including: branding content on the listing, marketing tactics, financial health of the business, customer service, risk mitigation and compliance, inventory and developing strategies for growth. Your success will be based on your intimate knowledge of the ASINs you manage, ability to diagnose issues and develop action plans



Responsibilities

Analyse Product Data: Review and interpret Amazon ASIN-level data (sales, conversion rates, page views, costs, etc.) to identify trends, diagnose issues, and propose data-driven strategies for growth and troubleshooting.



Manage Listings: Oversee the health and success of product listings on Amazon. This includes monitoring key metrics, keeping up with market trends and customer preferences, competitive analysis, pricing adjustments, reporting, and ensuring inventory accuracy.



Develop Growth Strategies: Implement strategies to enhance sales and reduce costs, including price optimisation, PPC campaigns, packaging improvements, coupons and deals, customer engagement, and eliminating unprofitable products.



Reporting and Analysis: Produce daily, weekly, and monthly reports, working with our finance team to maintain accurate P&Ls for your product portfolio.



Proactive Problem-Solving: Stay ahead of potential issues by understanding the broader ecosystem in which your products compete, including changes in competitor dynamics, industry trends, and Amazon policies.



Business Transition Management: Lead integration efforts when acquiring new product lines. This includes auditing the acquired business, optimising listings, and ensuring seamless transitions of accounts and customer processes.



Legal and Compliance Coordination: Work with the legal team to address intellectual property issues, product suspensions, and unauthorised sellers.



Customer Experience: Collaborate with the Customer Experience Manager and offshore customer service team to deliver outstanding customer support for your products.



Launch and Expansion: Partner with internal teams to develop go-to-market strategies, support impactful product launches, and facilitate international expansion.



Supply Chain Coordination: Ensure products meet quality standards, remain in stock, have updated packaging, and comply with all necessary certifications.



Data & Reporting Expertise: Proficiently uses Excel, Google Sheets, dashboards, and other data-driven tools to identify trends, opportunities and risks.



About you

3+ years of experience in product management, marketing, or an analytical role in a fast-paced environment, preferably a startup.



3+ years of e-commerce experience, with a strong focus on the Amazon ecosystem.



Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data, draw conclusions, and make actionable recommendations.



Exceptional communication skills, organisational abilities, and attention to detail.



Proven ability to manage deadlines, prioritise tasks, and navigate ambiguity in a dynamic environment.



Creative problem-solver with a knack for engaging content and innovative ideas.



Proficiency in Excel and comfort with data-driven tools and methodologies.



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, Marketing, Data Science, or a related field.



Preferred: Familiarity with baby product categories and a strong understanding of the needs and preferences of parents and caregivers.



Our benefits

15 days of paid vacation per year.



Remote Work



A standard 40-hour work week.



Please note: We require the successful candidate to align their working hours with the UK time zone.



Heroes is an equal opportunity employer looking to build a diverse, inclusive team. We hire based purely on business need, skillset, and competence and do not consider age, disability, sex, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity, race, religion or belief, or marriage or civil partnerships when making hiring decisions.

title: Amazon PPC Executive
description:
About Heroes

Heroes buys, operates, and scales baby and juvenile brands.



We are ambitious multi-brand developers combining operational excellence with customer-centricity to support parents and children through every milestone of their journey. Built by a team with a background in investment banking, venture capital, and D2C eCommerce, we have the right experience to nurture and grow brands and develop products that simplify, support, and enrich everyday family experiences.



At Heroes, we leave our egos behind, get our hands dirty, and push through obstacles to get things over the finish line. If this sounds like you, you should join us.



About the role

Heroes are looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Executive to drive key marketing activities, ensuring that our products appear high for the most relevant keyword searches.



The successful candidate will play a very pivotal role in the success and growth of the Heroes brand portfolio and be responsible for the efficient management of a significant spend budget for their brand.



Responsibilities:



In-depth and methodical keyword research - identifying important high, medium & low volume keywords to target and implementing a strategy to build rank for these.



Campaign implementation - hands-on execution and management of keyword ranking strategies.



Analysing past performance of current and new products, identifying opportunities to push performance further.



Working with our current portfolio of brands across multiple markets to help drive efficient sales.



Providing summarised and detailed reporting of key performance metrics and driving actions based on the data.



Working highly proactively with the brand management team, offering a wider perspective on product strategy as well as recommendations to grow the brand and product(s).



Being a trusted partner to your assigned Brand Manager, owning the PPC operations, driving their brands, and supporting them with insights that drive the commercial success of the brand(s).



Identifying market trends, driving the use of new features and tactics, and staying up-to-date on what’s happening within the industry.



Onboarding and integrating new brands, setting up a scalable campaign structure that allows for profitable growth.



Working with selected tools such as Helium10, Jungle Scout, Perpetua to analyse keywords, search volumes, and key performance metrics.



About you:



You should have proven experience in managing Amazon PPC campaigns, with a track record of driving profitable growth.



A strong understanding and total ownership of the cause and effect of your actions is crucial.



You will have experience managing marketing campaigns for a wide range of products on Amazon across multiple markets, with knowledge on non-PPC growth drivers.



You should be able to analyse and present performance data clearly and concisely while still being able to drill down to a high level of detail where necessary.



You will have experience using technologies and automation tools (e.g Helium10, Jungle Scout, Perpetua) to help manage activity, but also be able to demonstrate a good understanding of how these function.



You will be highly numerate and able to make informed, data driven decisions. Excellent attention to detail is essential.



You will have a strong ability of leveraging data to communicate your points to colleagues and other stakeholders.



Our benefits

15 days of paid vacation per year.

Remote Work

A standard 40-hour work week.

Please note: We require the successful candidate to align their working hours with the UK time zone.



Heroes is an equal opportunity employer looking to build a diverse, inclusive team. We hire based purely on business need, skillset, and competence and do not consider age, disability, sex, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity, race, religion or belief, or marriage or civil partnerships when making hiring decisions.

title: GoHighLevel Funnel & Automation Specialist
description:
Credit Empowerment University (CEU) is a fast-growing education and consulting company focused on consumer law, credit strategy, and financial empowerment. We help consumers and business owners understand their rights, fix credit issues, and defend against debt collectors through education, coaching, and legal strategy.



We are currently seeking a GoHighLevel (GHL) expert who is experienced in building funnels, workflows, and automations to help optimize our client acquisition and communication systems. We are looking for someone highly experienced with GoHighLevel to redesign an existing funnel and build powerful automations that improve lead capture, follow-up, and client onboarding. The main focus of this role is automation. The ideal candidate understands how to build efficient workflows that convert leads and streamline operations. 

Key Responsibilities



• Redesign and optimize an existing GoHighLevel sales funnel

• Build and improve automation workflows inside GoHighLevel

• Create automated sequences for:



Lead capture 

Appointment booking

 & SMS follow-ups

title: Marketing & Social Media Executive - Boba Brands
description:
About Boba

Over 2.5 million babies have been worn in our carriers. The original design of the wrap has not changed in 15 years— proof of a great concept. When we see a parent wearing their babe in one of our carriers, we know that Boba has helped forge a little link that brings two hearts together. Today, Boba has grown from a small, family-run, shoestring operation to a global team dedicated to bringing that magical bond from our families to yours.



About the role

At Boba, we’re redefining babywearing through innovation, comfort, and style. Our mission is simple: to create thoughtfully designed baby carriers and parenting products that support closeness, confidence, and connection for parents and caregivers around the world.



Rooted in ergonomic expertise and designed in the USA, Boba is a trusted global brand loved by families for its comfort, quality, and ease of use. From newborn wraps to structured carriers, everything we create is designed to make everyday 
nts easier — and more connected.



If you’re passionate about building meaningful relationships with parents and helping bring purposeful, people-first brands to life, Boba is a place where your work can truly make an impact.





Responsibilities

Social Media & Content

Support the Marketing Manager with planning, posting, and engaging with audiences across organic social channels.



Community Management

Act as the brand’s voice on social media by engaging with audiences — commenting, liking, and responding on our channels, as well as relevant brand and influencer pages.



Influencer & UGC Support

Assist with influencer collaborations and user-generated content, including outreach, recruitment, contracts, and product sampling.



Trend Monitoring & Content Ideas

Monitor social media and industry trends and contribute creative ideas to support content and campaign planning.



Marketing Administration

Support cross-team marketing initiatives, help track campaign performance, and maintain marketing documentation and trackers.



Event & Team Support

Assist with trade show preparation, marketing materials, asset reviews, and provide general ad-hoc support to ensure smooth team operations.



CRM &
 Marketing

Support
 marketing campaigns, customer lists, and basic CRM tasks to drive engagement. Work closely with the
 marketing agency and support the Marketing Manager with execution.



E-commerce Support

Assist the Marketing Manager with day-to-day website updates, product uploads, content management, and act as a point of contact for website requests.



Customer Programs

Support loyalty, referral, and retention initiatives, including testing, setup, and ongoing optimisation.



E-commerce Sales Support

Help create sales landing pages, update collections, and support promotional campaigns across the website.



About You

Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.



Familiarity with social media platforms,
 marketing, and basic CRM tools



Basic understanding of e-commerce platforms (Shopify preferred)



Strong attention to detail with excellent organisational and communication skills



Creative mindset with confidence to contribute new ideas



Proactive and self-motivated, able to manage tasks and follow through



Strong copywriting skills



Highly organised and comfortable working cross-functionally



Able to collaborate closely with senior stakeholders across brand and e-commerce



Our benefits

Our benefits



15 days of paid vacation per year.



Remote Work



A standard 40-hour work week.



Please note: We require the successful candidate to align their working hours with the UK time zone. Monday – Friday (9:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT).



Heroes is an equal opportunity employer looking to build a diverse, inclusive team. We hire based purely on business need, skillset, and competence and do not consider age, disability, sex, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity, race, religion or belief, or marriage or civil partnerships when making hiring decisions

title: Shopify Expert: High-End UI/UX Refinement & Liquid Developer (Nike/On Aesthetic)
description:
?The Brand & Vision?

We are a performance-focused youth soccer footwear brand. Our mission is to dismantle barriers for "Unseen Talent" in sports. We aren't looking for a basic Shopify setup—we want a premium, high-impact visual identity that rivals global leaders like Nike, Adidas, and On-Running.



We are looking for a dedicated partner in the Philippines who can bridge the gap between world-class athletic design and clean, custom Liquid coding.



?Project & Compensation?

Total Project Budget: $1,000 USD (Fixed Price / Project-based).



Trial Phase: We begin with a Paid Trial Task for shortlisted candidates to ensure a match in design and coding standards.



Future Opportunity: Success in this project can lead to long-term maintenance and future feature development for our brand.



?What We Expect from You?

Aesthetic Excellence: You must have a portfolio that showcases a "Professional Sports" look—clean layouts, bold typography, and sophisticated white space.



Custom Liquid Mastery (Mandatory): All modifications must be hand-coded using Liquid, HTML, and CSS. We DO NOT use Page Builders (PageFly, Shogun, GemPages, etc.). If you rely on plugins for design, please do not apply.



Klaviyo Integration: Experience setting up Klaviyo flows with custom-coded Shopify themes is a huge plus.



Attention to Detail: You build mobile-first, lightning-fast sections that convert.



?The Selection Process?

Review: We will check your portfolio and ID Proof score.



Paid Trial: Shortlisted experts will be invited to redesign and custom-code a specific homepage section.



Hiring: Upon a successful trial, we will immediately move to the full store refinement.



?How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY?

Please start your application with the word "SOCCER" so I know you’ve read the requirements. Please provide:



- Your Portfolio & Resume: Please share links to your best work (specifically looking for sports, footwear, or premium aesthetics) and your CV.



- Custom Liquid Experience: Briefly describe your experience with custom Liquid coding. Have you ever built complex, bespoke Shopify sections from scratch?



- Availability: This is a comprehensive refinement project. Do you currently have the capacity to take on a $1k project over the next few weeks?



- Trial Agreement: Are you comfortable starting with a paid trial task to demonstrate your coding and design alignment?

title: FULL-TIME SALES & OPERATIONS ASSISTANT
description:
Company: Acland Property Services

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-Time – 8 Hours/Day, 5 Days/Week (Aligned with Australian AEST business hours)

Industry: Construction / Carpentry / Property Services

 

About Us

Acland Property Services is a Melbourne Australia based carpentry and property services company delivering high-quality residential and light commercial projects. We are growing and looking for a driven, organised, and confident Sales & Operations Assistant to help create/manage leads, schedule jobs, follow up quotes, and support business growth through admin tasks. 

This is a long-term full-time role for someone who wants stability, growth, and performance-based bonuses.

 

Role Overview

You will be the first point of contact for new enquiries and a key driver of sales growth. Your focus will be turning enquiries into booked site visits and confirmed jobs, while also supporting day-to-day admin and scheduling.

This is NOT a passive admin role. This is a results-driven sales support role.

 

Core Responsibilities

Lead Management & Sales (Primary Focus)

• Monitor and respond to new leads (HiPages, website,
, phone)

• Call all new enquiries within 5–10 minutes

• Qualify leads (budget, timeline, location, job scope)

• Book site visits into calendar

• Follow up all sent quotes (calls + SMS +
)

• Re-engage old leads and past clients

• Maintain and update CRM daily

• Track pipeline and report weekly numbers

 

Outbound & Business Development

Cold call:

- Real estate agents

- Property managers

- Builders & developers

- Body corporates

- Build and maintain contact lists

- Follow up potential referral partners monthly

- Identify new work opportunities online



Operations & Admin Support

• Managing CRM system

• Job updating

• Answer incoming calls professionally

• Manage shared calendar scheduling

• Prepare basic quote templates (final approval by director)

• Send invoices & payment reminders

• Request Google reviews after completed jobs

• Maintain organised file systems and job records

• Other admin works appointed by the management 

 

Key Performance Expectations (KPIs)

This role is performance-based. Minimum expectations:

• Generate and manage 10+ qualified leads per week

• 100% response to new leads

• All quotes followed up within 24–48 hours

• Calendar booked 1–2 weeks ahead

• Weekly KPI report submitted

• Consistent cold calling activity (minimum daily targets)

Bonuses available based on: your performance within 3 months 



Required Skills & Experience

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Confident and professional phone manner

• Previous experience in sales, appointment setting, or construction/trades preferred

• Strong organisational skills

• Experience using CRM or Google Workspace

• High attention to detail

• Self-motivated and proactive

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace

 

Employment Details

• Full-Time (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)

• Must overlap with Australian business hours (AEST)

• Long-term position – we are looking for someone who will grow with the company for many years to come and get to bigger positions within the company. 

• Monthly salary (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses available after probation period

 

Important: Who This Role Is NOT For

Do NOT apply if:

• You are uncomfortable making phone calls

• You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative

• You dislike sales targets or KPIs

• You are looking for short-term freelance work

 

Who We’re Looking For

We want someone:

• Hungry to grow with a business

• Comfortable speaking to Australian clients

• Driven by performance results

• Organised and structured

• Interested in long-term stability

 

How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes)

2. Your previous sales or appointment-setting experience

3. Internet speed test screenshot

4. The word “ACLPS” in your subject line

title: Motion Graphics Designer / Video Editor
description:
Remote | Contract to Full Time



About Us

We are a woman owned creative studio based in Los Angeles, California working with VTubers, streamers, content creators, and digital brands.



Our focus is building internet native media such as motion graphics, intro videos, creator branding, thumbnails, announcement videos, website visuals, and social media content.



We are a small but growing studio that values creativity, collaboration, and initiative. We are looking for someone who understands online culture, streaming content, and modern video trends and wants to grow with a team from the ground up.



This role will start as contract work so we can build a strong workflow together. The goal is to transition into a full time role with benefits as the company grows.



This is a fully remote position, but there may be opportunities in the future to collaborate internationally with creator agencies, animation studios, and content creators, including potential travel to Japan, Los Angeles, and other creative hubs for events and projects.



What You Will Be Creating

You will help creators build their visual identity and online presence.



Projects may include

• Motion graphics and animated intro videos using tools like After Effects

• Editing previous livestreams into polished content for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram

• Cutting stream highlights and clips for short form content

• Creator announcement videos and promotional trailers

• Eye catching thumbnails that match a creator’s theme

• Stream graphics, icons, and branding assets

• Website visuals and design elements

• Creative marketing clips and promotional content

• Occasional faceless UGC videos for sponsored campaigns



The focus is motion graphics and video editing, not frame by frame animation.



Responsibilities

• Create motion graphics and intro animations using After Effects or similar tools

• Edit long livestream recordings into engaging highlight videos and short form clips

• Follow current editing trends used by streamers and YouTube creators

• Design thumbnails, icons, and digital assets that match creator branding

• Collaborate with the Creative Lead while bringing your own creative ideas and direction to projects

• Take initiative to improve concepts and elevate project quality

• Organize project files and deliver clean editable assets



What We Are Looking For

• Experience with Adobe After Effects for motion graphics

• Video editing experience using Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar software

• Ability to turn livestream footage into engaging edited content

• Strong visual design sense and pacing for online content

• Understanding of internet culture, streaming, and social media video trends

• Reliable communication in a remote work environment

• Ability to manage creative projects and meet deadlines



Bonus Skills

• Experience with Photoshop, Premiere Pro, or Illustrator

• Understanding of popular editing styles used by streamers and gaming creators

• Familiarity with popular video games and gaming communities

• Thumbnail design experience for YouTube

• Basic website visual or UI design knowledge

• Motion branding or logo animation experience



Growth Opportunity

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the studio long term.



As the company expands, this role can grow into a Lead Creative position, helping guide future editors and designers on the team.



We believe in rewarding strong work and initiative. Tea
mbers may receive equipment upgrades, bonuses, or gifted gear based on growth, performance, and KPIs.



Work Setup

• Fully remote

• Contract work to start

• Opportunity to transition into full time employment with benefits

• Chill creative studio environment

• Opportunity to collaborate with creators and agencies around the world



Compensation

• Hourly rate $11 to $15 USD per hour depending on experience and portfolio

• Opportunity for pay increases based on performance and project growth



How to Apply

Please include the following with your application



• A link to your portfolio or motion graphics work

• Examples of stream edits, intro animations, or social media video content you have created

• A short answer to this question



Which YouTuber, VTuber, or streamer do you think has great editing and why?

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Job Title: DevOps Engineer

Salary: 3,000 - 4,000 USD

Working set-up: Remote

Working Shift: European Timezone



Position Overview

We are looking for a highly skilled DevOps Engineer with strong expertise in self-hosted Kubernetes, bare-metal server management, and self-hosted infrastructure. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining custom solutions, with a deep understanding of networking, TCP sockets, and system monitoring. This position requires a proactive individual who can investigate i
, troubleshoot issues, and ensure system reliability and performance.



Why This Role Is Exceptional

Work with cutting-edge technology and solve complex, impactful problems.

Join a passionate, highly skilled team where innovation thrives.

Opportunities for continuous learning and career advancement.

Make a real impact in a growing company that values creativity and expertise.



What You’ll do

Design, implement, and maintain self-hosted Kubernetes (K8s) clusters on bare-metal servers.

Manage and optimize self-hosted infrastructure (we do not use AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud).

Deploy and maintain Redis and MongoDB for high-performance applications.

Automate deployments and CI/CD pipelines using Bitbucket.

Monitor infrastructure using Grafana and other observability tools to ensure system stability.

Troubleshoot networking issues, optimize TCP sockets, and improve system performance.

Develop custom DevOps solutions using Python and GoLang (strong advantage).

Implement security best practices and manage Cloudflare configurations for performance and security.

Investigate i
, perform root cause analysis, and implement preventive measures.

Work closely with development teams to support deployment and infrastructure needs.



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with self-hosted Kubernetes and bare-metal server management.

Expertise in Redis and MongoDB administration and optimization.

Proficiency in scripting and automation using Python and GoLang (big advantage).

Bash scripts knowledge

Experience with Bitbucket pipelines for deployment automation.

Deep understanding of networking concepts, TCP sockets, and low-level system performance tuning.

Hands-on experience with self-hosted infrastructure, ensuring high availability and security.

Familiarity with Cloudflare for managing DNS, security, and traffic routing.

Experience in i
 investigation, troubleshooting, and system monitoring.

Strong knowledge of Grafana and other monitoring tools for tracking system health.

Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with container runtime internals and optimizing Kubernetes performance.

Knowledge of logging and tracing tools for distributed systems.

Strong security background in self-hosted environments.

Experience in writing infrastructure as code (IaC) solutions.



If you are passionate about DevOps, infrastructure, and building scalable and secure systems, we'd love to hear from you. Together, let’s redefine what’s possible. Your next big opportunity starts here!



For interested applicants, kindly answer this form:

title: eCommerce Business Manager
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Manager to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Manager is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Virtual Assistant - Social Media, Marketing, Instagram and Brand Management
description:
I am a Sydney Based Nurse and Entrepreneur moving into consultancy, training and education and coordination - think training for other organisations workers, assistance to find aged care facilities, and advice for people trying to manage family members with dementia at home.



I run a busy healthcare business also and work with a lot of VAs who help run this ship smoothly. I'm now looking for a part time VA with the scope to go Full Time in the future to help take over the Nurse Jayden Brand.



Your duties will include:



- Creating and maintaining a cohesive brand across Instagram,
 and 

- Helping to create a website and write content for same

- Content planning and creation - I will make the raw footage videos based on your advice, you edit, cut, create and turn them into something great for each platform

- Engaging with audience and building a following

- Ensuring a cohesive brand across all platforms and managing regular stories on Instagram

- Creating resources and engaging items on Canva - including copywriting, design and finalisation





Essentially, you'll be my go-to, and my "me behind the scenes" for the whole brand.



What I need:



- Intermediate to advanced experience in marketing and social media management with examples

- Ability to start part time with scope to go full time

- A self-starter who can find what needs to be done and get it done

- Responsive, great english and ability to communicate by slack and voice call

- Ability to plan content and tell me exactly what you need to create great content

- Strong canva skills

- Strong video editing skills



Ideally, you will also be happy to do admin and website based tasks.



To apply, please give me a good understanding of your skills and experience including portfolio and experience, as well as salary expectation, and equipment on hand at home.



Thanks!

Nurse Jayden

title: Executive Operating Partner to CEO/Chairman - $1,800-2,200 USD Monthly
description:
International CEO/Chairman (Pakistan-based, global business operations) seeks elite Executive Assistant to function as strategic operating partner.



THIS IS NOT A STANDARD VIRTUAL ASSISTANT ROLE



You will directly support a CEO/Chairman managing international business interests. You operate with significant autonomy, anticipate executive needs, solve problems proactively, and function as an extension of the CEO's strategic capacity.



Elite Candidate Requirements:



Executive Experience: 5+ years directly supporting CEO, Chairman, or Founder-level executives (verifiable references mandatory)

AI-Native Workflows: Daily ChatGPT usage, automation platforms (Zapier, Make, Notion), advanced research methodologies

Strategic Mindset: You identify problems and present solutions, not wait for task assignments

Research Excellence: Complex research and synthesis capability for strategic decision-making

Global Operations: Multi-timezone coordination, irregular working hours, high-pressure situations

Communication: Native-level English, professional executive communication standards



Compensation Structure:



Base Salary: $1,800-2,200 monthly based on demonstrated elite capability

Payment Method: Direct via Wise/PayPal, no agency intermediaries

Growth Opportunity: Long-term strategic partnership with expanding responsibilities

Performance Incentives: Merit-based increases for exceptional execution



MANDATORY APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS:



1. Executive Experience Documentation: Resume detailing CEO/Chairman support experience with measurable outcomes and achievement examples.



2. Video Capability Assessment (5 minutes maximum):

Record responses to these scenarios:



-Strategic Challenge: Describe the most complex strategic project you managed for a CEO/Chairman, including obstacles overcome and results achieved

-Crisis Management: Walk through your approach to handling urgent, multi-stakeholder coordination under time pressure

Motivation: Why are you seeking a new executive partnership opportunity?



3. AI Mastery Practical Test:

Research and synthesize: 'Strategic market entry opportunities for Pakistan-based companies expanding into Southeast Asian technology and services sectors.'



Deliverable Requirements:



2-page executive brief with strategic recommendations

Include 3 specific opportunity areas with risk assessments

Provide 5 actionable first steps for CEO implementation

Document your AI tool usage methodology (which tools, how used, efficiency gains)

Cite authoritative sources with verification links
