title: Ecommerce Financial Controller / Accounting Manager
description:
ABOUT US

SWOOC Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies in the US since 2015 doing seven figures in sales annually, being featured on the INC 5000 twice. We are seeking a dedicated and committed candidate that is looking for a long-term position with room to grow with our company.



For a candidate with the drive to learn and grow, this truly is an amazing opportunity. We are recruiting, training & building a team for long and successful careers with our company. Our ideal candidate is committed to growing together with us, and in turn, we will give you all the tools and support to succeed and grow in your career.



Are you passionate about:

• Think Big

• Learn & Grow

• Focus on the Future

• Be Fueled by Innovation

• Take Ownership

• Be Respectful



Then, you've found the right place! Our team values these qualities and seeks individuals who are enthusiastic about making an impact.



This opportunity may not be the perfect match if:

• You're just looking for any gig to try

• Adapting to USA working hours doesn't fit your schedule

• Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 



ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting, effective budget management, compliance with accounting standards, and support for strategic financial planning. This role involves leading the accounting team, optimizing financial processes, and contributing to the overall financial health and growth of the organization.



• Oversee all accounting operations, including Payroll, Billing, A/R, A/P, GL, Cost Accounting, Inventory Accounting, and Revenue Recognition.

• Coordinate and direct the preparation of the budget and financial forecasts and report variances.

• Track projected costs and actual costs, determine underlying causes of differences, solve issues, and continuously improve • projections.

• Prepare and publish timely monthly financial statements.

• Manage and report the P&L on a product level (50+ products).

• Support and oversee month-end and year-end close processes to meet deadlines.

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting.

• Manage and comply with local, state, and federal government reporting requirements and tax filings.

• Develop and document business processes and accounting policies to maintain and strengthen internal controls.

• Manage financial aspects of eCommerce platforms, including payment gateways and sales tax compliance.

• Additional controller duties as necessary.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience.



• Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (Master's or CPA preferred).

• 5+ years of experience in accounting or financial management roles.

• Proven experience in financial reporting and budgeting.

• Experience managing a team and leading accounting operations.

• Familiarity with compliance and regulatory requirements.

• Experience in the eCommerce industry and understanding of its financial dynamics (Amazon experience is a plus).

• Key Competencies: Organization & Planning, Strategic Thinking/Visioning, Business Acumen, Results-Oriented, Leadership & Management Skills, Detail-Oriented, High Standards, Honesty & Integrity

• Master level of QuickBooks Online

• Advanced proficiency in MS Excel & Google Sheets, including Pivot Tables, Macros, and advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, SUMIFS)

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, MS Word, and PowerPoint.

• Experience with project management and collaboration tools such as Asana and Slack.

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms and financial tools (e.g., Amazon, Shopify).

• Strong internet & Tech Savvy.



HOURS OF WORK PER WEEK

• 40 hours per week. Monday - Friday, 08:00am to 01:00pm EST.

• The remainder of the hours can be completed on a flexible schedule.



SALARY & BENEFITS

• Salary is $15-20/hour (DOE)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• 11 Paid Public Holidays

• Quarterly Bonus

• Annual Salary Increment

• Annual Christmas Bonus

• Patent Bonus

• HMO after 3 months (for Full-time Tea
mbers only)

• Education Assistance Program

• SWOOC Tea
mber Discounts

• Referral Bonus Program

• Work/Life Balance

• Salary depends on experience. Paid biweekly via Wise.



If you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume. Applications without an updated resume will not be considered.



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!

title: AI Agent Solutions Specialist (Advanced/Expert)
description:
DMN8 Partners is a leading marketing and automation agency dedicated to scaling service-based businesses. We don’t just "use" tools; we re-engineer how businesses operate. We are looking for an AI Agent Architect based in the Philippines who possesses a near-expert understanding of the modern AI ecosystem to build, deploy, and manage sophisticated autonomous agents for our diverse client base.



The Role

This isn't a prompt engineering job; it’s an architectural one. You will be responsible for designing and maintaining a fleet of AI Agents that handle high-level business functions. You must be able to think conceptually—understanding the "why" behind a workflow before building the "how."



Key Agents you will build and manage:



Sales Development Representatives (SDRs): Outbound prospecting and lead qualification.



CRM Management: Automated data hygiene, entry, and pipeline movement.



Website Monitoring: Real-time uptime checks and performance management.



Operational Improvement: Identifying bottlenecks and automating internal workflows.



Sales Follow-Up & Scheduling: Persistent, human-like outreach and calendar management.



Technical Requirements

Platform Mastery: Advanced experience building with Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT-4o/o1), and Manus.



Agentic Frameworks: Proven ability to build multi-agent systems that can "reason," use tools (APIs), and execute multi-step tasks.



Ecosystem Knowledge: Deep familiarity with automation platforms (
, Zapier) and how to bridge them with LLMs.



Monitoring & Maintenance: Experience in "Agent Ops"—consistently updating prompts and logic to ensure agents don't drift or fail as client needs evolve.



Who You Are

A Conceptual Thinker: You can visualize a complex business process and translate it into a logical AI workflow.



Experienced: You have a portfolio or a proven track record of deploying functional AI agents in a real-world business environment.



Time Zone Compatible: You are comfortable working primarily during Eastern Standard Time (EST) hours to collaborate with our US-based team and clients.



Reliable: Since there is no "fixed" punch-in schedule, you must be a self-starter who hits deadlines and monitors agent performance proactively.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Competitive hourly rate (based on experience).



Performance Commission: Earn additional income based on the success and efficiency of the agents you deploy.



Flexibility: While we require EST availability, we focus on outputs over hours. * Growth: Work at the bleeding edge of AI automation with an agency that is actively shaping the future of service business operations.



About DMN8 Partners

We are a high-growth agency focused on helping service businesses dominate their local markets. By combining elite marketing strategies with heavy-duty automation, we give business owners their time back and help them scale without the overhead.



To Apply: Please provide examples of AI Agents you have previously built and a brief explanation of the logic/tools you used to make them successful.

title: Full-Time E-commerce Customer Support & Operations VA ( Dropshipping | Shopify )
description:
Job Overview



We are hiring a highly experienced, disciplined, and serious Virtual Assistant to manage high-volume customer support and operations for our Shopify-based DROPSHIPPING e-commerce brands.



This is a high-pressure role handling 80–100 customer
s/chats per day.



If you do not have prior dropshipping experience, strong helpdesk experience, and the ability to work calmly under pressure — please do not apply.



This is a long-term role with performance-based bonuses and salary increases for the right candidate.



IMPORTANT (PLEASE READ)



This role is NOT for beginners



This role is NOT for people new to dropshipping



Training on dropshipping basics will NOT be provided



We are looking for someone who can start working immediately



Key Responsibilities

1) High-Volume Customer Support (Primary Responsibility)



Handle 80–100 customer
s/chats per day using

ComSlayer



Respond to:



Order status inquiries



Tracking questions



Delivery delays



General customer concerns



Requirements:



Use approved macros/templates



Maintain a calm, professional tone even with angry customers



Update **Shopify order notes after every interaction



2) Customer Query Tracking (MANDATORY)



Log EVERY customer query in a shared Google Sheets



Track:



Replied / unreplied status



Pending follow-ups



Customer issues and notes



Goal:



Zero missed customer messages



Clean, accurate, organized records



3) Tracking & Delay Management



Monitor shipment tracking using:



Shopify



17TRACK



Identify:



Missing tracking numbers



Inactive tracking



Delayed shipments



Responsibilities:



Proactively update customers regarding delays



Maintain a Delayed Orders Sheet



4) Refund Request Handling (NO AUTOMATIC REFUNDS)



Log all refund requests in a Google Sheet.



Rules:



DO NOT issue refunds unless approved



Clearly communicate refund status to customers



Refunds only possible if shipment can be stopped and approved



5) Supplier Coordination (Execution Only)



Follow up with suppliers regarding:



Missing tracking numbers



Delayed fulfilment



Escalate repeated issues to management.



No negotiation or decision-making authority.



6) Daily Reporting



Send an end-of-day report including:



Total customer queries handled



Unreplied or pending queries



Delayed orders count



Refund requests pending approval



High-risk or angry customers



Supplier-related issues



Tools You Will Use (Daily)



ComSlayer



Shopify



Google Sheets



17TRACK



Google Drive



Requirements (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



2+ years experience working with DROPSHIPPING e-commerce brands



Experience handling international shipping delays



Strong experience with:



Shopify



ComSlayer or similar helpdesk tools



Google Sheets



Experience handling 80–100+ customer
s/day



Excellent written English



Highly organized and disciplined



Calm under pressure and comfortable with angry customers



Serious about long-term work



Applicants without dropshipping experience will not be considered.



Compensation & Growth



Competitive base salary (based on experience)



Performance-based bonuses



Salary increases based on performance



Long-term growth opportunity



Working Hours



Full-time — 8 hours/day



High-volume workload — consistency required.



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To apply, you MUST include:



A short summary of your dropshipping experience



Details of your Shopify + helpdesk experience



Confirmation of your Google Sheets reporting experience



Answers to the screening test below



All applicants MUST write “MONSOON” in their application headline.



Applications without this will be ignored.



SCREENING TEST (MANDATORY)

1) Dropshipping Experience



Which dropshipping brands have you worked with?



What were the shipping timelines and main customer complaints?



2) Helpdesk Experience



How long have you worked with customer support platforms?



Which features do you use daily?

(macros, views, tags, automations)



Have you processed Shopify actions or refunds through a helpdesk platform before?



3) Scenario – Delayed Order



A customer ordered 14 days ago.

Tracking has limited movement and they demand a refund.



Explain:



What you check in Shopify



What you check in the helpdesk system



What you reply to the customer



4) High-Volume Stress Test



You receive 120–150
s in one day, many from angry customers.



How do you prioritize?



How do you ensure no customer is missed?



5) SOP Discipline



If a customer demands a refund but SOP requires approval, what do you do?



Final Note



This role directly impacts customer trust, refunds, and chargebacks.



We are looking for a serious professional, not someone learning on the job.

title: Digital Products VA — Etsy Store Builder & Assistant
description:
About Us:

We are a growing digital products and e-commerce company. We are building something real and we need someone exceptional to grow with us. This is not a temporary gig. This is a long term position for the right person who proves themselves.



The Role:

You will work directly with the founder. You will receive voice memos, rough notes and ideas and your job is to turn them into polished, professional digital products ready to sell. You need to be comfortable working from unstructured input and producing structured, high quality output without hand holding.



Your Responsibilities:



Receive voice memos and rough notes from founder and extract key information

Structure and organize content into thorough professional digital products

Design finished products in Canva to a high standard

Write SEO optimized listings — titles, descriptions, tags

Upload and manage products on Etsy store

Run Pinterest marketing to drive consistent organic traffic

Monitor sales and reviews and suggest improvements

Research market trends and identify new product opportunities

Maintain organized tracking spreadsheets

Send weekly progress reports to founder





Experience We Are Looking For:



Proven Etsy store management experience

Strong Canva skills — you produce beautiful work not just functional work

Etsy SEO knowledge — you understand how people search and buy

Pinterest marketing experience — you know how to drive traffic organically

Research and competitor analysis skills

Strong written English — professional, clear, warm

Spreadsheet and organizational skills

Any e-commerce experience outside of Etsy is a definite asset — Shopify, Amazon, digital marketing, customer service, order management or anything related is highly valued and will be considered seriously





You Are:



Exceptionally organized and detail oriented

A self starter who takes initiative without needing hand holding

Comfortable turning rough unstructured ideas into polished professional output

Someone who takes genuine pride in the quality of their work

Looking for a long term home not just another short term gig

Honest, reliable and communicates proactively





Hours: Part time to start with clear path to full time for the right person

Growth: Responsibilities and compensation grow as you prove yourself. We are building across multiple directions and want someone who wants to grow with us long term. This will be long term position, however there is probation period. 



To Apply:

Tell us one thing you have built, organized, or created that you are proud of. We want to see how you think before we look at your resume.



We may take on full time depending on the experience. Any e-commerce, VA experience is an asset, list your experience and education. Tag your portfolio. Please ensure you include your ETSY experience



You will directly working with the owner, Interviews are conducted from 5PM PST-10PM PST.
?

title: Contracting & Licensing Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
De La Pena Insurance Solutions

$7–$8/hour | Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Only | 8:30 to 5:30 PM CST





We are hiring a full-time Contracting & Licensing Specialist to support backend

operations for our insurance agency.

This is a precision-based role. Small mistakes cause carrier delays, rejected contracts,

and commission issues. We need someone who operates with urgency, accuracy, and

ownership.

We are a driven, fast-moving team. If you are passive, slow to respond, juggling multiple

jobs, or need constant reminders, this will not be a fit.





Core Responsibilities

You will assist our Contracting & Licensing Manager with:

- Sending structured welcome
s to new downline agents

- Setting up SureLC accounts

- Sending carrier contracts through SureLC and agency portals

- Ensuring release forms are completed correctly (Aetna, Anthem, etc.)

- Updating contracting trackers for downlines and LOAs

- Tracking carrier statuses (Requested, Sent, Approved)

- Updating resident and non-resident licenses of the agency, the owner, and our Lines of Authority (LOA) agents

- Prefilling carrier PDF applications accurately

- Keeping documentation organized and complete



This is backend operational work that requires extreme attention to detail





Non-Negotiables

You must:

- Have high attention to detail (errors are not acceptable in this role)

- Meet deadlines consistently

- Proactively provide updates without being chased

- Work during your scheduled hours and be fully available

- Not be working multiple full-time jobs or juggling several clients

- Communicate clearly and promptly



If you disappear during work hours, miss deadlines, or require repeated follow-ups, this will not work.





What We’re Looking For

- Someone who double-checks their work before submitting

- Someone who flags problems early instead of hiding them

- Someone who moves quickly but accurately

- Someone who takes ownership instead of making excuses

- Someone who wants long-term stability and growth



Bonus:

- Experience with insurance contracting

- Familiarity with SureLC

- Experience tracking compliance or licenses



This Is NOT for You If:

- You are managing multiple clients

- You frequently miss deadlines

- You wait to be told what to do

- You struggle to communicate updates

- You treat remote work casually







Application Requirements

To be considered, you must answer all questions in detail via a recorded video on Loom

or any platform:

1. Describe a time you missed a deadline. What happened and what did you

change afterward?

2. What steps do you personally take to ensure you do not make small errors in

documentation?

3. If you were given 10 contracts to send out by the end of day and 3 were missing

documents, what would you do?

4. How do you ensure your manager never has to chase you for updates?



We are building a serious team. If you are disciplined, detail-oriented, and ready to be

fully committed during scheduled hours, apply.



If you are looking for flexible side income or something temporary, this role is not for you.





Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Shopify E-Commerce CFO for 7-Figure Business (Part-Time)
description:
We're looking for a sharp, hands-on financial operator to help steer a fast-growing 7-figure Shopify business.

What we need:



1. Deep, hands-on expertise with Shopify reports and dashboards — this is non-negotiable

2. 3+ years of intensive experience working with Shopify businesses, analyzing data, and driving high-stakes financial decisions

3. Proven experience working with VAT-registered customers across Europe, including compliance and reporting requirements

4. Strong experience managing multiple currencies and efficiently converting them back to a base currency for accurate financial reporting

5. ~15 hours per week commitment



What you'll do:



Build and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports

Identify and communicate key trends across revenue, margins, and performance metrics

Provide strategic financial guidance to support growth decisions

Handle multi-currency reconciliation and European VAT reporting



You're a great fit if you:



Think in numbers but communicate in plain language

Are comfortable owning the financial narrative of a scaling e-commerce brand

Have navigated the complexity of EU VAT rules and cross-currency financials

Can move fast and work independently



If you've read this far and you're serious about this role, start your application with "CFO" — it tells us everything we need to know.

title: URGENT HIRING!! Bookkeeper
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our team. This role requires someone who is highly organized, extremely accurate, and experienced in managing financial records and reports.



Bookkeeping requires precision and consistency, so we are looking for someone who can follow instructions carefully and maintain a high level of accuracy in all financial entries. Even small mistakes can impact financial reporting, so attention to detail is critical in this role.



If you have strong experience with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, QuickBooks, payroll, and invoicing, and you take pride in maintaining clean and accurate financial records, we would love to hear from you.



Responsibilities:

* Maintain accurate financial records and bookkeeping entries

* Manage invoicing, billing, and payment tracking

* Process and manage payroll records and reports

* Reconcile bank accounts and financial transactions

* Prepare and maintain financial spreadsheets and reports

* Ensure all financial data is organized and up to date

* Review records carefully to ensure zero errors and full accuracy

* Follow bookkeeping procedures and internal financial processes



Requirements:

* Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting

* Strong experience with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

* Experience using QuickBooks

* Experience with payroll processing and invoicing

* Strong attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to follow instructions and financial processes carefully

* Excellent organizational and documentation skills

* Strong written and spoken English communication



Preferred Qualifications:

* Previous experience working with US-based clients

* Experience managing multiple financial accounts or clients

* Understanding of financial reporting and reconciliation



Ready to Join Our Team?

Apply now and put your bookkeeping precision and financial expertise to work! Start by filling out our short application form here: 



IMPORTANT!!!

Make sure to follow the video instructions on the form carefully — this helps us review your application faster and increases your chances of moving forward in the process.



Once your form is submitted, our team will review your application and contact you with the next steps. We can’t wait to learn more about you!

title: Klaviyo Specialist
description:
Role: Klaviyo Troubleshooting & Optimization Expert

Reports to: Head of Marketing / Ecommerce Leadership

Location: Remote / Flexible

Start Date: Immediate



Who You Are



You treat Klaviyo like a profit channel, not a boutique design tool. You think in numbers,

flows, segments, and lift. You get that every
 and SMS campaign should have a

measurable impact on revenue. You fix problems fast. You prevent mistakes before they

cost money. You turn data into actions.

You don’t talk fluff. You deliver outcomes.



Core Responsibilities (Project Scope)



1. Full Klaviyo Audit & Health Check

Evaluate existing account setup, flows, lists, tags, and data syncs with Shopify.

Report on gaps in segments, deliverability issues, list hygiene, channel attribution, and

cost drivers.

Deliver a prioritized fix roadmap with measurable KPIs.



2. Deliverability & List Management

Troubleshoot delivery issues.

Set up suppression lists, hygiene segments, and re-engagement flows to protect

sending reputation.

Tune profile count vs active audience to reduce plan cost inflation (profiling bloat issues

are common).



3. Flows & Automation Buildout

Audit and fix existing flows (welcome, cart abandonment, browse, post-purchase

sequences).

Rebuild or optimize flows with smart logic and clear revenue goals.

Ensure cross-channel flows 
 + SMS) are aligned and balanced.



4. Campaign Planning & Segmentation Strategy

Map campaign calendar with revenue targets.

Build advanced segments based on behavior, purchase history, and CLV predictions.

A/B and holdout tests with clear success criteria.



5. Analytics, Attribution & Reporting

Build dashboards showing revenue attributed to specific flows and campaigns.

Deliver clean reporting each week with insights and next steps.

Use segmentation insights to refine targeting.



6. Technical Integration & Tagging Fixes

Ensure Shopify (or other ecommerce platform) sync is accurate and using real-time

events.

Fix any API/data feed issues.

Implement custom property tagging where relevant.



7. Knowledge Transfer & Playbook Creation

Document winning templates, segment logic, naming standards, and flow cadences.

Train internal stakeholders so the brand doesn’t remain dependent.



Must-Have Skills + Experience



? Proven track record with Klaviyo implementations for DTC ecommerce.

? Deep flow automation experience (complex multi-step flows, conditional logic).

? Strong data segmentation chops (behavioral, lifecycle, predicted value).

? Comfortable with KPI tracking, revenue attribution, and analytics.

? Experience with Shopify (primary), plus other integrations (Rivo/other loyalty,

etc.).

? Troubleshooting deliverability, list hygiene, and campaign throttling issues.

? Experience reducing cost by pruning profiles vs paying for inactive data.

? Able to own both strategy and execution.



Nice-to-Haves



SMS campaigns within Klaviyo and channel optimization.

AI content automation experience (K:AI Marketing Agent).

Experience with audience expansion via web forms and on-site embeds.



Deliverables & KPIs

• Completed audit with prioritized fix list and projected revenue impact.

• Resolved top 5 tactical fires (deliverability, flows that are broken, cost bloating).

• Build or optimize key flows with revenue tracking.

• Segment logic improvement and test execution calendar.

• Weekly reporting dashboard live.

• Show measurable improvements: attributed revenue up, churn down, deliverability

stable, list hygiene improved.

• Playbook ready for handoff.

Q uant i fi ab l e met ri c ex pect at i ons e.g.

• 10–30% uplift in
 attributed revenue (benchmarked).

• Clear reduction in wasted profile costs.



To apply, please send your resume to 
 - write your name and the

position you are applying for as the subject line



This is an urgent requirement and interview schedules can be given immediately for

shortlisted applicants

title: Civil Engineer / Quantity Surveyor - Commercial & Residential Projects (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor/Office Engineer to join our dynamic team. This multifaceted role combines quantity surveying expertise with office engineering and financial administration, focusing on accurate cost estimation, project budgeting, and comprehensive project support. The successful candidate will work closely with our project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure precise cost control and seamless project delivery from concept to completion.



Key Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Quantity Surveying



Project Estimating: Calculate materials, labor costs, and overall project budgets with precision

BOQ & BOM Preparation: Develop comprehensive Bills of Quantities and Bills of Materials for all projects

Job Pricing: Analyze construction plans and prepare detailed quantity requirements and pricing structures

Contract Analysis: Scrutinize maintenance costs, material expenses, and contracts to secure optimal deals

Tender Management: Analyze tenders and manage procurement processes for construction and design projects

Prepare accurate brickwork and blockwork quantity take-offs, including bricks, blocks, mortar, lintels, insulation, and related masonry components

Analyze brickwork labor and material rates to ensure competitive and accurate pricing

Estimating Tools: Utilize software including Simpro, JobTread, Bluebeam, PlanSwift, CostX, Measure Square, Stone Pro, and Microsoft Office to support estimating, budgeting, and project documentation.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Stakeholder Liaison: Coordinate with site managers, clients, contractors, and subcontractors to ensure smooth project execution

Reporting: Prepare comprehensive reports, analyses, contracts, budgets, and risk assessments

Strategic Advisory: Advise managers and clients on cost improvements, new strategies, and savings opportunities

Change Management: Document design changes and update budgets accordingly

Material Management: Track materials inventory and coordinate ordering when required



Financial Administration & Office Support



Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and perform data entry for financial documentation

Administrative Support: Assist staff accountants and handle various office and financial tasks

Client Administration: Manage administrative tasks delegated by clients with efficiency and accuracy



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Quantity Surveying: Proven experience in cost estimation, BOQ preparation, and quantity surveying methodologies

Construction Knowledge: Strong understanding of construction processes, materials, and industry standards

Financial Acumen: Experience with budget management, financial reporting, and cost control

Contract Management: Knowledge of construction contracts, procurement, and tender analysis

Simpro Experience: Hands-on experience using Simpro for job costing, project budgeting, invoicing, and workflow management



Professional Skills



Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities with exceptional attention to detail

Software Proficiency: Competency in quantity surveying software, spreadsheet applications, and financial systems

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for client and contractor liaison

Organization: Outstanding organizational skills with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Adaptability: Flexibility to handle diverse administrative and technical tasks



What We Offer



Competitive salary package

Opportunity to work with self-builders across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training opportunities

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Involvement in diverse construction and visualization projects

Remote working flexibility with comprehensive project support systems

Experience working on international projects with diverse clients.



Application Instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Parts Coordinator
description:
The Parts Coordinator plays a critical role in supporting the daily operations of the company by coordinating HVAC parts ordering, warranty tracking, technician support, and job follow-through. This position serves as a key point of communication between technicians in the field, suppliers, and the office to ensure repairs move forward efficiently. 



The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment. This role is responsible for assisting technicians with part pricing and availability while they are onsite, ordering necessary parts, tracking warranty claims, sending repair estimates to customers, and monitoring approved estimates through scheduling and completion. This role will also assist with inbound calls and maintain accurate job updates within the company's CRM system. This position is essential in keeping service jobs moving smoothly, minimizing delays, and ensuring rapid turnaround for repairs.  



Key Responsibilities: 

*Serve as the primary contact for technicians while they are onsite

*Verify correct model numbers, serial numbers, and part compatibility before ordering  

*Quickly contact distributors to obtain real-time pricing, stock availability, and pickup options 

*Prepare and send repair estimates to customers based on technicians' diagnoses 

*Monitor estimates that have been sent to customers and follow up when needed 

*Track equipment and parts warranties

*File warranty claims with distributors when applicable 

*Coordinate return of defective or failed parts 

*Monitor warranty claims to ensure credits, reimbursements, or replacements are issued 

*Maintain organized records of all warranty claims and outcomes 

*Update job tags and job statuses in the company CRM (Housecall Pro) 

*Ensure jobs are properly documented and tracked through completion

*Answer inbound customer calls and assist with scheduling, service questions, or job updates 

*Communicate with customers regarding repair estimates, approvals, and scheduling availability 

*Assist office staff and technicians with job coordination when needed 



Key Traits: 

*Strong organizational and multitasking skills 

*Ability to work quickly in a fast-paced HVAC environment

*Strong communication with technicians, distributors, and customers 

*Attention to detail when handling parts, warranties, and estimates

*Problem-solving mindset to keep jobs moving forward efficiently

title: Video Editor – Short Form & Paid Creative
description:
We are hiring a skilled Video Editor to help drive content and paid creative for a fast-growing women’s health DTC brand.



This is not just an editing role.



This role exists to turn raw footage into scroll-stopping, conversion-focused content that supports growth across organic and paid channels.



You will work closely with the CEO and Growth Operator.





What You Will Create

• High-performing Reels and TikTok videos

• Paid ad creatives for Meta and TikTok

• YouTube Shorts

• Founder-led talking head edits

• Test variations of the same creative

• Long-form repurposing into short-form assets



You will help build a creative engine, not just edit clips.



What We Expect From You

• Strong understanding of short-form hook structure

• Ability to edit for retention and pacing

• Strong instincts around scroll behavior

• Understanding of direct-response creative principles

• Ability to test multiple angles from one raw video

• Organized file management and content library systems

• Comfortable working with performance feedback



You should be able to explain why an edit performs, not just how it looks.



You Will Also

• Build repeatable editing workflows

• Create branded templates

• Organize content by theme, offer, and campaign

• Document editing SOPs

• Collaborate with paid media to produce testing variations

• Help scale creative output without sacrificing quality





What Success Looks Like in 60–90 Days

• Consistent output of 3–5 short-form pieces per week

• Creative variations built intentionally for testing

• Improved retention metrics on short-form content

• Paid creative structured for performance, not aesthetics

• Organized creative library with clear labeling





Application Process



Step 1: Portfolio Submission

Submit at least 3 short-form examples. Include one that feels direct-response oriented.



Step 2: Why This Role Video

Record a 2–3 minute video explaining:

	1.	What makes short-form content convert?

	2.	How you think about retention and pacing

	3.	How you would approach editing for a founder-led brand





Step 3: Editing Test

We will provide raw footage.

You will:



• Create 1 organic version

• Create 1 paid-ad version

• Provide 2 alternate hooks



We are evaluating creative thinking, not just technical skill.

title: E-Commerce Video Editor for Facebook Ads [DTC Brand in Home Niche]
description:
We are looking for a full-time video editor who understands e-commerce advertising and has experience with direct-response ad editing to create high-converting Meta video ads.



This role focuses on short-form ad videos (60–180 seconds) designed for
 ads. We will provide the script, and your role will be to create the entire video from start to finish using AI tools and B-roll footage.



This includes generating visuals, creating AI voiceovers, editing the ad, adding captions, and delivering a finished video ready to run.



##What You Will Do



- You will take a script provided by our team and turn it into a complete video ad using AI tools and B-roll.

- Your responsibilities include:

- Creating UGC-style or voiceover-based ads using AI and B-roll

- Generating or sourcing your own B-roll, AI video clips, and visuals

- Editing the full ad from start to finish

- Adding captions, subtitles, hooks, and engaging overlays

- Adding sound effects and background music



Videos will typically be 60–180 seconds long and optimized for
, Instagram, and TikTok ads.



##Required Skills



- You must have experience with:

- Editing e-commerce direct-response ads

- Creating scroll-stopping hooks within the first 3 seconds

- Fast-paced editing for high viewer retention

- Producing UGC-style ads

- Adding captions and engaging text overlays



##AI Tools (Required)



You should be comfortable using AI tools such as:

- AI video generation tools (Veo, Sora, Heygen, Kling, etc.)

- AI voice tools (ElevenLabs or similar)

- CapCut / Premiere Pro / Final Cut

- AI image or video generation tools
